_schema_doc.name: human-readable name (EN)
_schema_doc.type: one of: pattern_setup, indicator_rule, structural_bias, macro_correlation, derivatives_signal, onchain_signal, cycle_time, event_reaction, risk_rule, regime_classifier
_schema_doc.description: concrete plain-English description of what this capability detects

detection.rule_spec: if type=rule|hybrid, Python expression operating on features dict
detection.llm_prompt: if type=llm|hybrid, prompt template passed to codex with chart image

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: how to derive entry/stop/target if any

_schema_doc.typical_users: common trader archetypes that use this — auto-populated during extraction
_schema_doc.evidence_pattern: regex to search trader's tweets for evidence of usage

_notes: v1.1 = 70 curated seed + 400 LLM-emerged uncurated (from 99 profiles).

capabilities.name: Falling Wedge Breakout
capabilities.description: Converging downward trendlines with price breaking above the upper bound, typically at end of pullback. Target = wedge height projected upward.
capabilities.description_zh: 两条下降趋势线收敛，价格向上突破上沿，一般在回调末期出现。目标 = 楔形高度向上投射。

detection.llm_prompt: Look at the chart. Is there a clear falling wedge pattern (two converging downward trendlines)? Has price broken above the upper trendline? Return {present: bool, breakout_confirmed: bool, wedge_height_pct, notes}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = breakout candle close, stop = wedge low, target = entry + wedge_height

capabilities.evidence_pattern: (?i)falling wedge|下降楔形|楔形.*(突破|上破)

capabilities.name: Rising Wedge Breakdown
capabilities.description: Converging upward trendlines with price breaking below the lower bound. Bearish reversal pattern after uptrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 两条上升趋势线收敛，价格下破下沿。上升段末期看跌反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Is there a rising wedge with price breaking down? {present, breakdown_confirmed, wedge_height_pct}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = breakdown, stop = wedge high, target = entry - wedge_height

capabilities.name: Bull Flag Continuation
capabilities.description: Sharp up move (flagpole) followed by a downward-sloping parallel channel (flag). Breakout above flag continues trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 快速上涨（旗杆）后形成向下平行通道（旗面），向上突破继续原趋势。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = flagpole height projected from breakout

capabilities.name: Bear Flag Continuation
capabilities.description: Sharp drop followed by upward-sloping parallel channel, then breakdown continues the move.
capabilities.description_zh: 快速下跌后形成向上平行通道，下破继续原趋势。

capabilities.name: Head and Shoulders Top
capabilities.description: Three peaks with middle higher than sides, neckline break = bearish reversal target = head-neckline distance projected down.
capabilities.description_zh: 三峰结构，中峰最高，跌破颈线 = 看跌反转，目标 = 头到颈线距离向下投射。

detection.llm_prompt: H&S top pattern with neckline break? Return head_price, neckline, target_price.

capabilities.name: Inverse Head and Shoulders
capabilities.description: Three troughs with middle lowest, neckline break upward = bullish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 三谷结构，中谷最低，上破颈线 = 看多反转。

capabilities.name: Double Top
capabilities.description: Two roughly equal peaks with pullback in between, support break confirms bearish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 两个相近高点，中间回调，跌破支撑确认看跌反转。

capabilities.name: Double Bottom
capabilities.description: Two roughly equal troughs with bounce in between, resistance break confirms bullish reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 两个相近低点，中间反弹，上破阻力确认看多反转。

capabilities.name: Cup and Handle
capabilities.description: U-shaped rounded bottom followed by a small consolidation (handle), then breakout upward.
capabilities.description_zh: U 形圆底后接小幅整理（柄），然后向上突破。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = cup depth projected from handle breakout

capabilities.name: Ascending Triangle Breakout
capabilities.description: Horizontal resistance with rising lows, eventually breaks upward continuing trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 水平阻力 + 抬升低点，最终向上突破延续趋势。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = triangle height projected from breakout

capabilities.name: Descending Triangle Breakdown
capabilities.description: Horizontal support with falling highs, eventually breaks downward.
capabilities.description_zh: 水平支撑 + 下降高点，最终向下跌破。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = triangle height projected from breakdown

capabilities.name: Swing Failure Pattern (SFP)
capabilities.description: Price wicks above prior high (or below prior low) then immediately reverses, trapping breakout traders. Often at range extremes.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格刺破前高（或前低）后立刻反转，困住追突破的人。常见于区间极值。

detection.llm_prompt: SFP above/below prior swing? {direction, sweep_level, reversal_confirmed}

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = reversal candle close, stop = wick extreme

capabilities.name: Range High/Low Fade
capabilities.description: Established horizontal range — short near top, long near bottom without breakout confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 清晰横向区间内 — 靠近顶部空，靠近底部多，无突破确认。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: target = middle of range, stop = just beyond range boundary

capabilities.name: Trend Pullback to MA Continuation
capabilities.description: In clear trend, price pulls back to key MA (20/50/200) and bounces, resuming trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 明确趋势中，价格回踩关键均线（20/50/200）反弹，延续原趋势。

detection.llm_prompt: Price pulling back to which MA?

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry = MA touch, stop = below MA

capabilities.name: RSI Bullish Divergence
capabilities.description: Price makes lower low but RSI makes higher low. Signals exhaustion of downtrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新低但 RSI 不创新低，下跌动能衰竭。

output_when_triggered.level_extraction: entry on reversal candle, stop = recent low

capabilities.name: RSI Bearish Divergence
capabilities.description: Price makes higher high but RSI makes lower high.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新高但 RSI 不创新高。
capabilities.evidence_pattern: (?i)bearish divergence|空头背离|看空背离|顶背离

capabilities.name: RSI Oversold Bounce (<30)
capabilities.description: RSI drops below 30 and crosses back up, signaling short-term oversold bounce.
capabilities.description_zh: RSI 跌破 30 后反弹上穿，短线超卖反弹信号。

capabilities.name: Golden Cross (50/200 MA)
capabilities.description: 50-period MA crosses above 200-period MA, long-term bullish signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 50 均线上穿 200 均线，长线看多。

capabilities.name: Death Cross (50/200 MA)
capabilities.description: 50 MA crosses below 200 MA, long-term bearish signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 50 均线下穿 200 均线，长线看空。

capabilities.name: MACD Histogram Zero Cross
capabilities.description: MACD histogram crosses above/below zero, trend change confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: MACD 柱状上穿 / 下穿零轴，趋势切换确认。

capabilities.name: Bollinger Band Squeeze Breakout
capabilities.description: BBands narrow (low volatility), then breakout with expanded bandwidth.
capabilities.description_zh: 布林带收窄（低波动），然后伴随带宽扩张的突破。

capabilities.name: Fib 0.618 Retracement Support
capabilities.description: Price retraces to 0.618 Fib level of prior impulse, finds support, resumes trend.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格回撤至前一推动段 0.618 位找到支撑，延续趋势。

capabilities.name: Elliott Wave 3 Impulse
capabilities.description: Trader identifies wave 3 of impulse — typically strongest and longest wave in 5-wave sequence.
capabilities.description_zh: 识别 5 浪结构中最强的主升浪 3。

detection.llm_prompt: Elliott wave count visible? Which wave are we in?

capabilities.name: Wyckoff Accumulation Spring
capabilities.description: At range bottom, sharp wick-down sweep followed by reclaim of range (Spring). Signals smart money accumulation.
capabilities.description_zh: 区间底部出现假跌破再收回，聪明钱吸筹信号。

capabilities.name: Wyckoff Distribution Upthrust
capabilities.description: At range top, wick-up sweep followed by rejection back into range. Smart money distributing.
capabilities.description_zh: 区间顶部假突破后被打回，聪明钱派发。

capabilities.name: SMC Order Block Retest
capabilities.description: Institutional order block (last candle before breakout) acts as S/R on retest.
capabilities.description_zh: 订单块（突破前最后一根反向 K）作为回测支撑/阻力。

capabilities.name: DXY/BTC Inverse Correlation
capabilities.description: When DXY breaks down, BTC tends to rally, and vice versa. Used as macro confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: DXY 跌破 → BTC 倾向上涨，反之亦然。宏观确认。

capabilities.name: SPX Risk-On/Off Regime
capabilities.description: SPX trend signals risk-on (BTC up) or risk-off (BTC down) environment.
capabilities.description_zh: SPX 趋势指示风险偏好模式，BTC 跟随。

capabilities.name: Yields Down → Liquidity Up
capabilities.name_zh: 降息降收益率 → 流动性改善
capabilities.description: US 2Y/10Y yields falling signals easier policy ahead → risk asset bullish.
capabilities.description_zh: 美债收益率下行 = 政策宽松预期 → 风险资产看多。

capabilities.name: Gold as Safe-Haven Proxy
capabilities.description: When gold rallies hard on geopolitical fear, BTC sometimes decouples from risk assets and joins gold.
capabilities.description_zh: 地缘恐慌黄金大涨时 BTC 可能脱离风险资产跟黄金。

capabilities.name: Funding Extreme Negative Squeeze
capabilities.description: Funding rate deeply negative for 2+ days — shorts crowded, potential short squeeze long.
capabilities.description_zh: 资金费率连续 2 天深度负值 = 空单拥挤，轧空概率大。

capabilities.name: Funding Extreme Positive Flush
capabilities.description: Funding rate deeply positive — longs crowded, potential long liquidation flush.
capabilities.description_zh: 资金费率深度正值 = 多单拥挤，长爆概率大。

capabilities.name: OI Climbing, Price Flat
capabilities.name_zh: 持仓上升 价格横盘
capabilities.description: Open interest increasing while price ranges — pressure building, breakout imminent.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格横盘但持仓量上升 —— 压力累积，即将突破。

capabilities.name: Liquidation Cluster Magnet
capabilities.description: Heatmap shows clustered stops above/below; price tends to sweep that level before reversing.
capabilities.description_zh: 清算热力图中成群止损上/下方 —— 价格倾向先扫这些再反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Does heatmap show clustered liquidations above/below current price?

capabilities.name: Large Exchange Inflow
capabilities.description: Whales moving coins onto exchanges → bearish pressure.
capabilities.description_zh: 巨鲸把币转入交易所 → 抛压预期。

capabilities.name: LTH (Long-Term Holders) Not Selling
capabilities.description: LTH supply stable during downtrend = strong hands holding, bullish base.
capabilities.description_zh: 长期持币者供应稳定 = 强手持有，看多基础。

capabilities.name: BTC Halving Cycle Phase
capabilities.description: Classify months since halving (typical cycle: +0-6 accumulation, +6-12 parabolic, +12-18 distribution, +18-24 bear).
capabilities.description_zh: 依据减半后月份分段：0-6 累积，6-12 抛物，12-18 派发，18-24 熊。

capabilities.name: 4-Year Cycle Theory
capabilities.description: BTC tends to peak every 4 years, followed by ~12 month bear. Used as long-term framing.
capabilities.description_zh: BTC 每 4 年见顶，然后约 12 个月熊。

capabilities.name: FOMC Week Risk-Off
capabilities.description: Reduce positions before FOMC; volatility spikes typical.
capabilities.description_zh: FOMC 前降仓位，事件前后波动大。

capabilities.name: BTC ETF Net Flows as Demand Proxy
capabilities.description: Multi-day positive ETF inflows = institutional demand, supports uptrend.
capabilities.description_zh: 多日 ETF 净流入 = 机构需求支撑上涨。

capabilities.name: Don't Catch Falling Knives
capabilities.description: Never try to catch bottoms in clear waterfall; wait for confirmation of reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 瀑布式下跌时不要抄底，等反转确认。

capabilities.name: Risk 1-2% Per Trade
capabilities.description: Position size such that loss at stop = 1-2% of portfolio.
capabilities.description_zh: 仓位控制使单笔亏损 = 1-2%。

capabilities.name: Cut Losses Early
capabilities.description: Always have a stop, honor it without second-guessing.
capabilities.description_zh: 总是设止损，严格执行不犹豫。

capabilities.name: Regime: Strong Uptrend
capabilities.description: Higher highs, higher lows, above all major MAs, MACD positive. Bias = trend-follow long only.
capabilities.description_zh: 抬高高点、抬高低点，在所有主要均线之上，MACD 正，偏多。

detection.rule_spec: price > ma200 and ma50 > ma200 and adx > 25

capabilities.name: Regime: Strong Downtrend
capabilities.description: Lower lows, lower highs, below all major MAs. Bias = short only or cash.
capabilities.description_zh: 创新低、压低高点，在所有主要均线之下。偏空或空仓。

detection.rule_spec: price < ma200 and ma50 < ma200 and adx > 25

capabilities.name: Regime: Ranging
capabilities.description: ADX < 20, price oscillates within bounds. Fade extremes, no breakouts.
capabilities.description_zh: ADX < 20，价格在区间内震荡。反手两端，不追突破。

capabilities.name: Regime: High Volatility
capabilities.description: Realized vol above 80th percentile — reduce size, wider stops, avoid tight setups.
capabilities.description_zh: 已实现波动率位于 80 分位以上 —— 减仓、拉宽止损、避开窄 setup。

capabilities.name: ICT Breaker Block Retest
capabilities.description: Previous support becomes resistance after break (or vice versa). ICT methodology — enter on retest of breaker with confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 前支撑破位后变成阻力（或反之）。ICT 方法 —— 破坏块回测带确认后入场。

detection.llm_prompt: Is there a clear breaker block being retested? Which direction?

capabilities.name: ICT Fair Value Gap (FVG)
capabilities.description: 3-candle imbalance where middle candle leaves a gap. Price often returns to fill the FVG before continuing.
capabilities.description_zh: 3 根 K 线中间留下缺口的不平衡区。价格倾向回填 FVG 再继续。

detection.llm_prompt: Visible fair value gap / imbalance? Direction and level?

capabilities.name: Three Drives Pattern
capabilities.description: Three successive symmetric pushes to new highs/lows with Fib extensions, typical reversal signal at completion.
capabilities.description_zh: 三次对称的推进到新高/新低，配合斐波扩展，完成时倾向反转。

detection.llm_prompt: Three drives pattern reaching completion? Direction?

capabilities.name: Quasimodo Reversal
capabilities.description: Failed H&S variant — price makes lower low after failed higher high, signals aggressive reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 头肩的失败变体 —— 失败的新高后创新低，激进反转信号。

capabilities.name: Liquidity Grab / Stop Hunt
capabilities.name_zh: 流动性猎杀 / 扫止损
capabilities.description: Price briefly spikes through obvious stop levels (prior highs/lows) then immediately reverses, hunting liquidity before real move.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格短暂刺破明显止损位（前高/前低）后立刻反转，扫流动性后启动真实走势。

detection.llm_prompt: Visible liquidity sweep followed by reversal?

capabilities.name: Doji at Key Level
capabilities.description: Doji candlestick at S/R or trend termination = indecision, often precedes reversal if confirmed by next candle.
capabilities.description_zh: 支撑/阻力或趋势末端出现十字星 = 犹豫，下根 K 确认后常反转。

capabilities.name: Engulfing Candle Reversal
capabilities.description: Bullish/bearish engulfing candlestick at a swing — body fully engulfs prior candle, strong reversal signal.
capabilities.description_zh: 吞没形态（实体完全吞没前一根）在摆动位 = 强反转。

capabilities.name: Pin Bar Rejection
capabilities.description: Candle with long wick (>2x body) rejecting a key level — price was tested and refused.
capabilities.description_zh: 长上/下影线（>2x 实体）在关键位拒绝 —— 价格试探后被否。

capabilities.name: Double Needle Bottom
capabilities.description: Two successive long lower wicks at similar level within a few candles — strong accumulation signal at support.
capabilities.description_zh: 几根 K 内出现两根相近位置的长下影线 —— 支撑位强吸筹信号。

detection.llm_prompt: Double needle bottom (两根长下影线) visible?

capabilities.name: Fake Breakout Trap
capabilities.description: Price breaks a key level on low volume or sparse momentum, fails to hold, returns to range. Trap for breakout traders.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格在低成交量/弱动能下突破关键位但不能维持，回到区间内。突破党陷阱。

detection.llm_prompt: Is this a fake breakout that reversed?

capabilities.name: Triple Bottom Structure
capabilities.description: Three approximately equal lows with upward break — stronger reversal base than double bottom.
capabilities.description_zh: 三次相近低点后向上突破 —— 比双底更强的反转底部。

capabilities.name: Funding/Price Divergence
capabilities.description: Price making higher highs while funding rate trending down (cooling positioning) — divergence suggests healthier move.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格创新高但资金费下降（情绪降温）—— 背离说明行情更健康。

capabilities.name: Basis/Premium Blowout
capabilities.description: Futures basis/premium spikes >15% annualized, signals extreme bullish positioning likely to reverse.
capabilities.description_zh: 期货基差/溢价年化 >15% 表示极端看多仓位，常预示反转。

capabilities.name: Options Put/Call Skew Bullish
capabilities.name_zh: 期权 Put/Call Skew 偏多
capabilities.description: 25-delta put skew relative to call skew flattens/inverts — market pricing less downside fear, bullish.
capabilities.description_zh: 25-delta put skew 相对 call skew 变平或反转 —— 市场定价下行恐慌减弱，看多。

capabilities.name: Global M2 Growth Proxy
capabilities.description: Global M2 expansion → bullish for BTC with ~12 week lag. M2 contraction → headwind.
capabilities.description_zh: 全球 M2 扩张 → 利好 BTC（~12 周滞后）。M2 收缩 → 逆风。

capabilities.name: ISM PMI Business Cycle Phase
capabilities.name_zh: ISM PMI 经济周期阶段
capabilities.description: ISM PMI >50 = expansion (risk-on), <50 = contraction. Rising PMI from below 50 = strongest risk-on signal.
capabilities.description_zh: ISM PMI >50 为扩张（风险开），<50 为收缩。从 <50 回升 = 最强风险开。

capabilities.name: Credit Spreads Widening
capabilities.description: HY credit spreads widening = risk-off signal, precedes equity + crypto drawdowns.
capabilities.description_zh: 高收益债利差走阔 = 风险关闭信号，领先股市和加密回撤。

capabilities.name: BTC.D Shift (Alt Season Trigger)
capabilities.description: BTC dominance rolling over from top = capital rotating to alts = alt season begins.
capabilities.description_zh: BTC 市占率从高位下行 = 资金轮动到山寨 = 山寨季启动。

capabilities.name: Stablecoin Supply Growth
capabilities.description: Growing stablecoin market cap = dry powder on sidelines, bullish fuel for crypto.
capabilities.description_zh: 稳定币总供应增长 = 场外资金蓄势，加密看多燃料。

capabilities.name: NVT Ratio Valuation Extreme
capabilities.description: NVT (market cap / transaction volume) extreme high = overvalued short signal; extreme low = undervalued long signal.
capabilities.description_zh: NVT 极高 = 高估做空信号；极低 = 低估做多信号。

capabilities.name: MVRV Z-Score Cycle Signal
capabilities.description: MVRV Z-Score >7 historically marks cycle tops; <0 marks cycle bottoms.
capabilities.description_zh: MVRV Z 分数 >7 历史标记周期顶；<0 标记周期底。

capabilities.name: Key MA Reclaim
capabilities.description: Price reclaims 200DMA (or 50DMA) after a period below — trend change confirmation.
capabilities.description_zh: 价格从下方收复 200 日均线（或 50 日均线）—— 趋势切换确认。

capabilities.name: Parabolic Blow-off Exhaustion
capabilities.description: Exponential accelerating move with vertical slope = unsustainable, high probability of sharp reversal.
capabilities.description_zh: 指数级加速上涨至垂直斜率 = 不可持续，大概率急跌反转。

emerged_uncurated.name: Orderbook Supply Demand Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Continuously map nearby passive ask depth, bid depth, pull/stack behavior, and identify the current market supply zone, demand zone, and pivotal auction price.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 持续跟踪近端被动卖墙、买墙及其撤单/加单行为，识别当前市场供给区、需求区与关键拍卖中枢价。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-03]“Market Demand = $112K - $110K Market Supply = $115K - $116K Current pivotal price = $114K”；[2026-02-16]“Clear respected market supply around $70K & Clear tested market demand around $65K”。

emerged_uncurated.name: TWAP Flow Detection
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect persistent algorithmic execution such as TWAP buying or selling via repeated passive/offer behavior, steady footprint pressure, and price pinning despite changing liquidity.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过持续的被动挂单/出货、稳定足迹压力以及价格被钉住的表现，识别算法执行盘，尤其是 TWAP 买卖流。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-09-18]“Asia twap seems to be back 👀”；[2025-07-25]“running short position which continues to twap into price”；[2025-10-16]“Constant twap selling since pre-market & open”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Spot vs Perp Leadership
emerged_uncurated.description: Classify whether spot takers, passive spot buyers, or perpetual futures positioning is leading price, and use the leader to determine move quality and sustainability.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 判断当前是现货吃单、现货被动承接还是永续仓位在主导价格，并据此评估行情质量与可持续性。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“spot buyer has been absorbing sell pressure all day on coinbase”；[2025-05-23]“de-risk selling from spot”；[2025-10-17]“loss of coinbase premium”；[2024-01-30]“for today keep an eye on coinbase spot flows ... for binance spot taker bid”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Auction Acceptance Rejection
emerged_uncurated.description: Use value area, POC, weekly/yearly opens, and repeated testing to determine whether the market is accepting above/below a level or rejecting it back into prior value.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 结合价值区、POC、周开年开及反复测试，判断市场是在某价位上方/下方完成接受，还是拒绝后回归原价值区。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-06-25]“market to auction & accept higher”；[2026-02-16]“actual acceptance above $70K and VAH would be required for real relief”；[2025-05-23]“important level from here for the market to auction above”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Absorption and Iceberg Detection
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify large passive participants absorbing aggressive flow or hidden iceberg orders that cap or support price without immediate displacement.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别大型被动参与者对主动流的吸收，或不立即推动价格但持续承接/压制的隐藏冰山单。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“large passive spot buyer has been absorbing sell pressure all day on coinbase”；[2025-07-25]“Potential absorption around $115K”；[2026-03-25]“Looks like we got ourselves an iceberg buyer 👀 $60M+”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Stair-Step Box Consolidation
emerged_uncurated.description: After an impulse move, price forms a horizontal box, breaks higher, then builds a new higher box above prior support. Repeated base-building is treated as trend health and continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格快速上冲后进入横盘箱体，突破后在更高位置再搭建新的横盘平台。连续的“平台抬升”被视为趋势健康、适合顺势持有或等回踩接回。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图7 的 FARTCOIN 画出两个连续抬高的平台；图8 的 PENGU 也是水平箱体突破后扩张；他常说“bit more chop and next leg up soon”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Post-Dump Base Duration Analogy
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare the current post-dump consolidation in bars/days/volume versus a prior base to estimate whether enough time has passed for a local bottom to form.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把当前暴跌后的横盘整理与历史底部在持续时间、K线数量、成交量上做类比，用来判断局部底部是否“盘够了”。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图1 直接比较两段 BTC 底部区间：左侧“18 bars, 54d, Vol 1.74M” 对右侧“14 bars, 42d, Vol 819.65K”，明显是在做历史底部时长/量能 analog。

emerged_uncurated.name: Lower-High Rollover Sequence
emerged_uncurated.description: A series of rallies failing at progressively lower highs, often drawn as repeated rounded tops or arches, signaling buyer exhaustion before a sharper breakdown.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 反弹一波比一波低，常表现为连续拱顶/圆弧高点，说明买盘衰竭，随后更容易出现加速下跌。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图2 在 BTC 1h 上连画三段弧顶并给出下跌路径；2025-08-31 也反复说“lower highs every time”。

emerged_uncurated.name: HTF Confluence Demand Zone
emerged_uncurated.description: A buy zone defined by overlapping Fibonacci retracement, major moving average, and horizontal support/demand. The confluence matters more than any single tool.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用斐波回撤、关键均线和水平支撑/需求区重叠来定义买点，共振强于单一指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: “52k for BTC really has so much confluence.... 200d EMA .382 fib... Demand area/support”；图3 对 RNDR 的绿色区域正是这种多重共振买法。

emerged_uncurated.name: Hash Ribbons Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses Hash Ribbons buy signals or repeated blue-pellet confirmations as a timing filter for major BTC trend resumptions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用 Hash Ribbons 买入信号或重复出现的“蓝点/蓝丸”作为比特币大级别趋势恢复的确认器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-06-14“+Hash Ribbons : Double blue pellets +UP”；2025-03-24“HASH RIBBONS BLUE PILL NOW UP !!! Direction 300K ?!”；2025-07-30“Three blue affiliate stickers of HASH RIBBON ! Hyper Bullish !”

emerged_uncurated.name: Quarterly VWAP Magnet
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses anchored or quarterly VWAPs as defended support and untapped upside magnets, especially for short-term directional context.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用锚定/季度 VWAP 作为被防守的支撑与未触及的价格磁吸位，给出短中期方向框架。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-11“Quarterly VWAP holding us from below. Defended every single test. Q1 VWAP close sitting untapped above. Unvisited. A magnet.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Log-Scale Parabolic Projection
emerged_uncurated.description: Projects late-cycle extensions on logarithmic charts using parabolic arcs, wave counts, and historical symmetry rather than linear targets.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在对数坐标上结合抛物线轨迹、浪型计数与历史对称性，推演周期后段的扩展目标，而非简单线性测幅。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 4/5 以 log 风格的 BTC 大级别上冲到 245k-326k 区域；2026-04-11 对黄金/白银/SPX/Brent 多次标注“log; parabolik çıkış bitmiş olabilir”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Right-Side Tightness Base Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Looks for long basing structures followed by right-side price tightness before initiating breakout attempts, especially in momentum equities.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 寻找长时间打底后右侧价格收紧的结构，再参与突破，尤其用于强势成长股/动量股。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-09“$NBIS 6-month base is forming ... I would love some tightness here on the right side before attempting the breakout.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_014_支撑阻力翻转回踩延续
emerged_uncurated.name: S/R Flip Throwback Continuation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 支撑阻力翻转回踩延续
emerged_uncurated.description: After a breakout, wait for the old resistance to flip into support, then enter on the throwback if price holds the level.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 突破后不追价，等待原阻力翻为支撑并完成回踩确认，再做趋势延续单。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他推文中几乎把“s/r flip”当成口头禅：2025-08-11“textbook throwback to $112K… after a successful S/R flip”；2025-10-31“$TAO projection aging like wine at $485 after s/r flip”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Descending Broadening Wedge Continuation
emerged_uncurated.description: A widening, downward-sloping structure that resolves upward as continuation when higher-timeframe trend remains bullish.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在更高周期偏多背景下，价格形成向下倾斜且振幅扩大的楔形/喇叭口，向上突破后作为延续形态使用。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-06-27 原文“Here comes the next very simple pattern -> Descending broadening wedge continuation pattern”；2025-08-09 也写“Just one descending broadening wedge breakout away from continuation”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Parallel Channel Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use long-lived rising or falling channels to buy/support near the lower bound and target the upper bound or midline.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用长期平行通道判断震荡趋势，在下沿或中线回踩承接，目标看向中线或上沿。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 8 是典型 2 年通道上沿目标；2025-03-26 写“Perfect bounce off the mid-channel trendline and the 200MA on the 3D timeframe”。

emerged_uncurated.name: POC / Volume Profile Confluence
emerged_uncurated.description: Use point of control and visible-range volume shelves as magnets, rejection zones, and confirmation levels for flips.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 POC 与可见区间成交密集带当成价格磁吸位、拒绝位和翻转确认位，与结构位共振使用。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 5 右侧明确画出体积分布，并标注“HTF SL if s/r flip sub POC”；这不是 seed 中已有能力，但在他的图表框架里很核心。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_018_BTC 稳定币主导率轮动
emerged_uncurated.name: Bitcoin Stables Dominance Rotation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 稳定币主导率轮动
emerged_uncurated.description: Track BTC relative to stablecoin dominance as a cross-market risk appetite and alt rotation proxy.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用 BTC 相对稳定币主导率作为风险偏好与山寨轮动代理指标，辅助判断何时从 BTC 转向 ETH/山寨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他在 2024-11-30、2025-03-31、2025-07-24、2025-08-09 多次单独发布“Bitcoin Stables Dominance”并据此解释大盘与山寨走势。

emerged_uncurated.name: Hidden RSI Divergence
emerged_uncurated.description: Use hidden bullish or bearish RSI divergence as a continuation signal within an existing trend, often in combination with Bollinger Band location and price structure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在既有趋势中，用 RSI 隐性看多/看空背离作为延续信号，常与布林带位置和价格结构联合使用。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-30“$BTC 4H hidden bullish divergence on lower BB dip with volume”；2025-02-28“$BTC 4H RSI working on hidden bearish divergence”

emerged_uncurated.name: Outside/Inside Bar Context Read
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret daily or 4H outside bars, inside bars, and 2x inside sequences in relation to nearby pivots, trend state, and follow-through rather than as isolated candles.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将日线或4H的 outside bar、inside bar、2x inside 与附近枢轴位、趋势状态和后续跟随结合解读，而不是孤立看单根K线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-04-29“needs above 64.5k for daily outside”；2024-09-29“$BTC closing in on 2x inside daily”；2025-03-31“now working on daily outside bar with 84.5k pivot above”

emerged_uncurated.name: Throwback Retest
emerged_uncurated.description: After a breakout or reclaim, wait for price to revisit the breakout zone, channel line, or major moving average and judge whether it holds cleanly before positioning for continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 突破或收复后，不追第一脚，而是等价格回踩突破位、通道线或关键均线，确认守住后再做延续。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-07-30“another throwback to 66k range”；2024-05-31“another throwback on daily”；2025-04-30“nice response to the throwback”；图4、图5 都是在颈线/箱体上沿附近等待回踩确认。

emerged_uncurated.name: Candle Body Progression
emerged_uncurated.description: Read the progression from strong expansion candles to smaller bodies or spinning tops as evidence of momentum exhaustion or rollover risk near decision levels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在关键位附近观察 K 线从扩张实体到缩小实体、再到 spinning top 的递进，作为动能衰竭或转弱信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28“Medium body > large body > spinning top”；2025-02-28“Note body progression”

emerged_uncurated.name: Neck-Base Priority
emerged_uncurated.description: In head-and-shoulders and inverse head-and-shoulders structures, prioritize the quality and clarity of the neck-base over perfect symmetry of shoulders.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在头肩/头肩底结构中，更重视颈基线是否清晰、可交易，而不是肩部是否完美对称。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-31“Shoulder structure is often flexible, though the most important feature is a well defined neck-base”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_024_期权成交量远超未平仓量异动
emerged_uncurated.name: Unusual Options Flow via Volume/OI Dislocation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 期权成交量远超未平仓量异动
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect strikes where same-day or very short-dated option volume is multiple times open interest across several nearby strikes, signaling fresh speculative positioning or informed flow.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别同日或超短期期权在多个相邻执行价上出现“成交量显著高于未平仓量”的情况，作为新仓大举进场或情绪/信息流异动信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-09：“$TSLA $TSLL ... Volume was outpacing OI on these strikes anywhere from 3x to over 10x”，且配套图片5-8展示多个 4/10 call strike 的 volume >> OI。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_025_扩张旗形 / 喇叭口延续
emerged_uncurated.name: Broadening Flag / Megaphone Continuation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 扩张旗形 / 喇叭口延续
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify widening price swings after an impulse move, interpreted as a broadening consolidation that can resolve with continuation or breakdown depending on context.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别冲击走势后的波动逐步扩张整理区，把其视为扩张旗形/喇叭口，结合趋势背景判断后续延续或破位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-10：“$MU #MU Broadening flag?” 说明他会主动用非标准教科书形态命名。

emerged_uncurated.name: Intermarket Leadership Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use leadership from cyclical sectors, transports, semis, or related macro-sensitive assets to confirm whether a broader risk-on trend is genuine.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用半导体、运输等领先板块，或其他对经济/风险偏好敏感的资产，来确认大盘或加密的风险开启是否真实。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-09：“Back to back days with the semis and transports hitting ATH’s... Market and economic leaders charging higher together. Supremely bullish.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_027_大宗商品逆风估值过滤器
emerged_uncurated.name: Commodity Headwind Valuation Filter
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 大宗商品逆风估值过滤器
emerged_uncurated.description: Use elevated crude or other input-cost commodities as a macro filter to avoid chasing equity beta and instead wait for deep-red pullbacks.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把高油价等投入成本压力当作宏观过滤器：当商品价格过高时，不追逐股票 beta，只在大跌日分批买入。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-11：“India can’t have a proper bull market $100 crude... Only buy on big red days, till the time crude is > 95.”

emerged_uncurated.name: nPOC Retest Framework
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify naked Point of Control prints from prior volume profiles and use them as discounted re-entry or magnet targets. Bias strengthens when price revisits nPOC inside a broader range and shows acceptance/rejection.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别历史成交量分布留下的裸 POC（nPOC）价位，把它们当作回踩买点、反弹目标或价格磁吸位；若与当前区间上下沿重合，则优先级更高。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 几乎是他最鲜明的方法：2025-07-30 "$115,655 nPOC print hit. Now run it back up to $122,560"；2025-01-23 "Would love a re-test of $91,794 nPOC level"；2025-03-26 "Do we get the $80,347 nPOC re-test?"

emerged_uncurated.name: Range Acceptance / Rejection
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade around whether price gains acceptance back into a prior range, rejects from the edge, or deviates beyond the boundary and snaps back. Focus is less on candle pattern and more on auction acceptance.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕价格是否重新被区间接纳、在边界被拒绝、或发生偏离后回归来交易，本质是拍卖市场里的接受/拒绝判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-31 "Either we run up and rejection recent support and it turns into resistance, or we get acceptance back into range"；2024-01-29 也直接提到 "getting acceptance back into range"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_030_折价区挂单、溢价区回避
emerged_uncurated.name: Discount vs Premium Bidding
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 折价区挂单、溢价区回避
emerged_uncurated.description: Prefer building size only at discounted zones inside a valid bullish structure; avoid initiating large longs at local highs or ATH unless forced by strong trend continuation evidence.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 只在看涨结构中的折价区逐步建仓，尽量不在局部高位或 ATH 附近重仓追多，除非有很强的趋势延续证据。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-23 "I look to buy at discounted prices, not premiums."；2025-06-26 "DCA into levels of discounted price, and scaling out to the upside"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Higher-Lows Defense
emerged_uncurated.description: Maintain bullish bias as long as successive higher lows remain intact, even if sentiment is bearish or price has not yet broken major resistance.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 只要抬高低点结构还在，即使市场情绪偏空、价格尚未突破关键阻力，也维持偏多判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-03-31: "Do we just ignore the higher lows on $ETH or what??"；图片 8 在 ETH 2h 上也明确标了连续抬高低点。

emerged_uncurated.name: Log Scale Regime Framing
emerged_uncurated.description: Use logarithmic scale as the default lens for Bitcoin history to normalize percentage moves, avoid anchoring to nominal price, and compare cycles across orders of magnitude.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 默认用对数坐标观察比特币历史，把不同数量级的涨跌放到统一百分比尺度上，避免被名义价格锚定，并用于跨周期比较。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-26] “Is it even possible to make sense of the #bitcoin price history without grasping log scale?”；[2024-09-25] “Linear scale is for amateurs. Step up your game by using log scale.”；附图 1 同时对比 log 与 linear。

emerged_uncurated.name: On-This-Date Cross-Cycle Analog
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare Bitcoin's price, CAGR, or position in the cycle against the exact same calendar date 4/8/12 years ago to infer cycle progress and expected path.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把当前日期与 4/8/12 年前同一天对照，比较价格、CAGR 和周期位置，用于估算当前所处阶段和潜在路径。

emerged_uncurated.name: Realized Price Gravity
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat realized price and its derived ratios as a long-cycle valuation anchor; price tends to gravitate back toward it in bears, while extended premiums define bull-cycle heat.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把实现价格及其衍生比率视为长期估值锚；熊市价格有回归实现价格的倾向，牛市中对实现价格的高溢价则定义市场过热程度。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] “Realized Price Index”; [2024-11-30] “The Bitcoin price has always revisited the realized price during bear markets.”；[2024-06-18] “Realized Mayer Multiple momentum turning sour...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Price Range Residency
emerged_uncurated.description: Measure how many days Bitcoin spends in each price band to infer maturity, acceptance, and the probability of eventual migration into the next magnitude band.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 统计比特币在各价格区间停留的天数，用于判断成熟度、价值接受度，以及向下一数量级价格区间迁移的概率。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-26] “Days Bitcoin has spent in price ranges...”；[2025-03-29]/[2025-05-23]/[2025-08-30] 多次重复这个统计框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sats Per Dollar Compression
emerged_uncurated.description: Track how many satoshis one dollar buys over successive halvings or years as an adoption/compression narrative for long-term upside framing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪每 1 美元能买到多少 satoshis，观察其在减半和跨年尺度上的压缩，用作采用率提升和长期上涨叙事工具。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-04-26] “At #bitcoin's first halving, a dollar snagged you 8M sats... Now, we're down to just 1,600 sats per dollar.”；[2024-03-30] “1427 sats/$”；[2024-01-28] “2364 sats/$”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Coinbase Premium Thrust
emerged_uncurated.description: Use spikes in Coinbase Premium / Coinbase spot-led buying as a real-time proxy for US institutional demand and short-term trend confirmation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 Coinbase 溢价或 Coinbase 现货主导买盘的突然抬升，当作美国机构需求与短线趋势确认信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他写过“$BTC $ETH Mencetak titik tertinggi di coinbase premium index sejak Desember 2025”以及“Coinbase 一口气买了12000枚”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekly Close Gatekeeper
emerged_uncurated.description: Delay directional commitment until the weekly candle closes above or below the contested HTF level; treat weekend price action as provisional.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在高时间框架关键位附近，先不急于下结论，等周线收盘后再决定方向，把周末波动视为暂时性噪音。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “probably chops around all weekend, will assess on Monday how the weekly closed”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Simple Market Rotation Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Choose the cleanest market and cleanest instrument rather than forcing trades in a messy tape; rotate from crypto to stocks or gold when those offer clearer setups.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 优先交易最清晰的市场和最简单的品种，不在难做的环境里硬做；必要时在加密、股票、黄金之间轮动寻找最容易的一张卷子。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “交易就是找最简单的卷子来做 同一个市场找最简单的品种，不同的市场找最简单的市场道理是一样的 这几天在加密上亏的，在黄金上都赚回来了”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Whale Flow Narrative Fusion
emerged_uncurated.description: Fuse wallet transfer screenshots, exchange flow data, and price candles into a directional narrative about hidden accumulation, distribution, or manipulation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把钱包转账截图、交易所流向和价格 K 线结合起来，构造关于吸筹、派发或操纵的方向性叙事。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图3把 BTC 图表与 Arkham 流向并列；推文写“BITCOIN IS BEING MANIPULATED AND I HAVE 100% PROOF!! ... I connected th...”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_041_高周期水平位收复与回踩确认
emerged_uncurated.name: HTF Horizontal Level Reclaim And Retest
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 高周期水平位收复与回踩确认
emerged_uncurated.description: Price reclaims a major weekly or 3D horizontal level, closes above it, then retests it as support before continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格收复关键周线/3日水平位，收盘站上后回踩确认支撑，再做趋势延续判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-29: “Weekly closes, retests and sweeps”; 图3 ETH 周线粉色横带就是收复后回踩；图6 BTC 也是长期前高平台即将/正在收复。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_042_上升趋势中的动能重置
emerged_uncurated.name: Momentum Reset Within Uptrend
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 上升趋势中的动能重置
emerged_uncurated.description: In a strong uptrend, RSI or short-term momentum cools off through sideways or shallow pullback without structural damage, preparing the next leg higher.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 强趋势中通过横盘或浅回调让 RSI/短线动能降温，但不破坏结构，从而为下一段上涨蓄势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-25: “In strong trends divergences tend to invalidate in the prevailing trend direction.”；2025-04-29: “vertical accumulation with a nice trend reset?”；图7 的 PENGU RSI 高位回落后继续维持强势。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_043_周末薄量订单簿杠杆清洗
emerged_uncurated.name: Weekend Thin Book Flush
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 周末薄量订单簿杠杆清洗
emerged_uncurated.description: On weekends or low-liquidity sessions, abrupt leverage flushes in a thin orderbook create opportunistic entries in the prevailing higher-timeframe direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 周末或低流动性时段，薄量订单簿中的急跌/急拉更像杠杆清洗，若高周期方向未坏，通常提供顺势加仓机会。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-24: “Nothing like a leverage flush on a quiet orderbook Sunday.”；他多次把红日、周末下杀定义为 bull market 中的机会。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_044_BTC 横盘时山寨轮动扩散
emerged_uncurated.name: Alt Rotation During BTC Chop
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 横盘时山寨轮动扩散
emerged_uncurated.description: When BTC holds a local range/high-timeframe support and compresses, capital rotates into majors or ecosystem alts that begin outperforming.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 BTC 稳住局部区间或高周期支撑并进入压缩时，资金倾向轮动至 ETH、SOL 及生态山寨，形成补涨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-31: “alt szn weekend”; 2024-10-30: “hold on to $71.5k LTF now, chop around and let alts spread their wings a little.”；大量 SOL ecosystem / ETH rotation 推文。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_045_生态龙头相对强度比较
emerged_uncurated.name: Ecosystem Leader Relative Strength
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 生态龙头相对强度比较
emerged_uncurated.description: Rank tokens by market cap, draw pairwise comparisons against sector leaders, and build a thesis that the category leader in one ecosystem will eventually flip peers in other ecosystems.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过市值排名和同赛道龙头横向对比，建立“某生态第一龙头最终翻转其他生态龙头”的结构性交易假设。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 多次用 BRETT 对比 WIF/FLOKI/BONK/DOGE/SHIB；图7 直接贴 WIF 与 BRETT 市值排名；2024-11-30 说“ First we flip Floki, then we snatch the hat ”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_046_空投流动性反身性抬价
emerged_uncurated.name: Airdrop Liquidity Reflexive Bid
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 空投流动性反身性抬价
emerged_uncurated.description: Anticipate that a large ecosystem token launch or airdrop injects fresh liquidity that reflexively rotates into the top memecoin of that ecosystem before and after the event.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 预判大型生态代币发行或空投会注入新增流动性，并在事件前后反身性流向该生态头部 meme 币。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-05-31 说“ If BASE drops a token = mega bullish for $BRETT ”；2025-09-30 说“ massive pump once everyone gets their airdrop and 25-40% of that BASE airdrop flows into BRETT ”；图8 用 Base net flows 做辅助。

emerged_uncurated.name: Boredom Accumulation Window
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat silent, frustrating, low-attention periods after drawdowns or long consolidations as the highest expectancy accumulation window before a large move.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把下跌后或长时间盘整后的沉寂、无聊、低关注阶段视为大行情前胜率最高的吸筹窗口。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-27 说“ The silence in the space... is one of the most bullish patterns ”；2025-07-26 说“ EMBRACE quiet times ”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Market Cap Ladder Targeting
emerged_uncurated.description: Project upside by mapping the asset to prior category winners and estimating sequential market cap flips instead of using only chart-measured moves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用历史同类龙头的市值区间和逐级超越路径来推导目标，而不是只靠传统量度涨幅。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 反复说“ flip BONK and FLOKI ”、“ 40B-80B market cap this cycle ”、“ $BRETT at 2B today is better than $DOGE at 5B in 2021 ”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-timeframe Wick Fill Strategy
emerged_uncurated.description: When a large wick is left on 4H/1D/1W, price tends to revisit and partially or fully fill the wick, often first to 50% and later to 100%. The fill level becomes a directional magnet and timing tool.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 4H/1D/1W 出现明显长影线时，价格倾向回补该影线，常先回到 50%，再看是否走向 100%。影线回补位被他当作方向磁铁与择时工具。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-22 说“Price tends to fill the 100% of the wick after revisiting the 50% level”；2026-03-16 说“The wick fill strategy is my favorite trading strategy!”；图8写“>50% wick has already been filled”，图1/2/5/7都有影线回补思维。

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekly 50EMA Bull/Bear Pivot
emerged_uncurated.description: Use the 1W 50EMA as the primary bull-market support / bear-market resistance. Reactions at this level define whether to swing long, de-risk, or wait for reclaim.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将 1W50EMA 作为最核心的牛市支撑/熊市阻力。价格对该均线的反应决定是否做波段多、减仓，或等待收复确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28 直接说“1W50EMA is historically the best $BTC bull/bear market support & resistance indicator level”；图3、图4、图7都把 1W50EMA 写成 Bull Market Support / buy zone。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_051_先扫流动性再反转路径投影
emerged_uncurated.name: Liquidity Run Then Reversal Projection
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 先扫流动性再反转路径投影
emerged_uncurated.description: In a defined range or local structure, project price to first run one side's stop-loss/liquidation pool, reject, and then travel toward the opposite pool. This is used as a forward path map rather than a static setup.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在明确区间或局部结构中，先预判价格会去扫某一侧止损/清算池，随后被拒绝，再朝另一侧流动性池移动。这更像路径投影，而不是单点形态。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 说“projection 100% completed... projecting this 1 month in advance”；图1、图2都画出先上扫 local resistance/liquidity run，再跌向 local support/local low 的完整白线路径。

emerged_uncurated.name: Market Manipulation Psychology Framework
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret price action by asking where the majority are trapped, where stop losses sit, and how market makers can maximize forced liquidations before the real move.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用“多数人会被困在哪里、止损堆在哪里、做市商如何先最大化强平再走真实方向”的思维解释价格行为。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-29 说“99% of traders use the same conventional trading systems”；2024-05-20 说“trying to think like the MM so we can jump on their trades”；2025-03-29 说“usual market manipulation targetting stop losses”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Level Reclaim After Damage
emerged_uncurated.description: After a violent breakdown or trend damage, avoid bottom-fishing and wait for price to reclaim a clearly defined horizontal level before getting long.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在急跌或结构受损后，不直接抄底，而是等待价格重新收复明确的水平位/区间边界后再偏多。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-27: "Don’t knife catch, wait for reclaim"；图 4 在大阴线跌破区间后，核心问题就是是否重新站回蓝线/区间。

emerged_uncurated.name: Mid-Range No-Trade Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: If price is in the middle of a well-defined range with no edge at either boundary, stand aside until range high/low or a clean resolution is reached.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当价格位于清晰区间中部、上下边界都不占优时，主动空仓，等待到区间边缘或等待突破解决方向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-27 和 2025-07-18 都使用原话："Don’t diddle in the middle"。这几乎是他的签名规则，但 seed 里没有把“区间中部禁止交易”单独抽象出来。

emerged_uncurated.name: Core Spot Inventory For Trend Participation
emerged_uncurated.description: Maintain a core spot position during constructive higher-timeframe conditions so that short-term execution imperfections do not force emotional chasing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在高时间框架结构健康时持有核心现货底仓，这样即使短线没有完美做到，也能顺势参与而不陷入 FOMO 追涨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-11: "buy enough spot Bitcoin... to allow me to relax and ride this trend without FOMO"；2025-09-28: "Comfy in spot contains meaningful wisdom"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_056_以 BTC 为基准的机会筛选
emerged_uncurated.name: BTC Benchmarking Selectivity
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 以 BTC 为基准的机会筛选
emerged_uncurated.description: Use BTC as the default benchmark for opportunity cost; only rotate into alts when they can credibly outperform BTC under concentrated flow conditions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC 作为默认收益基准，只有当山寨币在当前资金高度集中的市场里有真实超越 BTC 的把握时才参与。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-05-22: "outperforming BTC is extra hard because dispersion is that wide"；其长期内容也反复强调 buy/hold BTC 往往优于多数主动交易。

emerged_uncurated.name: Broadening Wedge Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Price oscillates inside two diverging trendlines and eventually breaks out, with target projected from the widest part of the formation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格在两条发散趋势线之间震荡，最终向上或向下突破；目标通常取形态最宽处做投射。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 这是他高频专用词。2024-10-29: "$BTC is finally Breaking out of Broadening Wedge after 8-months of Consolidation"；2024-11-29: "#ETH Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Finally Confirmed"；2025-06-09: "$BTC Descending Broadening Wedge Upside Breakout is Confirmed"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bullish Pennant Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: After a strong impulse, price compresses into a small converging pennant and breaks higher for trend continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 强势拉升后，价格缩进为小型收敛三角旗，向上突破后延续原趋势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-12-23: "$SOL Breaks Out and Retests the Bullish Pennant on the Weekly Chart!"；2024-10-22: "$SOL is Preparing for the Bullish Pennant upside Breakout"；2024-07-27: "$SOL Bullish Pennant Upside Breakout has Confirmed"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Symmetrical Triangle Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Price compresses between converging higher lows and lower highs; breakout direction determines continuation or reversal bias.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格在抬高低点与降低高点之间收敛，对称三角形突破方向决定后续偏向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-02-27: "$MATIC ... Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout/Retest has confirmed"；2024-07-31: "$XRP Massive Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout is finally Confirmed"；2024-09-27: "$PEPE Symmetrical Triangle Upside Breakout is Confirmed"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bump and Run Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: A steep speculative run-up above a prior trendline followed by breakdown and reversal, often used to call a new bullish phase after reset.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格先脱离原趋势线陡峭加速，随后完成回撤和反转，常用于识别一轮新趋势启动前的重置结构。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-28: "$FIL #Filecoin Bump & Run Reversal Pattern 📈"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_061_抛物线台阶式上涨结构
emerged_uncurated.name: Parabolic Step-Like Formation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 抛物线台阶式上涨结构
emerged_uncurated.description: Trend advances through successive bases with accelerating slope; late-stage acceleration implies both upside extension and eventual exhaustion risk.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 趋势通过多个台阶式底部逐步抬升并加速，后期斜率明显变陡，既意味着上冲空间，也意味着后续衰竭风险上升。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 7 直接标注 "PARABOLIC CURVE STEP-LIKE FORMATION"、Base 1-4、Sell Point，这是他的专门视觉模板。

emerged_uncurated.name: Horizontal Level Ladder Pathing
emerged_uncurated.description: Map price as a sequence of horizontal support/resistance levels and trade the most likely path from one level to the next, often with a brief sweep before continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把价格拆解成一层层水平支撑/阻力位，交易从一个价位走向下一个价位的路径，常配合先扫流动性再延续。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: Image #2/#3/#4/#7 全是纯水平位框架；Image #5/#8 甚至直接画出白色预期路径，展示从一个水平位过渡到下一个水平位的路线图。

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Sector Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Rotate exposure aggressively between market narratives such as memes, AI, majors, and privacy based on relative strength, attention, and where fresh capital is likely to flow next.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 根据相对强弱、市场注意力和新增资金流向，在 meme、AI、主流币、隐私等叙事之间积极轮动仓位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] “Meme coin money rotating into AI coins”，[2025-10-31] “$TAO going to start AI alt szn”，[2025-01-30] “AI round 2”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Calendar Sentiment Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Use month-end closes, Q4 seasonality, Uptober expectations, election windows, and holiday liquidity gaps as recurring timing edges for crypto positioning.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 利用月末收线、Q4 季节性、Uptober 预期、大选窗口和节假日流动性真空，作为加密仓位时点优势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-09-30] “October playbook… Uptober”，[2024-09-30] “Q4 going into the presidential election”，[2024-10-31] “Monthly close fuckery”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fear Headline Bottoming
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat peak geopolitical or macro fear headlines as likely local bottoms if price refuses to make materially lower lows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 若地缘或宏观恐慌消息冲击下价格拒绝显著创新低，则把极端恐慌新闻视为局部底部信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-28] “Bitcoin not making new lows and barely flinching on the attack of Iran… Good sign”，[2024-10-31] “Iran / Iraq fud again   This has marked every local low on this move up”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Monthly Seasonality Playbook
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses recurring calendar months and crypto-native memes like Uptober/Sendtember to frame directional bias and timing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用固定月份季节性和加密圈月度叙事（如 Uptober、Sendtember）来设定方向偏置与时点。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-30] “It’s officially Uptober in Japan.”；[2024-09-30] 还专门发“Bitcoin's seasonality over the past 13 years”；[2025-08-31] “Sendtember is coming.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_067_前高/前周期 ATH 回踩类比
emerged_uncurated.name: Prior ATH Retest Analogy
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 前高/前周期 ATH 回踩类比
emerged_uncurated.description: Anchors current market structure to prior-cycle ATH breakout and retest behavior; treats old all-time highs as major pivot zones rather than instant breakout levels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把当前结构类比到上一轮周期的前高突破与回踩，把旧 ATH 视为需要消化和回测的关键中枢，而不是一破就单边拉升。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-10-31] “When Bitcoin retested its previous ATH near $20K in late 2020, it didn't immediately rip past it. It initially pulled back on a quick wick nearly 20%...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Magnet Level Narrative
emerged_uncurated.description: Frames large round numbers or major market-cap milestones as magnets that price is naturally pulled toward, often used to maintain conviction through consolidation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把整数关口或大市值里程碑视为价格天然会被吸引去测试的“磁铁位”，用于在震荡和洗盘中维持方向信念。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-28] “$200K $BTC IS A MAGNET”；[2025-09-29] “$500K+ BTC is a magnet.”；[2025-07-31] 对 PENGU 直接给出 “$10B mcap, followed by DOGE mcap ATH...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Washout as Bullish Setup
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats timeline despair, underwhelming news, or public bearish consensus as fuel for a squeeze higher when structure has not broken.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把时间线的绝望情绪、利空落地后的失望、或普遍看空共识视为潜在轧空燃料，只要结构未破就偏向反向看多。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-03-07] “Summit is over and we're not at zero yet... soooo, send it?”；[2025-04-30] “At the first sign of a red candle everyone on here is ready to pack it up and call for new lows. Simply ignore the noise and be more bullish.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Liquidity Sweep Then Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: Price first runs obvious highs/lows or local liquidity pools, then sharply reverses back into range/trend. Used as a directional trigger and timing tool around key levels and event windows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格先去扫明显前高/前低或局部流动性池，随后快速反向回到区间或原趋势中。他把这个当作方向确认和时机触发器，尤其常用于关键位与事件窗口前后。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-30]“Took the liquidity above the recent highs, and is coming back down.”；[2024-12-30]“Liquidity taken and bounce back on #Altcoins and #Bitcoin.”；图3 直接画出向下扫支撑后反弹路径。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_071_ETH 领涨驱动山寨轮动
emerged_uncurated.name: ETH-Led Altcoin Rotation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: ETH 领涨驱动山寨轮动
emerged_uncurated.description: When ETH/BTC strengthens or prints bullish divergence, capital rotation into altcoins is expected. Used to time sector/style rotation rather than outright market direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 ETH/BTC 走强或出现看多背离时，预期资金从 BTC 轮动进入山寨。他用它来判断风格切换，而不是单纯判断大盘涨跌。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-31]“Massive bullish divergence on $ETH / $BTC... rotation taking place.”；[2025-06-29]“#Altcoin summer... it's because of $ETH.”；[2024-11-30]“The rotation from $SOL to $ETH is taking place.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Altcoin Sentiment Washout Accumulation
emerged_uncurated.description: When altcoins are deeply underperforming, social engagement is absent, and sentiment reaches depression/disbelief, he treats it as a favorable accumulation window before a delayed bull phase.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当山寨严重跑输、社交热度极低、情绪进入抑郁/怀疑阶段时，他把这视为后续延迟牛市前的优质吸筹窗口。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-12-29]“Most #Altcoins are still at their cycle low in $BTC valuation. The social media platforms are ghost towns.”；[2025-03-30]“We're at depression with #Altcoins. The bull market hasn't even started.”；图5 市场周期心理图被他直接引用。

emerged_uncurated.name: Horizontal Box Consolidation Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: A clear horizontal range/box forms after impulse; repeated resistance tests or support holds imply accumulation before breakout. Targets are projected to the next HTF resistance zones.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 冲高后进入清晰水平箱体，反复测试阻力或守住支撑，表示蓄势待突破；目标通常看向更高周期的下一个阻力区。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图7 在 Total Market Cap Excluding BTC 上画出长时间箱体与上方目标位；[2024-05-31]“The #Altcoin market capitalization is technically consolidating before a big breakout is happening.”

emerged_uncurated.name: UCTS Multi-Timeframe Alignment
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses the proprietary UCTS indicator across 1D, 2D, weekly, and monthly charts, and upgrades conviction when multiple timeframes flash buy or sell in the same direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用 UCTS 专有指标在 1D、2D、周线、月线多周期上寻找同向买卖信号；当多个周期共振时显著提高交易确信度。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-07-15 “$BTC Flashing a 1D UCTS Buy signal”；2024-07-17 “1D Buy confirmed, 2D UCTS Buy Flashing”；2024-06-24 “UCTS signalled the sell on the 1D and 2D way before the drop”；图 5 月线也直接显示 UCTS Buy/Sell 标签。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_075_山寨同步下降通道突破
emerged_uncurated.name: Synchronized Alt Down-Channel Breakout
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 山寨同步下降通道突破
emerged_uncurated.description: Tracks multiple altcoins forming similar descending channels and treats broad simultaneous breakouts as a regime shift signal rather than isolated coin-specific moves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪多个山寨币相似的下降通道结构，把大范围同步上破视为市场风格切换，而不是单币偶发走势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-20 写“Many alts, repeating the same pattern, are attempting to break out from their downward channels”；2024-08-22 又说“most setups mirror each other”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_076_区间收复后看对侧边界
emerged_uncurated.name: Range Reclaim Targeting
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 区间收复后看对侧边界
emerged_uncurated.description: When price loses a major range and fails to reclaim, target the opposite side; when price reclaims the range, invalidate bearish continuation and rotate targets upward.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格跌破关键区间后若不能快速收复，则以区间另一端为目标；若成功收复，则否定空头延续并重新上修目标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-05-01 “If this bearish trend helds (not reclaiming the range), then aiming toward 52k seems not that crazy”；2024-04-29 也以 BTC 上下区间为核心框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: Uptober / Q4 Seasonality Trade
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses calendar seasonality, especially October and Q4, as a directional bias input for crypto bull runs.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 10 月与 Q4 的历史季节性当作加密多头偏置的核心输入。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-30] “Uptober starts tomorrow.”、[2025-09-30] “UPTOBER STARTS TOMORROW!!! 🚀”、[2024-09-30] “Q4 starts tomorrow. Historically it's the best performing quarter in a bull market year.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Pro-Crypto Political Catalyst Trade
emerged_uncurated.description: Trades crypto directionally off political headlines involving Trump, Congress, taxes, regulation, or state adoption.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕特朗普、国会、税收、监管松绑、国家采纳等政治新闻做方向性 crypto 交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-06-30] “REMOVE BITCOIN CAPITAL GAINS TAX ON PAYMENTS. THIS IS MASSIVE!”、[2025-11-30] “A NEW STRATEGIC $BTC RESERVE BILL GOT INTRODUCED IN CONGRESS” 、[2025-07-31] “SEC CHAIR SAYS MOST CRYPTO ASSETS ARE NOT SECURITIES. HERE WE GO!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Altseason Countdown Narrative
emerged_uncurated.description: Frames market rotation as an imminent altcoin season with countdown-style messaging before price confirmation is complete.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在价格完全确认前，就用“山寨季即将开启”的倒计时框架进行轮动预判。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “FEBRUARY WILL BE THE MONTH OF ALTCOIN SEASON.”、[2024-12-31] “350 days of #Altcoin season start tomorrow.”、[2025-07-31] “ALTSEASON IS COMING!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Horizontal Level Reclaim Entry
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a previously lost or contested horizontal support/resistance as the main trigger. Enter only after price reclaims the level and preferably holds it on close.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把前期失守或反复争夺的水平位作为核心触发条件，只有在价格重新收复并最好收盘站稳后才入场。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "$2750 reclaim and we are good to go"、"0.80c is the level to reclaim"、"0.34c to reclaim for a solid entry"、"$1.68 reclaim for an entry"。这是他最稳定、最重复的执行语法，但 seed 里没有专门的水平位收复规则。

emerged_uncurated.name: Q4 Crypto Seasonality Bias
emerged_uncurated.description: Apply a bullish prior into late Q3/Q4 based on recurring seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Moonvember and year-end momentum.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 基于 Uptober、Moonvember、年末冲刺等季节性叙事，在每年 Q3 末到 Q4 给市场施加一个先验看多偏置。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-30] "#UPTOBER TOMORROW"、[2025-09-30] "Who's ready for Q4 tomorrow? -Uptober -Moonvember -Bullcember"、[2024-11-30] "BRING ON #PUMPTEMBER TOMORROW"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Trendline Break Confirmation Entry
emerged_uncurated.description: Wait for a clean break of a major descending trendline before initiating a swing long, often combined with a horizontal hold above nearby support.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 等待主要下降趋势线被有效突破后再开多，通常还结合附近水平位站稳作为二次确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] "$CRV / $USD - Update   Break that trend line. I will enter"；图 6 的 DOGE 周线也是典型的长期下降趋势线突破后再看上方水平目标。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sector Rotation Watchlist
emerged_uncurated.description: Track which narrative sector is currently leading and rotate focus into the next likely group rather than treating the whole alt market as one block.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪当前领涨叙事板块，并提前埋伏下一个可能接力的板块，而不是把整个山寨市场当成一个整体来交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] "Different sectors will pump one at a time. Right now we have #Memecoins pumping .. I am keeping an eye on #Gamefi for clues of an impending move"；[2024-05-31] 还专门发了 "$INJ Ecosystem" 图。

emerged_uncurated.name: Box Consolidation Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Define a horizontal trading box, wait for prolonged compression, then trade either the reclaim after a false break or the expansion through the box edge. Target is typically the box height or the next major resistance.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先定义水平箱体，等待足够长的压缩整理，再交易假跌破后的收回，或箱体边缘突破后的扩张。目标通常是箱体高度或下一关键阻力位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 4、图 7 都是标准箱体；[2025-06-30] “The longer the consolidation, the bigger the breakout.”

emerged_uncurated.name: BTC Seasonality Calendar
emerged_uncurated.description: Use month-by-month and quarter-by-quarter historical BTC seasonality as a directional prior, especially when current structure is neutral and the trader wants to lean bullish or cautious.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用 BTC 历史月度/季度季节性作为方向先验，尤其是在当前结构中性时，用来决定偏多还是偏谨慎。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-28] “JUNE-JULY BULL SEASON AHEAD”; [2025-06-30] “July: typically bullish”; [2026-03-31] “April up 10/15 times; +18.93% avg. gain.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Altseason Breadth Trigger
emerged_uncurated.description: Track breadth across top alts versus BTC rather than relying only on BTC dominance; when enough large-cap alts outperform together, treat it as altseason ignition.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不只看 BTC.D，而是跟踪主流山寨相对 BTC 的广度表现；当足够多的大市值山寨同步跑赢 BTC，就视为山寨季启动信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] “Altcoin Season Is 68% Ready! Momentum and breadth building up.” 这比单纯 BTC.D 切换更接近广度框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: Delta Time Pivot Forecasting
emerged_uncurated.description: Forecast directional pivots by pre-declared calendar dates or date windows, then use lower-timeframe price action only for confirmation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先预设具体日期或时间窗作为拐点，再用小级别走势确认方向，而不是纯靠价格形态临场判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他大量使用具体日期：2025-08-27“8月28号or9月2号 随时出现不回头暴涨”；2025-10-07“上涨目标6202...超级上涨结束时间2026/1/5”；2026-01-30“一直要下跌到2/15附近”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_088_支撑位磨底 vs V 反分类器
emerged_uncurated.name: Support Friction vs V-Reversal Classifier
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 支撑位磨底 vs V 反分类器
emerged_uncurated.description: Distinguish whether a move is only a rebound or a genuine trend reversal based on how price behaves around support: repeated friction implies rebound, direct V-launch implies new trend.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过支撑位附近的行为区分‘反弹’和‘新上涨’：反复摩擦震荡更像反弹，触及支撑后直接V反更像新趋势启动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-03-31他明说：“在支撑位反复摩擦上下震荡则大概率是个反弹，遇到支撑位直接v反起飞则大概率是新的上涨。”

emerged_uncurated.name: Key Level Reaction Map
emerged_uncurated.description: Anchor the whole trade plan to a few explicit price levels and update directional bias only when those levels are reclaimed, lost, or rejected.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕少数明确关键位建立交易计划，只有当价格站稳、跌破或假破这些位置时才切换方向判断。

emerged_uncurated.name: Forward Box Projection
emerged_uncurated.description: Draw a forward-looking horizontal box before price reaches it, then use the box low/high as the main buy-sell map. The box itself is treated as the core market structure, not just a support/resistance line.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先把未来一段时间的横向箱体提前画出来，再用箱体下沿/上沿作为主要买卖地图。箱体本身被当作核心市场结构，而不是普通支撑阻力线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图3的“2025 BOX”与图4对 2026 年后续箱体的前瞻绘制；[2026-02-05] “At the same time the box is created, it is designed and drawn forward-looking by the chart itself.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_091_比特币生产成本底部框架
emerged_uncurated.name: Bitcoin Production Cost Floor
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 比特币生产成本底部框架
emerged_uncurated.description: Use Bitcoin production cost as a valuation floor. When spot trades below production cost, treat it as a historically asymmetric long opportunity.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把比特币生产成本当作估值底部。现货跌破生产成本时，视为历史上不对称的做多机会。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “#Bitcoin production cost is now at $95,000 Current price is lower than production cost level Historically one of the best buying opportunities”；图1也在展示该指标。

emerged_uncurated.name: Market Maker Trap Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Map likely zones where exchanges/market makers will first force liquidations on one side, then reverse or continue after weak hands are flushed out. This is broader than a single liquidation cluster and includes narrative psychology.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 标记交易所/做市商可能先清算一侧仓位、再反转或延续的区域。这比单一清算热区更宽，包含对市场心理和操纵节奏的判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “The mafia of ByBit and Binance... mainly to cause mass liquidations”；[2025-05-31] “Market makers know exactly how to shake out the weak hands”；[2026-04-09] “TRAP THE RETAILS FIRST, CRASH AFTER!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Six-Stage Bear Market Model
emerged_uncurated.description: Classify the bear market into sequential stages with different tactics: initial top/distribution, first leg down, trap rally/sideways box, capitulation, bottom formation, and recovery.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把熊市划分为连续阶段并对应不同策略：顶部/派发、第一波下跌、诱多反弹/横盘箱体、恐慌出清、筑底、复苏。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图8标题“The Six Stages of the Bear Market”；[2026-02-22] “Bitcoin is currently in Stage 4 out of 6 in the current bear market”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott Corrective Wave Counting
emerged_uncurated.description: Identifies corrective structures such as wave II/IV pullbacks, zigzags, flats, irregular flats, and complex corrections, then projects the next impulsive leg or deeper retracement.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别 wave II/IV 回调、zigzag、flat、irregular flat 等修正结构，并据此推演下一段推动浪或更深回撤。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “currently trading within wave (c) of the corrective wave (IV)”；“wave (iii) has been completed, and a retracement within wave (iv) is expected”；“followed by an Irregular Flat correction (a–b–c)”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott Leading/Ending Diagonal
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses leading and ending diagonals as early-trend initiation or terminal-exhaustion structures inside Elliott Wave counts.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把引导楔形和终结楔形作为 Elliott Wave 计数中的趋势起始或末端衰竭结构。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他单独发过“Leading Diagonal In Elliott Wave Theory”与“Ending diagonal in Elliott Wave Theory”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_096_ICT PD Array 三层失守规则
emerged_uncurated.name: ICT PD Array Violation Rule
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: ICT PD Array 三层失守规则
emerged_uncurated.description: Tracks stacked ICT PD arrays; when three nearby arrays fail or are violated, the setup is considered structurally compromised and stops/partials must be adjusted.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪连续排列的 ICT PD Arrays；当相邻三层阵列被跌破/破坏时，认为结构失效，需要调整止损和减仓。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “3 PD Array Rule ✔️ ‘When 3 PD Arrays are violated, your ass is next.’ ... Learn where to keep yours stops, partial according to ICT”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Candle Compression Exhaustion
emerged_uncurated.description: After a strong directional trend marked by large candles, a sequence of smaller candles is treated as either reversal warning or liquidity compression before a breakout.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 趋势中先出现大实体推进，随后连续缩小 K 线实体，被视为反转预警或流动性压缩后的爆发前兆。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “When the Trend Is Up & We See Big Candles, Then The Price Starts Forming Smaller Candles… Two Possibilities: 1. A Trend Reversal Is Coming 2. Low Liquidity”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Whale Wallet Tracking
emerged_uncurated.description: Track identified whales, funds, foundations, protocol treasuries, and repeat actors across wallets to infer positioning, intent, and likely market impact from sequential transfers and fills.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 持续追踪已识别的鲸鱼、机构、基金会、项目方和重复出现的交易地址，通过多次转账、提币、归集、成交路径来推断其仓位变化、真实意图与潜在市场影响。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 大量推文都以特定角色为主线持续更新，如 James Fickel、James Wynn、BitMNR、Trend Research、Vitalik、Tether、pump.fun。

emerged_uncurated.name: CEX Internal Transfer Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Distinguish true exchange inflows/outflows from internal exchange wallet rebalancing, hot-cold wallet shuffles, and cross-chain operations to avoid false bearish/bullish signals.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 区分真实的入所/出所与交易所内部热冷钱包调拨、钱包重平衡、跨链中转，避免把内部转账误判成真实买卖信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 3、图 4 对 ASTER 谣言的拆解，以及 [2024-08-30] “这实际上并不是哈，这是币安在进行 Arbitrum→Ethereum 跨链”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Oracle-Lag Liquidation Timing
emerged_uncurated.description: For onchain lending venues, liquidation depends on oracle update timing rather than spot wick alone; monitor oracle cadence and borrower repayment windows to trade/interpret liquidation events.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在链上借贷系统中，清算取决于预言机更新时间而非单纯现货插针；通过监控预言机节奏与还款窗口来判断清算是否真的会发生。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-03-31] “他的仓位是开在 Maker 上，Maker 的预言机价格更新是以小时为单位，只有预言机当前价格低于清算价格时，才会开始清算。”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_101_循环贷加杠杆与去杠杆
emerged_uncurated.name: Loop Leverage Build/Unwind
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 循环贷加杠杆与去杠杆
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect recursive borrow-buy-supply leverage loops on lending protocols and map how partial repayments, collateral sales, and debt rotation alter liquidation risk and directional exposure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别借贷协议上的循环贷加杠杆结构，并跟踪还款、卖币、补抵押、债务轮转如何改变清算风险和方向性敞口。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 7、图 8 展示 Aave 上 stETH/WBTC 仓位变化；[2025-12-29]、[2025-12-28]、[2026-02-26] 多次分析“通过循环贷做多 ETH”的巨鲸。

emerged_uncurated.name: Treasury Company Accumulation
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat public-company crypto treasury accumulation, staking deployment, and treasury policy changes as medium-horizon structural demand or supply signals.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把上市公司/财库公司的持续囤币、质押部署和财库政策变化，视作中期结构性需求或供给信号。

emerged_uncurated.name: Public PnL Story Tracking
emerged_uncurated.description: Build trade lessons by serially documenting a trader's changing PnL, margin, liquidation level, and behavioral decisions through time rather than from a single isolated trade.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不是孤立分析一笔交易，而是连续记录某位交易者的浮盈、保证金、清算价与行为变化，从动态过程里提炼交易经验与反面教材。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: James Wynn、Hyperliquid 全胜鲸鱼、麻吉、Techno_Revenant 等案例都被他连续多帖追踪直至平仓/爆仓/回本。

emerged_uncurated.name: Box Consolidation With Volume Build
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify assets trading inside a clear horizontal box while participation/volume steadily rises, implying energy build-up before expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别价格在清晰横向箱体内整理、但成交量或参与度持续抬升的资产，视为突破前的蓄力结构。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-05-20] “most of my money was made by finding Assets which were consolidating in a range but seeing constant increase in volume.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_105_关键位反复测试后弱化
emerged_uncurated.name: Repeated Test Weakens Level
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 关键位反复测试后弱化
emerged_uncurated.description: A support or resistance level becomes more likely to fail after repeated clean tests, especially when price keeps pressing it without meaningful rejection.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 支撑或阻力在被多次干净测试后更容易失效，尤其是价格持续顶住该位置却缺乏有效反抽时。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-04-19] “The more times a resistance is tested, the weaker it becomes.”；[2024-12-25] “Bitcoin is Constantly Touching 100K. The more times a price is touched, the weaker a resistance Becomes.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_106_节假日流动性强弱解读
emerged_uncurated.name: Holiday Liquidity Strength Read
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 节假日流动性强弱解读
emerged_uncurated.description: Judge market underlying strength by how price behaves during holidays or low-participation periods; refusal to dump despite thin liquidity is read as bullish absorption.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过节假日或低参与度时段的价格表现判断底层强弱；在流动性偏薄时仍不下跌，被视为强吸收和偏多信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-12-25] “The fact that Bitcoin didn't dump on Christmas day... is incredibly Bullish longterm.”；[2024-12-23] “If Bitcoin doesn't Dump much during new year and Christmas, that means the market is Ultra Bullish.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Yearly Open Analog Box
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare current post-year-open BTC structure with the prior year's post-open box, moving-average relationship, and expansion timing to infer likely path.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将当年年初开盘后的 BTC 结构，与上一年同期的箱体、均线位置和突破节奏进行类比，以推演后续路径。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图表 #6 直接把 “2024 Open” 与 “2025 Open” 两段箱体并列比较，并叠加均线来做路径类比。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_108_交易所上币/流动性催化
emerged_uncurated.name: Exchange Listing And Liquidity Catalyst
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 交易所上币/流动性催化
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade around exchange listings, launchpool announcements, liquidity-boost programs, or added market-maker support as near-term catalysts for altcoin momentum and repricing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕交易所上币、Launchpool、公示流动性增强计划、做市支持等事件做催化交易，预期短期成交量和估值重定价。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-04-11] “Binance Updates the Spot Altcoin Liquidity Boost Program!”；大量历史推文围绕 “KuCoin listing might be coming”, “Launchpool”, “Binance Futures Will Launch...” 展开交易。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_109_生态 Meme 轮动 Beta
emerged_uncurated.name: Ecosystem Meme Rotation Beta
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 生态 Meme 轮动 Beta
emerged_uncurated.description: When a base ecosystem coin trends strongly or approaches major highs, rotate into smaller ecosystem memes expected to lag and then catch up.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当某条公链主币强势或接近新高时，切换到该生态内更小市值 meme/次级资产，博弈补涨轮动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-03-30] “$MYRO... $sol memes exploding”；[2024-11-18] “$HUND... $sol close to its ATH so its meme will print higher”；这类“主链强 -> 生态 meme 补涨”在他内容里反复出现。

emerged_uncurated.name: Headline Screenshot Momentum Trading
emerged_uncurated.description: Use fast-moving screenshots of headlines, papers, announcements, or viral news as immediate narrative fuel to reassess positioning before the broader market digests the information.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用新闻标题截图、论文截图、公告截图等高传播素材，快速捕捉市场尚未完全消化的叙事驱动并重估仓位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 2 是量子安全 Bitcoin 论文截图，图 8 是 Binance Announcement 封面，图 3 是 Binance Research 成交量图；他的高互动内容常直接由截图驱动。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bond Market Leads Macro Risk
emerged_uncurated.description: Use the 10-year yield and bond-market price action as the smart-money lead indicator for upcoming economic weakness, policy shifts, and equity/crypto de-risking.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 10 年期美债收益率与债市走势视为“聪明钱”领先指标，用来预判经济走弱、政策转向以及股市/加密去风险。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-05-31] “10 year yield broke key support... Bond market 'smart money' always knows”.

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_112_加密先行指示股市风险情绪
emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Leads Equities Risk Sentiment
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 加密先行指示股市风险情绪
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat sharp weakness or reversal in Bitcoin/crypto as a leading indicator that broader equities may soon enter de-risking mode.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把比特币/加密的急跌或关键反转视为股市即将进入去风险状态的领先信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-25] “Crypto slammed. May be an ominous sign for the stock market this week. Crypto has a habit of being a leading indicator of risk off.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_113_关键位破位确认后做目标投射
emerged_uncurated.name: Break Confirm Projected Target
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 关键位破位确认后做目标投射
emerged_uncurated.description: Define a major support/resistance zone, wait for a daily close or confirmation break, then project the next downside/upside target zone rather than anticipating prematurely.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先定义重大支撑/阻力区，等待日线收盘或确认破位，再推演下一目标区，而不是抢跑预判。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-25] “Bitcoin testing the major support of $92,000-$91,000. If it breaks and confirms, a significant drop is likely...potentially $75,000-$74,000.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_114_初请失业金阈值分层框架
emerged_uncurated.name: Jobless Claims Threshold Regime Map
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 初请失业金阈值分层框架
emerged_uncurated.description: Map labor-market regime using hard thresholds in weekly jobless claims to classify neutral, warning, and recessionary conditions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用周度初请失业金的明确阈值分层，划分中性、预警、衰退型劳动力市场状态。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-26] “anything between 200K-250K is nothing to worry about, above 250K is a warning, above 300K is a likely recession.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_115_叙事拉升后的派发识别
emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Pump Distribution
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 叙事拉升后的派发识别
emerged_uncurated.description: When headlines or policy narratives produce overnight gaps or intraday pops, suspect institutions may be using the story to distribute into retail demand unless price can hold the move.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当新闻或政策叙事制造隔夜跳涨/盘中拉升时，若价格无法维持，则怀疑机构借题材向散户派发。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-27] “Institutions bidding things up overnight, dumping into retail (distribution).”；[2025-09-26] “Insiders once again got the info early.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Retail FOMO Exhaustion
emerged_uncurated.description: Extreme retail enthusiasm, leverage, and one-sided narrative acceptance are treated as a late-stage exhaustion signal, especially in vertical commodity or crypto moves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把散户极端狂热、杠杆堆积和单边叙事共识视为行情末端衰竭信号，尤其适用于垂直上涨的商品或加密资产。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-12-29] “never seen such retail FOMO in silver”；[2026-01-30] “Too much leverage and hopium. This always happens.”

emerged_uncurated.name: OTC absorption dominance
emerged_uncurated.description: When OTC share of traded or absorbed supply rises sharply while exchange float shrinks, interpret it as institutional absorption supporting price but also reducing visible liquidity and increasing air-pocket risk.
