emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 OTC 份额显著上升、交易所可见流通量下降时，视为机构在场外吸筹；这既能形成价格底座，也会让盘面流动性变薄、增加快速插针风险。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-29] “With 90.23% OTC dominance and record capitulation ... Smart Money locks supply”；[2026-03-30] “On exchanges, only $761M (6.17%) remain”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Structural floor ladder
emerged_uncurated.description: Build a multi-level downside map using institutional cost basis and proprietary on-chain valuation bands, distinguishing structural support, cyclical bottom, and absolute capitulation floor.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用机构成本区和链上估值带构建多层下行地图，区分结构支撑、周期底和极端投降底，而不是只给单一目标位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-25] “$70K: New institutional re-pricing support. $60K: Current cyclical Bottom ... $54K: Absolute ...”；[2026-03-23] “Liquidity ladder: $65k, $60k ...”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Empty storefront liquidity warning
emerged_uncurated.description: If price holds up or rallies while exchange liquidity and stablecoin inventory drain, treat the move as tactically vulnerable because shallow books can amplify squeezes and flash moves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 如果价格维持或上涨，但交易所流动性和稳定币库存同步流失，则把行情视为战术上脆弱；浅盘口会放大挤压与闪崩。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-31] “-$177M de USDT saíram das exchanges ... 'vitrine esvaziada'”；[2026-03-31] “Low exchange liquidity makes $65k support a Flash Crash target”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Geopolitical stress test
emerged_uncurated.description: Assess Bitcoin by asking whether on-chain absorption and institutional support can withstand exogenous shocks such as oil spikes, war headlines, or cross-asset flight-to-safety.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用“地缘冲击压力测试”来评估 BTC：当油价飙升、战争升级、跨资产避险发生时，链上吸收和机构支撑能否承受外生冲击。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-29] “The Ghost of 1973: Oil at $100 is BTC's 'Trial by Fire'”；[2026-04-06] “Bitcoin Tests $70K Amid Geopolitical Tension”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Base Shelf Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: After a prolonged downtrend, price stops making meaningful new lows, flattens into a narrow shelf/base, then launches when the shelf breaks upward.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 长期下跌后不再有效创新低，在低位横向筑一个窄平台/货架，平台上破后视为高赔率反转启动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 #7 的 BABY 从 0.00784 一带长期横住后，他直接给出 0.01-0.015 反转区和更高目标；图片 #2 的 SOL 也是先筑底再预判加速。

emerged_uncurated.name: Memecoin Holder Quality Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Screen memecoins by sniper ratio, bundled supply, creator share, insider concentration, holder clusters, and early platform-user metrics before taking the trade.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在做 memecoin 之前，先看狙击比例、捆绑持仓、创建者占比、内幕/集群集中度、持有人结构和平台用户等筹码质量指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 #3 里他直接展示 Bundled 25.3%、Snipers 72.2%、Creator 11.8%、Fresh 7.4%；2026-04-11 的 WLFI 推文还写了 "doesn't have snipers... top holders... bubblemap cluster"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Leader Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify the coin or subnet most likely to become the leader of a fresh narrative after a catalyst, then front-run the rotation before broad market recognition.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在新催化出现后，优先寻找最可能成为该叙事龙头的标的，并在市场广泛认知前提前埋伏轮动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 推文："there's clear opportunity post-templar to be the king subnet on $tao... is @ridges_ai the next $100M subnet"，这是典型的催化后叙事龙头押注。

emerged_uncurated.name: Pre-Outperformer Relative Strength Positioning
emerged_uncurated.description: Instead of chasing coins after they visibly outperform, identify the symbols already absorbing flow, holding up after wipes, or benefiting from upcoming attention rotation, then enter before broad consensus labels them leaders.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不是等币已经明显领涨才追，而是先找在回撤后抗跌、先吸收资金、即将接过注意力的标的，提前埋伏“未来的 outperformer”。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-20: "continue longing the outperformers before they're the outperformers"；2024-03-29: "put on the hat a month ago ... about to hit a 10x with 0 mins spent underwater"；2024-03-28: "choose pre outperformers"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Perp Listing Rotation Trade
emerged_uncurated.description: Track exchange perpetual listing cadence and the short-lived flow migration it creates across newly listed or adjacent sectors; trade the liquidity transfer rather than assuming net-new market demand.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪交易所永续合约上新节奏，以及它对新币和相关板块造成的短时资金迁移；交易的是流动性转移，不是假设市场出现了净新增需求。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-18: "short term probably going to be more fruitful to play the flavour of the 24-72hr cartel coins perps"；2025-01-24: "a new listing doesn't mean there's a net increase in total volume, most often it's just volume being transferred from other pairs"；2025-11-03: "nance on track to list more perps this year than the past 3 years combined"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_126_新闻标题波动事件周期
emerged_uncurated.name: Headline Volatility Event Cycle
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 新闻标题波动事件周期
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat scheduled or emergent headline bursts as recurring volatility events that temporarily override slower narratives; reduce certainty, expect leveraged flushes, and trade the reaction rather than the headline itself.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把新闻/政策/舆情爆点视为周期性波动事件，短时压过慢变量叙事；降低方向执念，预期杠杆被清洗，交易的是反应与仓位结构，而不是新闻标题本身。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-23: "thanks for participating in the daily headline induced volatility event"；2025-01-29: "time to lock in for the weekly volatility event"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Round-Number Reflexivity
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat large round numbers as sentiment and positioning magnets where attention spikes, meme volume expands, and traders overreact despite little underlying structural change before versus after the level.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把大整数关口视为情绪与仓位的磁铁；临近、触及、站上后都会放大注意力和过度反应，但关口前后底层结构往往变化不大。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图 #1 的梗图把 "PRE $100k / $100k / POST $100k" 对比成只有触及整数位时全场亢奋，过位后又恢复平静，说明他很在意 round-number 的行为金融学意义。

emerged_uncurated.name: Box Re-accumulation Range
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify prolonged horizontal or slightly rising consolidation boxes inside a broader bull trend; treat boredom, failed breakdowns, and repeated support holds as accumulation before expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别牛市主趋势中的长时间横盘或轻微上倾箱体；将无聊震荡、假跌破与支撑反复守住视为再积累，后续倾向于向上扩张。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-26: "13-month re-accumulation range"；2024-06-30: "re-accumulation phase within a bull market"；2025-09-21: "trapped between 4K and 5K"。这是他最反复使用但 seed 里没有被单独命名的核心框架。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_129_Sell in May 季节性模板
emerged_uncurated.name: Sell in May Crypto Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: Sell in May 季节性模板
emerged_uncurated.description: Project crypto cycle path with a recurring pattern: bullish Q1/Q2 expansion into May, then profit-taking, correction, and later re-expansion into year-end.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用季节性模板推演加密周期：Q1/Q2 上涨并在 5 月前后到达阶段高点，然后止盈回调，年内后段再展开下一段行情。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 #1、#2、#3 多次在 5 月垂线附近直接写上 "SELL IN MAY AND RUN AWAY"；2024-11-25: "Bullish on $ETH until May, aiming for 10k. Then, take profits and step back."

emerged_uncurated.name: ETH-Led Rotation Thesis
emerged_uncurated.description: Track capital rotation from BTC, SOL, XRP, ADA, or memecoins into ETH; treat that relative-strength transfer as the main engine of the next leg of the bull market.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 追踪资金从 BTC、SOL、XRP、ADA 或 meme 板块轮动到 ETH；把这种相对强弱切换视为下一段牛市的核心驱动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-23: "Full rotation from $SOL, $XRP, and $ADA to $ETH has started."；2024-11-27: "Rotation from $BTC and $SOL to $ETH is going to be brutal."

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Capitulation Bottom
emerged_uncurated.description: Use extreme public disbelief, influencer bearishness, or panic narratives as confirmation that a larger bottom or accumulation zone is forming.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把市场极度不信、KOL 看空或恐慌叙事，当作更大级别底部或积累区正在形成的确认信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-22: "FUD marks the bottoms."；2024-07-25: "The disbelief in $ETH right now is out of control. This is exactly the sentiment I like to see."

emerged_uncurated.name: OBV Lead-Lag Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use On-Balance Volume as a leading signal: OBV breakout or trendline break is treated as confirmation that price will likely follow; OBV weakness/divergence is a reason to avoid fresh longs or trim.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 OBV 当作领先指标使用：OBV 先突破或先走强，则预期价格随后跟进；若 OBV 走弱或背离，则不追多或分批减仓。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-31：“Ethereum OBV has broken local resistance already. As a leading indicator this often means that price will follow”；2025-08-31：“$ETH - OBV still giving me no reason to sell.”；图 4 是 OBV 水平阻力突破，图 8 是价格新高但 OBV 走低。

emerged_uncurated.name: Incremental Strength Selling
emerged_uncurated.description: Rather than all-in/all-out, sell fixed portions into strength near target zones, especially after breakouts, euphoric pushes, or when local upside objectives are reached.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不是一次性清仓，而是在目标位、突破后拉升段、情绪过热区按固定比例分批止盈。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“$ETH - Selling another 10% to make sure we see $5k in Pumptober.”；图 3、图 7 都在关键目标/突破后标注“Selling 10%”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Breakdown Reclaim Continuation
emerged_uncurated.description: A breakdown that quickly reclaims prior support is treated as a bullish reset, often better than a clean breakout because weak hands are flushed first.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 关键支撑被跌破后快速收回，视为更强的多头重置，因为先清洗了弱手再恢复原趋势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 3、图 7 多次直接标注“Fakeout, support reclaimed”“Support reclaimed”；2025-07-31 对股票也说“Looks like nothing more than re-testing a breakout.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Month-End / Event Window Volatility
emerged_uncurated.description: Expect unusual volatility and fake moves around month-end, earnings clusters, weekends, and major macro windows; reduce certainty and look for flushes/retests rather than clean trend continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在月底、财报密集期、周末和重大宏观事件窗口，预期更高波动与假动作；此时降低确定性，更关注冲洗、回测和反抽而非线性趋势延续。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-30：“Last day of September, end of month volatility to finish out the month.”；2024-10-31：“End of month volatility at the end of earnings week.”；2026-01-31 提到周末 ETF 休市导致 BTC 更容易被搅动。

emerged_uncurated.name: CME Gap Fill Magnet
emerged_uncurated.description: Use CME Bitcoin futures gaps as unfinished business. Gap fills are treated as key milestones; once filled, trader expects continuation or a fresh directional expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC CME 期货缺口视为未完成目标位。价格回补缺口后，认为市场‘清障完成’，随后应启动新的趋势推进。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-10-29：“BITCOIN CME GAP FILLED!!!!!!!! NO EXCUSE FOR THE BULLS TO NOT GO TO ATH RIGHT NOW AND START THE Q4 RALLY!!!!!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade around repeated month-based seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Q4 rally, and New Year momentum, using calendar effects as a conviction amplifier.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕 Uptober、Q4 rally、新年行情等高频月份叙事建立方向偏见，把日历季节性当作加仓和提高信念的放大器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-10-29：“UPTOBER HAS DELIVERED LIKE HEELLL”; 2025-09-27：“OCTOBER IS THE BEST MONTH FOR BITCOIN WE CALL IT ‘PUMPTOBER’”; 2024-12-31：“2025 is gonna be the biggest year for crypto”。

emerged_uncurated.name: 200W MA Mechanical Bid
emerged_uncurated.description: Set predefined bids around the 200-week moving average as a non-discretionary long-term accumulation rule.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 200 周均线当作预先设定的机械化接多区域，不依赖主观盘中判断，属于周期级别的规则化吸筹。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-30：“I WILL BUY BITCOIN AT 200W MA AT $60,000!!!!!! ... i will follow the mechanical rules and the plan we have set out”

emerged_uncurated.name: Stair-Step Resistance Ladder
emerged_uncurated.description: Map bull markets as a sequence of flat resistance shelves broken one after another, projecting continuation to the next ladder rung.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把牛市理解为一层层水平阻力被依次突破的阶梯结构，每突破一层，就朝下一层目标推进。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图3中连续用粉色水平线标出多个平台阻力，价格逐级突破后直接箭头指向更高目标位，是他非常典型的视觉表达。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_140_ETH 超级周期叙事集中持仓
emerged_uncurated.name: ETH Supercycle Narrative Concentration
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: ETH 超级周期叙事集中持仓
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses a high-conviction, narrative-led concentration framework: when policy, Wall Street adoption, stablecoins, and onchain finance align, concentrate heavily in ETH instead of diversifying broadly.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当“政策转向 + 华尔街入场 + 稳定币扩张 + 金融上链”叙事共振时，不做均匀分散，而是高集中度重仓 ETH 的框架。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-25]“唯有ETH最硬…鸡蛋放在多个篮子里，有时刻并不是一个好策略”；[2025-12-24]“坚定认为现在是最佳eth买入区…ETH未来目标1万➕”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Major-to-Alt Rotation Law
emerged_uncurated.description: A sequence model for bull markets: BTC leads, then ETH, then large-cap majors, then quality altcoins. Used for asset selection and timing rather than pure chart entry.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 牛市中的轮动顺序模型：BTC 先涨，随后 ETH，再到主流大市值，最后扩散到优质山寨；主要用于选币与节奏，而非单纯K线入场。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-20]“BTC和ETH先冲顶，然后是主流中型币…最后再是各种有实力的山寨币”；[2025-09-14]“轮涨定律已经开始”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Policy/Compliance Repricing
emerged_uncurated.description: Reprices crypto assets based on US policy friendliness, stablecoin legislation, and compliant financial-onchain infrastructure rather than legacy crypto-native metrics alone.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 基于美国政策友好度、稳定币立法、合规金融上链基础设施来给加密资产重新定价，而不只依赖传统链上或技术指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-24]“加密结构法案大概率通过…进入良性发展宏观环境的新阶段”；[2026-01-28]“像USD1这种合规稳定币”；[2025-12-12]“SEC主席最新表态‘金融迁移到链上’”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Transparent Wallet Signaling
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses public, onchain-visible portfolio moves as a signaling and accountability device; entries/exits are validated by wallet transparency, not only by posts.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用链上可验证的钱包动作作为观点背书与风控纪律，强调“言行一致”，让加减仓可被外部追踪验证。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-10-11]“我们明牌清仓…链上透明”；[2025-10-11]“当时明牌清仓和做空，是基于多维度的投研数据”；[2025-10-11]“链上清仓15万个ETH”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_144_Meme 币社群信仰强度筛选
emerged_uncurated.name: Memecoin Cult Strength Filter
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: Meme 币社群信仰强度筛选
emerged_uncurated.description: Ranks tokens by cult-like community cohesion, slogan density, identity signaling, and holder willingness to hold through volatility rather than by fundamentals.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 按社群凝聚力、口号传播、身份认同和持币者穿越波动的意愿来筛选标的，而不是按基本面筛选。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “$SPX Is The Only Cult Worth Joining.”、“Believe In Something.”、“Diamond Hands Will Win Big This Cycle”、“$ASTER CODED.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Calendar Month Pump Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses specific months or calendar windows as directional bullish catalysts for crypto or memecoins without requiring deep chart confirmation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把特定月份或日历窗口直接当作行情催化，先给出方向性看涨判断，图表确认反而是次要的。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “June Will Be Bullish For Crypto.”、“Crypto Will Pump In September.”、“PUMPTOBER.”、“Which Memecoin Will Pump In June?!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Bull Run Diamond-Hands Hold
emerged_uncurated.description: Instead of actively trading around volatility, concentrate into a few high-conviction meme names and hold through the main bull phase until extreme market cap expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不围绕波动频繁交易，而是集中押注少数高信念 meme 币，穿越主升浪，直到市值极端扩张才考虑兑现。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “I saw a man turn 50k into 40m+ in 2021... held till the peak... didn't sell a dollar until the project reached a 5 billion+ market cap.” 以及“LEARN TO HODL = LEARN TO WIN.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Global Liquidity Index Composite
emerged_uncurated.description: Build and trade off a composite liquidity index that aggregates central bank balance sheets, FX effects, monetary aggregates, and collateral conditions, then map crypto beta to changes and inflections in that composite rather than any single macro series.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 构建全球流动性综合指数，汇总央行资产负债表、汇率效应、货币总量与抵押品条件，用其变化率和拐点来映射加密资产 beta，而不是只盯单一宏观序列。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-04-23: “Global Liquidity hits new ATHs...”；图片7下方面板直接标注“Total Global Liquidity (EMA)”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_148_流动性到 BTC 的滞后传导模型
emerged_uncurated.name: Liquidity-to-BTC Lag Model
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 流动性到 BTC 的滞后传导模型
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a fixed or adaptive lag between liquidity expansion/contraction and BTC response, typically framing Bitcoin as a delayed high-beta expression of global money growth.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用固定或自适应滞后来建模流动性扩张/收缩对 BTC 的传导，通常把比特币视为全球货币扩张的延迟高 beta 表达。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: seed 里只有 M2 增长代理，但 Jamie 的图表更进一步，图片1与图片8都在做未来 6-12 个月路径外推，而非静态相关。

emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Breadth Thrust
emerged_uncurated.description: Track internal market breadth using equal-weight vs cap-weight indices, new lows, and cross-sector participation to detect capitulation, washout, or expansion into broad alt participation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用等权/市值加权比、365日新低、跨板块参与度来跟踪加密市场内部广度，识别投降、出清和向广谱山寨扩散的阶段。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-04-28: “Bullish Trinity: 1. Max Fear 2. Equities Breadth Thrust 3. Bullish Macro Regime”；2024-06-26、2024-09-26、2025-04-24 多次用 Top200 equal-weight、365-day new lows 做广度判断。

emerged_uncurated.name: Hashrate Recovery Cross
emerged_uncurated.description: Use hashrate recovery and short/long moving-average crosses on network compute power as a trend-health signal for Bitcoin.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用比特币算力恢复及短长均线交叉作为网络健康和趋势恢复信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-07-30: “A simple 30 & 90 day moving avg cross produces; 67% win record...”；图片3展示哈希率与 30/60 均线。

emerged_uncurated.name: Volatility Capitulation Watch
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat spikes in implied volatility, panic exchange flows, and capitulation-style volume as a combined washout detector rather than a single sentiment metric.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把隐含波动率飙升、恐慌性交易所流动和投降式成交量结合起来，作为综合洗盘检测器，而不是只看单一情绪指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-06: “Capitulation Watch: Three Signs the Washout Is Getting Real” + 图片5 BVIV、成交量、RSI 三联观察。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_152_RSI 区间画像 / Range Rul
emerged_uncurated.name: RSI Range Profile
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: RSI 区间画像 / Range Rules
emerged_uncurated.description: Classify trend quality by RSI behavior across swings: bullish profiles hold RSI lows around 30-40 and bearish profiles cap RSI rallies near 60-70; use the profile to buy pullbacks or fade rallies.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过 RSI 在不同摆动中的运行区间判断趋势质量：强势上升里 RSI 常在 30-40 一带止跌回升，弱势下跌里 RSI 常在 60-70 一带见顶回落；据此做回踩延续或反弹卖出。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-12] “Technically, the daily RSI profile for $TLT is bullish.”；[2024-02-26] “as per RSI range rules, the indicator tends to turn up between 30 and 40 during uptrends.”；[2025-07-16] “a + RSI profile”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Futures-Cash Non-Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.description: When futures print a new high but the underlying cash index does not confirm, treat it as a late-stage exhaustion / turning-point warning.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当股指期货创新高但现货指数不确认时，视为行情末端衰竭或拐点预警。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-05-29] “new high in futures but not in cash is something you see at turns $ES_F $SPX”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Gap Fill Magnet
emerged_uncurated.description: Track unfilled price gaps as tactical magnets or barriers; use gap-fill completion or failure as a behavior-change trigger.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把未回补缺口视为短中期价格磁吸位或阻力/支撑位，并把“回补完成/无法回补”作为行为切换信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-22] “no gap fill for you $SPX”；[2026-03-27] “Gap fill $SPX”；[2024-12-20] “$DJIA election gap fill”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Relative Ratio Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use ratio charts between sectors/countries and benchmark indices to detect rotation earlier than absolute-price charts.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过板块/国家资产对基准指数的比价图，先于绝对价格发现资金轮动与领导权切换。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-18] “$GDX / $SPY breaking out”；[2025-01-30] “$SPY / $ILF - bigger reversal underway in US / Latin America?”；[2024-11-27] “The $FXI / $SPY ratio chart is interesting too”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_156_艾略特波浪等长与第 5 浪冲刺
emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott Wave Equality / Wave 5 Thrust
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 艾略特波浪等长与第 5 浪冲刺
emerged_uncurated.description: Project wave targets using common Elliott relationships such as wave 5 equaling 61.8% of waves 1-3, and identify terminal thrusts in wave 5 for risk-off or reversal timing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用常见波浪比例关系投射目标，例如第 5 浪约等于前 1-3 浪的 61.8%，并把第 5 浪冲刺视为末端风险或反转计时工具。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-03-26] “in $QQQ wave 5 = 61.8% of waves 1-3...this is a common relationship”；[2026-03-20] “a wave 5 thrust in $DXY should complete 'risk-off'”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_157_时间窗口优先于目标价
emerged_uncurated.name: Time Window Over Price Target
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 时间窗口优先于目标价
emerged_uncurated.description: Prioritize identifying the likely top/bottom time window first, and treat price targets as secondary and lower-confidence outputs.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先判断周期顶部/底部的大致时间窗口，再把价格目标视为次级、低置信度变量；时间对了不代表价格一定打满。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “时间预测对了（21年底），价格过于乐观了：）”直接说明他把时间判断和价格判断拆开评估。

emerged_uncurated.name: Cycle Top Sketch Framework
emerged_uncurated.description: Use simplified annotated sketches of blow-off tops, double tops, and post-peak distribution paths to communicate macro market structure rather than relying on dense indicator panels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用简化的顶部草图、双顶/圆弧顶、见顶后派发路径去表达宏观结构，而不是依赖大量技术指标面板。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 三张附图的核心视觉元素都是大级别顶部轮廓、阶段划分和路径箭头，而不是短线指标。

emerged_uncurated.name: Archive-Driven Postmortem
emerged_uncurated.description: Build narratives and postmortems around preserved original records to resist hindsight revisionism, then use that archive to strengthen future theses.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过保存原始记录来对抗事后改写，再基于这些存档做复盘与观点强化。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他直接用了“【拒绝岁月史书】……最全解析+存档记录”这种表达，说明他非常重视保留原始证据。

emerged_uncurated.name: CME Gap Fill Bias
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses weekend CME gaps as a high-probability directional magnet, often with a Monday timing filter and structure confirmation before targeting the fill.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把周末 CME 缺口当成高概率价格磁吸目标，并常叠加周一时间过滤和结构确认后再去做回补。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-06-29] "100% confidence this will get filled next week"；[2025-08-30] "98% of Weekend Gaps get filled"；[2026-01-31] "CME Closed at 84.2K. You already know 98% of these get filled within 2 weeks."

emerged_uncurated.name: Calendar Pivot Narrative Inversion
emerged_uncurated.description: Maps specific dates or recurring day-count pivots as likely narrative reversal windows; if the market is strongly bullish into the pivot, expect a sweep then inversion, and vice versa.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把特定日期或固定天数枢轴视为叙事反转窗口；若价格在枢轴前强烈偏多，常预期先扫流动性再反向，反之亦然。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-30] "10th April. Pay attention. The narrative into this pivot will likely reverse within 1–2 weeks."；图7用一系列垂直日期线标注 "Aggressive hunt before inverse narrative"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Open/Close Anchor Levels
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly opens/closes plus wick highs/lows as premium structural anchors for validation, rejection, and reversal.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把日/周/月/季/年开收盘与影线高低点当作核心结构锚点，用于验证、拒绝和反转判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] "I pay particular attention to weekly opens/weekly wick highs and lows"；[2025-08-29] "BTC is testing its previously monthly open right now. This is a crucial level."；[2025-09-30] "daily close strategy"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Cross-Asset Historical Analog Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Projects current BTC structure by overlaying it with historical paths from other assets or prior cycles, using geometry, retracements, and timing analogs rather than only same-asset TA.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过与其他资产或过去周期的历史路径做几何、回撤和时间类比，来推演 BTC 当前结构，而不只依赖同资产 TA。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图5直接把 "Gold 1972" 与 "BTC 2027" 并列；[2026-03-31] 长文标题就是 "1972 Gold vs $BTC"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_164_意见领袖叙事反向信号
emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Figure Contrarian Signal
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 意见领袖叙事反向信号
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses viral public narratives, influencer posts, and market-wide FUD/hopium as contrarian markers when they cluster near a structural level.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当市场级 FUD/鸡血叙事与关键结构位重合时，把意见领袖和社媒情绪当作反向信号使用。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图3把 CZ 的几条 "buy the dip" 类推文贴在 BTC 图上；[2026-03-31] 还写 "Looks like the FUD this cycle is quantum computing fears... always convenient how this 'news' shows up right when $BTC is..."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_165_高周期关键位翻转触发
emerged_uncurated.name: HTF Level Flip Trigger
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 高周期关键位翻转触发
emerged_uncurated.description: Wait for a major higher-timeframe level to flip from resistance to support, or support to resistance, before taking the trade. The flip itself is the trigger; without the flip, there is no trade.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 等待高周期关键位完成阻力变支撑或支撑变阻力，再执行交易。翻转本身就是触发器；没有翻转就不交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-31“I am only looking for two triggers from price  Flip $119.5k -> New ATH”; 2025-09-29“My trigger for longs ... would be a flip of $112k”; 2025-08-26“Gameplan remains the same -> Flip & Long.”

emerged_uncurated.name: No Trade Zone Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Explicitly classify broad mid-range or event-heavy conditions as a no-trade zone and stand aside until price reaches a clean trigger area.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把中段区间或事件扰动期明确划为无交易区，直到价格到达清晰触发位才出手。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-29“pretty much a no trade zone”; 2024-12-29“Price currently is in no trade zone”; 2026-03-30“no trigger -> no trade.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekly Reference Level Map
emerged_uncurated.description: Use prior week high/low, previous week low, Monday low/open, and half of prior week range as mechanical reference levels for liquidity sweeps and reaction trades.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把前周高低点、前周低点、周一低点/开盘以及前周区间中点作为机械参考位，用于流动性扫单与反应交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 4 标注“Pre week high”“Pre week low”“0.5”；多条推文提 Monday Low、PWL、PYH，如 2025-07-31“Price has reclaimed PWL and is seeking SSL IMO”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Imbalance Fill Then Continue
emerged_uncurated.description: Project that price first fills a nearby imbalance/FVG box and only then resumes the dominant higher-timeframe direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 预判价格会先回补附近失衡区/FVG，然后再恢复原有高周期方向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-26“I think price fills more of the imbalance (blue box) before heading for new highs.”；图 4 路径先下探蓝/灰不平衡区后再向上冲击前周高点。

emerged_uncurated.name: Scale-Out Profit Ladder
emerged_uncurated.description: Reduce exposure into strength instead of trying to sell the exact top. Keep a residual moon bag while systematically locking in gains through late bull-market acceleration.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在上涨过程中分批兑现，而不是试图卖在绝对顶部；牛市后段边涨边减仓，同时保留小仓位博取尾段加速。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-30] “Either way we're moving up and I'm slowly scaling out. Securing profits, securing my future.”；[2025-08-30] “Take profit on the way up. Leave a moon bag...”；[2025-07-31] “people would rather ride crypto down to zero than secure some profits.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Extreme Fade
emerged_uncurated.description: Use crowd fear/FOMO as a primary trigger: buy when panic is widespread and avoid chasing when euphoria becomes consensus.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把市场群体情绪极端当作主要触发器：恐慌极致时偏买入，普遍狂热时偏谨慎，不追一致性预期。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-27] “Last time there was this much fear was 2022 when bitcoin hit $17,000.”；[2025-02-28] “We’re currently at extreme fear while Bitcoin is trading at $84,000... We’re going much higher.”；[2025-03-29] “There’s so much money to be made in crypto but most of you haven’t got a clue…”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_171_流动性周期覆盖减半周期
emerged_uncurated.name: Liquidity Cycle Override
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 流动性周期覆盖减半周期
emerged_uncurated.description: When liquidity conditions conflict with standard halving-cycle expectations, prioritize rates, policy, ETF demand, and macro liquidity over simple four-year analogs.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当流动性条件与传统减半/四年周期相冲突时，优先考虑利率、政策、ETF 需求和宏观流动性，而不是机械套用历史周期。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-11-29] “It’s not necessarily all about the 4 year cycle. But it’s certainly all about liquidity cycles.”；[2025-05-29] “Interest rates will be coming down. Massive injection of liquidity.”

emerged_uncurated.name: 20W/200W Reflip
emerged_uncurated.description: Price reclaims both the fast 20-week moving average and the slow 200-week moving average, often after a corrective phase; trader treats the reclaim as a historically favorable point to add risk.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格在回调后同时重新站上 20 周均线和 200 周均线，把这种“双均线重夺”视为历史上较优的风险暴露窗口。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文 [2025-03-24]：“Pretty strong signal seeing the reflippening of 20/200 and price over both — historically a pretty great place to take risk.”

emerged_uncurated.name: 200-Week Mean Reversion Buy Zone
emerged_uncurated.description: When major crypto assets tag or fall slightly below the 200-week moving average, trader treats the zone as a statistically strong long-term accumulation area.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当主流币触及或略微跌破 200 周均线时，将其视为长期统计意义上的优质吸筹区。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文 [2026-01-31]：“Eth and Sol and below 200 week average. Historically good buy zones. Bitcoin would have to go sub $60k...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Post-Markup Box Consolidation
emerged_uncurated.description: After an impulsive markup phase, price spends months in a broad horizontal box; trader reads it as digestion before the next directional move, especially when paired with seasonality or catalysts.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格在一轮快速上涨后进入持续数月的大箱体整理，交易员将其视为下一波方向选择前的消化阶段，常结合季节性或事件催化判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文 [2024-09-25]：“Six months in a large range after markup. Going into election, annual seasonality. Interesting.” 图1 也是明显的上涨后大箱体。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_175_比特币弱势期的山寨相对强度
emerged_uncurated.name: Alt Relative Strength During BTC Weakness
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 比特币弱势期的山寨相对强度
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify assets that decouple from BTC and outperform during BTC drawdowns or bear phases; used as rotation candidates when broad crypto beta is weak.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别在 BTC 回撤或熊市阶段与 BTC 脱钩、保持相对强势的币种，作为弱市轮动标的。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文 [2026-04-11]：“XRP = AN OUTPERFORMER IN A BITCOIN BEAR MARKET DUE TO ITS LACK OF PRICE CORRELATION WITH OTHER CRYPTOS”

emerged_uncurated.name: Wallet Linkage Forensics
emerged_uncurated.description: Link newly created wallets, funding wallets, exchange routes, and intermediary addresses into one ownership or actor cluster to infer insider, team, hacker, or institution behavior.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把新建钱包、启动资金地址、中转地址、交易所/OTC 路径串成同一行为体集群，用于识别内幕团队、项目方、黑客或机构。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图 6 用资金流图把 $LIBRA / $MELANIA / POPE 多个地址连成一条线；附图 7-8 通过 7.5 SOL 启动资金、pump.fun mint、transfer 记录追出 $DAVIDO 的源头。

emerged_uncurated.name: Celebrity Token Insider Pattern
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect celebrity/influencer token launches where deployer-linked wallets, early snipers, or paid promoters accumulate before social promotion and then dump into retail attention.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别名人/网红发币时，部署者关联钱包、早期狙击钱包或带货账号先行建仓，随后借社媒热度向散户出货的模式。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-10-30] MrBeast pump-and-dump 指控，附图 1 在价格顶部区域叠加大量卖出标记；[2024-05-31] “Be wary of tokens launched by celebrities.🚨”; [2024-05-30] Davido 发币并在 11 小时内获利。

emerged_uncurated.name: Public Trader Liquidation Tracker
emerged_uncurated.description: Track high-profile leveraged traders across sessions, estimate liquidation levels, and treat their forced exits or flips as short-term positioning signals and crowd sentiment markers.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 持续追踪高知名度杠杆交易员，估算其清算价与翻仓行为，并把这些强平/反手事件作为短线情绪与仓位信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: James Wynn、Machi、0x0ddf9、0x69e4 在推文中被长期追踪；[2025-05-30] “The winning strategy lately? Do the opposite of James Wynn.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Early Smart Money Discovery
emerged_uncurated.description: Scan fresh wallets and early token holders for outsized PnL, repeatable hit rates, and unusual timing to surface smart money or probable insiders before broader recognition.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 扫描新钱包和早期持仓者的超额收益、命中率和异常时机，以在市场广泛认知前识别聪明钱或疑似内幕地址。

emerged_uncurated.name: Compression Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Repeatedly identifies tight coiling, boring ranges, or multi-candle compression below resistance and trades the expansion once price breaks the box/ceiling.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 反复识别“盘整收缩/挤压/无聊行情”后接方向性放量突破的 setup，核心不是标准三角或旗形，而是泛化的 box/coil 压缩突破。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “ETHEREUM IS COILING UP!!!! BIG TIMES!!!!!” [2024-10-29] “Bitcoin is coiling up like it has never been coiling up before!” [2024-08-30] “Calm before the storm” [2024-08-23] “Bitcoin will break within 7 days!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekday Pump Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses recurring weekday effects, especially Monday strength, as a lightweight timing overlay for bullish continuation calls.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把工作日季节性，尤其“周一上涨效应”，当作轻量择时因子叠加到趋势看多框架上。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-27] “Monday is Pump Day!” [2025-05-26] “Monday Bitcoin Pumps are the FREAKING BEST IN THE WORLD!!!!”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_182_公开盈亏截图强化信念
emerged_uncurated.name: Public PnL Conviction Signaling
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 公开盈亏截图强化信念
emerged_uncurated.description: Publishes account screenshots, unrealized/realized PnL, and size disclosures to reinforce trade conviction, social proof, and audience adherence to his directional call.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过公开账户截图、未实现/已实现利润和仓位规模，强化自己的方向判断与受众跟随度；这是他的内容化交易框架的一部分。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 #1 为 SOL 11x 多单巨额浮盈截图；图 #8 为 ETH 现货大额持仓；[2024-11-30] “People were LAUGHING at my months/year long position trades...” [2025-04-22] “$8.6 MILLION UNREALIZED $8.9 MILLION REALIZED”

emerged_uncurated.name: Bart Pattern / Double Bart
emerged_uncurated.description: Sharp vertical move, flat range, then symmetrical reversal back through the range; often appears as a low-liquidity perp move or fake breakout/flush sequence.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 价格先垂直拉升或下杀，随后横盘，再以近似对称的方式反向走完，常见于低流动性或合约主导的假突破/假跌破行情。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-12-30: "They double Barted us  Pain"；图 1、图 2 直接用辛普森头像把多个 Bart 路径画在 BTC 5m 图上。

emerged_uncurated.name: Higher Timeframe Candle Close Anchoring
emerged_uncurated.description: Emphasizes weekly/monthly/quarterly closes as decisive signal points; strong closes upgrade trend confidence, weak closes reduce conviction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把周线、月线、季度线收盘视为趋势确认核心节点；强收盘提高趋势延续概率，弱收盘则降低信心或等待确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-03-31: "Bitcoin about to close highest quarterly candle *ever*"；2024-06-30: "That's a mf gorgeous weekly candle"；2025-06-29: "What a weekly candle this is"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_185_周末行情低可信度过滤
emerged_uncurated.name: Weekend Crypto Move Skepticism
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 周末行情低可信度过滤
emerged_uncurated.description: Discounts weekend breakouts/squeezes unless followed by clear spot confirmation after the week opens.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 对周末的突破、逼空或急拉保持怀疑，除非工作日开盘后有明确现货跟随确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-28: "never trust a weekend short squeeze  never trust any weekend move for that matter"；2025-11-30: "Question is, do we trust the Sunday pamp"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_186_现货大单与鲸鱼买盘确认
emerged_uncurated.name: Spot Bid / Whale Tape Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 现货大单与鲸鱼买盘确认
emerged_uncurated.description: Tracks visible large spot bids or exchange-specific whale buying as evidence that a level is defended or a breakout has real demand behind it.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过可见的大额现货买单或交易所鲸鱼买盘，确认某个价位被防守，或某次突破具有真实需求支撑。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28: "1400 BTC bid @ $83.1k on nance spot"；2025-01-31: "Sizeable Coinbase spot bid since NY open"；2024-09-30: "A bull on Binance spot said hold my beer"。

emerged_uncurated.name: MM Two-Stage Distribution Template
emerged_uncurated.description: Detects a recurring market-maker sequence: initial narrative-driven markup and distribution, mid-range re-accumulation or handoff, then a second exit wave into renewed retail attention.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别做市商常见模板：先借叙事拉升并完成第一波派发，中间横盘回收筹码或换庄，随后借二次情绪再拉一波完成第二次出货。

output_when_triggered.bias: first long then short, with late-stage short bias

emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 手绘图1直接标注“第一波庄派发（情绪高点）…庄重新吸回筹码…第二波庄派发（上二级所了）”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_188_高 FDV TGE 上市做空
emerged_uncurated.name: High-FDV TGE Listing Short
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 高 FDV TGE 上市做空
emerged_uncurated.description: Targets newly listed tokens with large prior raises, weak secondary liquidity, and coordinated marketing/market-making behavior; expects high-open, distribution, and fast mean reversion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 针对高融资额、二级流动性弱、配合营销和做市的 TGE/新币上市，预期其高开、派发并快速回落，优先寻找做空机会。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-30 列举 Monad、Opensea、Metamask、Nansen、Polymarket、Farcaster 等并说“近期我不会持有任何山寨币，只会找机会做空”；配图3是“TOP 15 POTENTIAL TGE IN Q4 2025 BY TOTAL RAISED FUNDS”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_189_二段行情叙事质量过滤
emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Quality Filter for Second Leg
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 二段行情叙事质量过滤
emerged_uncurated.description: Separates tokens that can produce a second markup from those that only complete one pump-and-dump, based on narrative strength and whether retail follow-through exists after first distribution.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用叙事强弱和散户跟随度判断标的在第一波派发后，是否还具备二段行情，还是只会一波流直接归零。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-30 他说“第一波没有好叙事没有散户跟，庄就没必要收回来筹码，直接开下一个了。”

emerged_uncurated.name: Cross-Asset Bubble Analog Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Maps crypto market structure onto precious metals or other macro assets to identify late-cycle crowd behavior, using long-term charts and relative-value analogies.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把加密市场的末期拥挤、派发与泡沫结构类比到黄金白银等宏观资产，通过超长周期图和相对价值关系识别顶部区域。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-03-31 他说“Jeff对于白银类比山寨的逻辑也是让我去回测白银/黄金汇率对去判断贵金属到顶了的逻辑来源。”

emerged_uncurated.name: Fib Extension Top Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Projects cycle tops and intermediate targets using aggressive Fibonacci extensions such as 1.272, 1.618, 4.618, 5.618, and especially 6.618 from prior bull flags or impulse legs.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用 1.272、1.618、4.618、5.618，尤其是 6.618 等激进斐波扩展位，对牛旗后的中继目标和周期顶部进行映射。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "#BTC has moved to the 6.618 Fib Extension after a Bull Flag Correction." 图片 #5 也写着 "TOP = 6.618 Fib Extension from BULL Flag?"

emerged_uncurated.name: Altseason Phase Model
emerged_uncurated.description: Classifies alt market evolution into sequential phases such as bottoming, breakout, consolidation, acceleration, and euphoria, often anchored to TOTAL3 and BTC dominance rollover.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将山寨市场划分为筑底、突破、整理、加速、狂热等连续阶段，通常结合 TOTAL3 与 BTC Dominance 见顶来判定。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 #3 直接分为 "1. Bottoming / 2. BreakOut / 3. Consolidation / 4. Acceleration / 5. Euphoria"；2024-01-16: "The next phase is ACCELERATION!"

emerged_uncurated.name: Historical Rhyme Analog
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses prior cycle path analogs rather than exact repetition, matching structure, sentiment, and timing between current market and earlier periods.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不是机械复制历史，而是用历史周期在结构、情绪和节奏上的“押韵”来映射当前路径。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-22: "History does not repeat itself - but it often rhymes"；其多张图把 2017、2021、当前周期并列比较。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fed Cut Endgame Signal
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats the beginning of Fed cuts not as the start of a bull market, but as a late-cycle warning that risk assets may peak shortly before recession bites.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将首次降息视为周期尾声而非牛市起点，认为风险资产往往在降息后不久见顶，随后衰退压力兑现。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-13: "When the FED cuts - then the Bull Market is almost at its End and Recession closing in." 图片 #8 也把降息与市场顶部时间窗并列。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Extreme Overlay
emerged_uncurated.description: Adds sentiment extremes such as 'sentiment 88/89' on top of chart structure to fade consensus when technicals are stretched.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在结构分析上叠加情绪极值，如 sentiment 88/89，作为共识过热后的反向过滤器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 #6 标注 "Sentiment 89"；2024-04-12: "Everybody is BULLISH #DXY... sentiment is at 88."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_196_FOMC 声明红线差分反应函数
emerged_uncurated.name: FOMC Statement Redline Reaction Function
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: FOMC 声明红线差分反应函数
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare consecutive FOMC statements word-by-word, rank added/removed phrases by policy significance, and infer whether the reaction function shifted toward easing, tightening, or data dependence.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 逐字比对连续两次 FOMC 声明，按政策含义给删改语句排序，推断联储反应函数是偏宽松、偏紧还是更数据依赖。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 配图 3、4 都是声明 redline；2024-01-31："FOMC statement gets a big rewrite"；2024-07-31："very meaningful changes in the top of the statement"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_197_CPI/PPI 映射 PCE 预估
emerged_uncurated.name: CPI/PPI-to-PCE Bridge Nowcast
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: CPI/PPI 映射 PCE 预估
emerged_uncurated.description: Translate CPI, PPI, import prices, and category details into a high-probability core PCE estimate before the official release, then judge whether annualized 3m/6m trends are improving or stalling.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用 CPI、PPI、进口价格和分项细节预估核心 PCE，在正式公布前判断 3 个月和 6 个月年化趋势是改善还是停滞。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-28："Based on the CPI + PPI + import prices, inflation forecasters anticipate a very mild core PCE reading"；2024-08-29、2024-10-30、2025-02-28 反复使用同一桥接框架。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_198_劳动力市场降温综合框架
emerged_uncurated.name: Labor Market Cooling Composite
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 劳动力市场降温综合框架
emerged_uncurated.description: Use job openings, hiring rate, quits, claims, ECI, wage trackers, and benchmark revisions as a combined labor-state model instead of relying on payroll headlines alone.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 综合职位空缺、招聘率、离职率、失业金申请、ECI、工资追踪和基准修正来判断劳动力市场状态，而不是只看非农标题。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-07-30："Job openings and hiring data point to a labor market that keeps loosening"；2024-08-27 关于 benchmark revision；配图 7、8 也是围绕就业修正与移民结构。

emerged_uncurated.name: Tariff Pass-Through Scenario Matrix
emerged_uncurated.description: Map tariff proposals into inflation, growth, and Fed-path scenarios by separating one-off goods-price effects, confidence shocks, and longer-run labor-market slowdown.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把关税方案拆成通胀、增长和联储路径的情景矩阵，区分一次性商品涨价、信心冲击和更长期的就业拖累。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-03-30：Goldman 预计更激进关税将把 core PCE 推到 3.5%；2024-12-27：2018 年关税没造成持续通胀，但压制 sentiment 和 investment。

emerged_uncurated.name: Data Revision Audit
emerged_uncurated.description: Track benchmark revisions, GDI/GDP gaps, savings-rate revisions, and methodology quirks to avoid trading off first prints that will later be materially revised.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪基准修正、GDI/GDP 缺口、储蓄率修正和统计口径问题，避免围绕首发数据做出之后会被大幅修正的交易判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-26："A puzzle solved? Gross domestic income was revised up"；2024-09-27：储蓄率被上修 2 个百分点；他非常重视 revisions。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_201_交易所操盘/场馆操纵识别
emerged_uncurated.name: Exchange Cartel / Venue Manipulation Read
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 交易所操盘/场馆操纵识别
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat exchange behavior, outage timing, suspicious order-book action, and forced-liquidation cascades as an explanatory and tradable market structure input.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把交易所宕机时点、盘口异常、强平瀑布、疑似场馆对手盘行为，作为可交易的市场结构输入，而不只是噪音。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-10-11: “exchange only goes down so they can close their positions & fill at best prices”；2025-10-15: “Binance really refunded their customers then liquidated them again after 24 hrs”；2025-04-22: “CARTEL.EXE”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_202_时间线绝望情绪底部过滤器
emerged_uncurated.name: Timeline Despair Bottom Filter
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 时间线绝望情绪底部过滤器
emerged_uncurated.description: Use extreme community despair, silence, and forced-seller psychology on the timeline as a soft contrarian bottoming signal.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把时间线沉默、绝望、爆仓后麻木、家人面前强装正常等群体情绪，作为偏底部的反向软信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28: “the timeline is silent but every crypto participant is watching price”；2025-10-11: “watching your bags plummet by the gazzillions while having to act normal around the family”；2025-11-04: “if you are not a forced seller at these prices, you already won”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Asia Session Liquidity Raid
emerged_uncurated.description: Track thin-liquidity Asia-session moves for oversized liquidation raids, then fade or frame the follow-through depending on whether the move reclaims key levels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 重点盯亚洲时段在薄流动性下的异常扫单/强平动作，再根据关键位是否收回，决定反手还是顺势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-10-14: “infinite BTC seller nuked nearly $1B of open interest... during asia session”；2024-09-02: “market selling 7 figs at the lows during asia session”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fresh Wallet Accumulation Cluster
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect repeated withdrawals of the same token from exchanges into fresh wallets over hours to days, then aggregate size, average entry, and wallet count as a bullish accumulation signal.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别同一代币在数小时到数天内被多个新钱包反复从交易所提出，并聚合总量、均价、钱包数，作为吸筹信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "Within a week, 2 fresh wallets spent $1.29M for 16.3M $NEIROETH"；"In past 8 hours, 3 fresh wallets withdrew totally 4.66M $ASTER"；图片1里多个 Binance hot wallet 在 2 天内持续向同一 LINK 地址转出。

emerged_uncurated.name: Market Maker Inventory Readthrough
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret transfers involving market makers or OTC desks such as Wintermute, GSR, Amber, Cumberland, Jump, and Galaxy as inventory-building, distribution, or off-exchange liquidity operations rather than generic transfers.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将 Wintermute、GSR、Amber、Cumberland、Jump、Galaxy 等做市商或 OTC 桌相关转账解读为库存建立、派发或场外流动性操作，而不是普通转账。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "Beside #Wintermute accumulating for $NEIRO_ETH"；"#Wintermute's OTC wallet received 4.655M $SPX (~$4.21M) from a Multi-sig wallet"；图片4显示 Wintermute 持有 54.784M NEIRO，图片8显示 Gnosis Safe Proxy 向 Wintermute OTC 发送大额 SPX。

emerged_uncurated.name: Wallet ROI Archeology
emerged_uncurated.description: Trace a wallet from first entry to current holdings, realized and unrealized PnL, and average entry to infer whether it belongs to smart money worth following.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 从首笔建仓一路追踪到当前持仓、已实现/未实现收益和持仓均价，以判断该钱包是否属于值得跟踪的聪明钱。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "2 months ago, this smart money swapped $281k for 4.4M $FWOG & turns his investment into $1.1M (ROI 392%)"；"Yesterday, 'Happytrump.sol' swapped $69.7k for 14.64M $VINE... realized profit ~$2.29M"；图片6和图片7都是顺着 Jupiter authority 资金流去还原早期仓位来源。

emerged_uncurated.name: Perp Trader Shadowing
emerged_uncurated.description: Track large public perpetual traders by leverage, DCA behavior, liquidation price, realized/unrealized PnL, and whether they are opening or closing positions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪公开可见的大型合约交易员，关注杠杆、加仓行为、清算价、已实现/未实现盈亏，以及他们是在开仓还是平仓。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "this short-er did dca his short position on $LIT"；"this Long-er did dca on his $ETH Long position"；"A +$10M trader PNL just opened 3x Long position ~$84.19M with $BTC on #Hyperliquid"；"#pension_usdt_eth opened another 3X Short on $ETH ~$41M"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_208_代币启动分发漏斗追踪
emerged_uncurated.name: Launch Allocation Funnel Tracking
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 代币启动分发漏斗追踪
emerged_uncurated.description: Follow transfers from authority, deployer, treasury, multisig, or LP-related addresses into end wallets to identify early recipients, stealth distribution, or launch funnels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 追踪 authority、deployer、treasury、多签或 LP 相关地址向终端钱包的转账，以识别早期受益地址、隐性分发路径和代币启动漏斗。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片6和图片7都在追踪 Solana 上 Jupiter Aggregator Authority 到 FWOG/MUMU 接收钱包的转移；这类分析不属于 seed 里的通用入所/出所，更像 launch provenance tracing。

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Hype Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Challenge popular narratives by asking whether the underlying edge, distribution, or customer reality actually supports the story.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 对热门叙事先做反证，先问底层优势、分发能力、真实客户关系是否支持故事，再决定是否跟随市场共识。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “Anthropic is great, but it is also currently blacklisted by the pentagon... How exactly does it plan to eat $PLTR lunch?”

emerged_uncurated.name: One-word Invalidation Exit
emerged_uncurated.description: Use extremely compressed language to mark a thesis as broken and move on without averaging or over-explaining.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 thesis 失效时，用极简标签直接判定退出，不补仓、不长篇解释、不试图体面化错误。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-11: “uninstall”

emerged_uncurated.name: Visual Theme Regime Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Classify environments by aesthetic/narrative mood rather than formal indicators, using cultural references as compressed state labels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不用传统指标，而是用审美/文化标签给环境做状态分类，把复杂情绪压缩成可识别的世界观类别。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附件 2-5 不是 K 线，而是“シンセウェイヴ / サイケデリック / サイバーパンク / ヴェイパーウェイヴ / ダーク・アカデミア / コテージコア”等世界观分类板，说明其更常用审美叙事框架而非标准 TA 标注。

emerged_uncurated.name: Edge Before Automation
emerged_uncurated.description: Reject tooling enthusiasm unless the underlying process has a real edge worth scaling.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 如果底层策略/内容本身没有优势，就不因自动化工具而高估产出；先验证 edge，再做放大。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “Claude Code自動化ふぉぉぉ！！！って騒いでる人に冷や水かけます。自動化する中身がなかったら意味ないですよ。”

emerged_uncurated.name: Institutional Zone Entry
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify price zones where large players likely accumulated or distributed inventory, then wait for price to return to that zone before initiating a trade. The zone matters more than generic support/resistance lines.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别机构资金大概率集中建仓/派发的成交区，等待价格回到该区域后再入场；该区域的重要性高于普通支撑阻力线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文原话：“The first step to profitable trading is entering at an institutional zone. This is exactly where institutional money placed large buy or sell orders.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Volume Profile Node Map
emerged_uncurated.description: Use visible-range volume profile to locate high-volume acceptance nodes and low-volume rejection gaps, then frame mean reversion or continuation targets around those nodes.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用可见区间成交量分布识别高成交接受区与低成交拒绝区，并围绕这些节点制定回归或延续目标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图6右侧明显叠加 VRVP/Volume Profile，用成交密集区和空白区来定义 C 浪回撤区与潜在支撑。

emerged_uncurated.name: TD Sequential Exhaustion
emerged_uncurated.description: Use DeMark/TD setup countdown deterioration or reset behavior to judge when a trend is losing force and when a reversal or pause is becoming more probable.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 利用 DeMark/TD Sequential 的 setup/countdown 递减、重置或衰竭来判断趋势何时失去动能，以及反转/停顿概率何时上升。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文“ The TD has decreased significantly in recent weeks which signals ...”；图4、图6底部也都显示 TD 指标栏。

emerged_uncurated.name: Diagonal Trendline Break and Retest
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a simple long-duration descending or ascending trendline, wait for break, then validate with an immediate retest before projecting the next impulsive move.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用长周期斜向趋势线，等待价格突破后，再观察是否回踩确认，随后推演下一段趋势性推动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片2 的 XRP 周线、图片5 的 TOTAL3 日线、图片8 的 BTC.D 周线，都是非常典型的斜趋势线破位/回踩框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: Stoch RSI Reset Bounce
emerged_uncurated.description: After strong trend cooling, Stoch RSI resets into the lower band and turns up; trader interprets it as energy reset rather than trend failure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 强趋势中的调整阶段，Stoch RSI 回到低位后重新拐头向上，被视为动能重置而非趋势结束。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片4 明确画出了 Total Market Cap ex BTC/ETH 的 Stoch RSI 低位区域，并把历史几次同类低位与后续上涨对应起来。

emerged_uncurated.name: Altseason Rotation Stack
emerged_uncurated.description: Combine BTC stabilization, BTC dominance rollover, and TOTAL3 breakout to time altcoin expansion rather than looking at single-coin charts in isolation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC 企稳、BTC.D 走弱、TOTAL3 突破结合起来判断山寨季启动，而不是只看单币图。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “$BTC dominance weakining . Alts is the play”(2025-02-28)；“Release the alts”(2025-05-22)；图片6 看 TOTAL3 楔形上破，图片8 看 BTC.D 破趋势线。

emerged_uncurated.name: Flush Then Pump Playbook
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret violent selloffs and emotional shakeouts as engineered clearing events before the real move higher, then buy after the panic zone is tagged.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把剧烈回撤和情绪性恐慌视为主升前的清洗动作，在恐慌区/买区被触发后转向看多。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: “First they flush then they pump”(2025-02-17)；“Do NOT get shaken out”(2025-02-19)；“The bounce is going to be epic”(2025-02-28)。

emerged_uncurated.name: CME Gap Fill Magnet
emerged_uncurated.description: Track weekly or daily CME Bitcoin futures gaps and treat the open gap as a likely magnet or reference level for short-term mean reversion and directional bias.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪 CME 比特币期货周初/日内缺口，把未回补缺口当作短线磁吸位、均值回归目标或方向参考。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文："CME $BTC futures gapped up to start the week. For this gap to be fully filled, bitcoin would need to return to $109.9k."；附图 6 直接标注周初跳空。

emerged_uncurated.name: Calendar Seasonality Stats
emerged_uncurated.description: Use month-end, quarter-end, and historical same-month return tendencies as a probabilistic directional filter.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用月末、季末以及历史同月收益统计作为概率型方向过滤器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文："Historically, when $BTC is green for September, October, and November, it is also green in December..."、"Since 2013, all five times that #Bitcoin was red in June it saw strong positive price performance in July"、"In the 8 years that $ETH has been live, it has only had a single red February."

emerged_uncurated.name: Corporate Treasury Adoption Bid
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat announcements of corporate or sovereign Bitcoin treasury accumulation as structural demand shocks that tighten supply and support bullish reflexivity.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把企业或国家层面的比特币储备/金库增持公告视为结构性需求冲击，强化供给收缩与价格反身性。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文："GameStop has acquired 4,170 $BTC to establish their bitcoin treasury."、"Saylor is still buying."、"Bitcoin supply shock is coming."、"Switzerland is reviewing a proposal to add Bitcoin to their constitution and for the central bank to buy $BTC."

emerged_uncurated.name: Anchor Line Reclaim
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a hand-drawn, repeatedly referenced horizontal or diagonal chart line as the main tactical decision boundary; reclaim implies continuation, rejection implies weakness.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用交易员手动画出的关键水平线/斜线作为核心决策边界；收复偏延续，受阻偏走弱。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文："Hold this orange line and we explode upwards."、"This level is very important to hold."、"People have been fading Ethereum for way too long. $ETH is looking to break 3 key levels: 1. My orange resistance line..."

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-Year Compression Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify long-duration triangle or compression structures on weekly/monthly charts and project outsized targets once price escapes the range.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别周线/月线持续数年收敛压缩结构，一旦脱离压缩区，就按结构高度投射远距离目标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图 #3 画出 2018-2025 的大型收敛结构并把目标直接投射到 33.21925；[2024-11-30] “#Xrp has broken out of its compression zone, signaling the start of a potentially parabolic rally.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Regulatory Catalyst Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Use pending legal, SEC, banking, ETF, or market-structure decisions as directional catalysts that can unlock repricing in specific tokens.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把诉讼进展、SEC 动作、银行接入、ETF、市场结构法案等监管/制度事件视为代币重定价触发器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-03-31] “SEC’S APRIL 3 CLOSED SESSION COULD DELIVER MAJOR #XRP DECISIONS.”；[2025-03-31] “THE CASE IS OVER. #XRP IS FREE TO SCALE IN THE U.S.”；[2026-04-08] “CLARITY Act is a ‘done deal’...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_226_艾略特第 5 浪延伸投射
emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott Wave 5 Extension Targeting
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 艾略特第 5 浪延伸投射
emerged_uncurated.description: After a visible 1-2-3-4 sequence, anticipate a terminal or explosive wave-5 expansion and use it for high-upside projections.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在清晰 1-2-3-4 结构后，预判终段或加速型第 5 浪，并据此做高弹性上方目标投射。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图 #6 直接标注 1-2-3-4-5，并把当前横盘解释为通往第 5 浪前的整理；[2025-08-31] “The final wave for #XRP 👇”

emerged_uncurated.name: Fractal Cycle Analogy
emerged_uncurated.description: Map the current price structure to a prior cycle's geometry, timing, and swing sequence, then project the next leg based on visual similarity rather than strict indicator rules.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将当前价格结构与历史周期的几何形态、时间位置和波段顺序做类比，用视觉分形相似性而非严格指标规则去推演下一段走势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-03-27] "$Doge to the MOON ... this is the trend"；图 3、图 6、图 7、图 8 都在比较 2014/2017/2021/2024 的重复结构；[2025-01-29] "Cycle 3"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Curved Arc / Chord Projection
emerged_uncurated.description: Use curved arcs, chord segments, and geometric intersections as dynamic support/resistance and timing guides for large trend acceleration.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用弧线、弦段和几何交点作为动态支撑/阻力与加速时点判断，推演大级别趋势爆发。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-08-30] "DOGECOIN developed solid bases in Chord Segments. When it retests to the intersection to the curve, $DOGE will surge"；图 3、图 8 也用大弧线做趋势轨迹。

emerged_uncurated.name: OBV Trendline Breakout Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat OBV breaking its own descending trendline or reclaiming structure before price expansion as confirmation that accumulation is leading price.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将 OBV 自身跌势线突破或结构收复视为价格上行前的确认，认为量能累积领先价格启动。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "Bitcoin (on balance volume) OBV has broken out a descending trendline and retested it"；图 2 标题就是 "Bitcoin - <EMA+OBV>"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Gaussian Channel Regime Shift
emerged_uncurated.description: Use Gaussian Channel color flips, mid-band recapture, and support reactions to define the start of a bull regime and continuation odds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用高斯通道颜色翻转、中轨收复和通道支撑反应来定义牛市 regime 的开启与延续概率。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "ETH Gaussian Channel has turned GREEN"；[2024-08-30] "Bitcoin has been supported by Gaussian Channel"；[2025-04-29] "Dogecoin Weekly Chart with the Gaussian Channel"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_231_多层嵌套看涨结构共振
emerged_uncurated.name: Nested Bullish Structure Stack
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 多层嵌套看涨结构共振
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify stacked bullish continuation structures on multiple scales, such as a pennant on top of a bull flag, and treat overlap as amplified breakout odds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别多时间尺度上的嵌套看涨延续结构，例如旗形之上再叠加三角整理，并把这种共振视为更强的突破概率。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-30] "Bitcoin has formed a Bull Pennant on the top of a Bull Flag"；图 1 也是 DOGE post-pole pennant measured move。

emerged_uncurated.name: Business Cycle Inflection Engine
emerged_uncurated.description: Model Bitcoin and altcoin major phases from the global business cycle rather than the halving calendar. When the business cycle bottoms and turns up, crypto enters ramp/expansion; when it tops, crypto tops.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用全球商业周期而不是减半日历来定义 BTC/山寨的大级别阶段。商业周期见底回升时进入爬坡/扩张，商业周期见顶时加密周期见顶。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-10-10: “Always been the business cycle…”；2025-07-25: “Bitcoin tops when it tops. Bitcoin goes parabolic when it inflects.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_233_全球流动性突破回踩领先信号
emerged_uncurated.name: Global Liquidity Breakout-Retest Lead
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 全球流动性突破回踩领先信号
emerged_uncurated.description: A specific macro trigger where global liquidity breaks out, retests the breakout, then surges higher; Bitcoin and altcoins typically follow with a lag and enter their strongest expansion phase.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 一种特定宏观触发器：全球流动性先突破、再回踩确认、随后继续上冲；BTC 与山寨通常滞后跟随，并进入最强扩张段。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-03-22: “liquidity retested its breakout and is surging higher… Right as the business cycle bottomed and reversed.” 2025-04-08/04-11 也连续强调 liquidity breakout after retest。

emerged_uncurated.name: RSI Channel Macro Extremes
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a persistent RSI channel or band structure on higher timeframes to mark macro tops, bottoms, and mid-cycle inflections instead of simple overbought/oversold thresholds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在高时间框架上用 RSI 的长期通道/带状结构来标记宏观顶部、底部和中段拐点，而不是简单依赖超买超卖阈值。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-24: “A single RSI channel has called every macro $BTC top and bottom.” 图1也展示了一个沿历史周期重复工作的上方白线/下方震荡结构。

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-Year Altcoin Compression Release
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect extreme multi-year compression in the total altcoin market, followed by structural breakout or expansion signal. Used as a precursor to a broad altseason rather than a single-token setup.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别山寨整体市值在多年压缩后的结构性突破/扩张信号，作为广义 altseason 的前驱，而不是单个币的形态交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-05-23: “never seen altcoin compression like this”; 2025-07-20: “Four years of altcoin compression is releasing.” 图6直接标注“4 years of compression”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Cycle Histogram Phase State Machine
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret custom histogram color and slope changes as discrete market states: bear decline, bottoming, ramp, pre-parabolic, and top. Tops are marked by red-bar peaks; bottoms by green-turn transitions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将自定义柱状图的颜色与斜率变化解释为离散市场状态：熊市下跌、筑底、爬坡、准抛物线、顶部。红柱峰值标顶，转绿标底/起涨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图3、图5、图8都在用同一类红绿柱状 business cycle / impulse 信号；2025-08-21: “Every Bitcoin top was marked exactly by a red bar top. We're not even out of green.”

emerged_uncurated.name: BTC Power Law Support Framework
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses a long-term power-law trendline and support band to judge whether Bitcoin is basing, extended, or resetting within a secular uptrend.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用比特币长期幂律趋势线与支撑带，判断价格是在长期牛市中的筑底、过热还是均值回归重置。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图1/2/3都直接画出 “BTC price power law support line / trendline”，并标注 $60k 附近 support line、support zone；[2026-04-03] 也说 BTC 在 $65-$70k forming a base。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_238_梅特卡夫采用曲线估值
emerged_uncurated.name: Metcalfe Adoption Curve Valuation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 梅特卡夫采用曲线估值
emerged_uncurated.description: Values Bitcoin as a network asset by comparing price to adoption proxies such as non-zero addresses, wallet counts, and S-curve growth paths.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把比特币视作网络资产，通过非零地址数、钱包数和S曲线增长路径，将价格与采用率代理变量进行比较估值。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-03-26] 明说 “Bitcoin is a network asset... per Metcalfe’s law”；图6《Bitcoin's Adoption Curve》与图5余额≥$1地址数都在重复这个框架。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_239_市场宽度背离状态检查
emerged_uncurated.name: Breadth Divergence Regime Check
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 市场宽度背离状态检查
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses breadth measures such as percent above 50d/200d MA, equal-weight vs cap-weight, and breadth thrust failure to confirm or question the durability of an uptrend.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用市场宽度指标，如站上50/200日均线的股票比例、等权/市值加权相对表现、宽度冲刺是否跟随，来确认或质疑上涨趋势的持续性。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图8是典型宽度仪表板；[2025-06-24] “negative divergence between price and breadth”；[2026-02-24] 等权SPX跑赢Mag7 12%。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fiscal Dominance Macro Regime
emerged_uncurated.description: Frames asset performance around deficits, debt-service burdens, term premia, and the interaction between fiscal expansion and monetary policy.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕赤字、债务利息负担、期限溢价以及财政扩张与货币政策的互动，来框定资产表现的宏观状态。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-06-27] “We are now in an era of fiscal dominance”；图7《US Government Debt Service》是他常用背景板之一。

emerged_uncurated.name: Hard Money Relative Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Compares Bitcoin and gold as members of the hard-money complex, often preferring gold leadership and treating Bitcoin as a higher-beta junior participant.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将比特币和黄金放在同一个硬通货资产组里比较，通常把黄金视为领导者，把比特币视为更高beta的次级参与者。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-27] “Bitcoin is an aspirational junior player on the hard money team (led by gold)”；图1/2用 gold/BTC ratio 的z-score。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_242_MRI 连续计数衰竭信号
emerged_uncurated.name: MRI Sequential Exhaustion
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: MRI 连续计数衰竭信号
emerged_uncurated.description: A proprietary-style bar-count exhaustion framework that flags trend fatigue after a sequence of consecutive closes/bars, then waits for confirmation to mark a buy or sell setup.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 一种连续 K 线计数的趋势衰竭框架；先用连续收盘/连续 bar 统计识别趋势耗尽，再等待确认生成买入或卖出信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-25：“Is the MRI Buy Finally Going to Show #Bitcoin Signs of Life!”；2024-06-17：“#Bitcoin Rallies OFF the MRI BUY”。MRI 是他反复点名的个人框架，但 seed 里没有。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_243_比特币本位相对价值过滤器
emerged_uncurated.name: Bitcoin Maxi Relative-Value Filter
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 比特币本位相对价值过滤器
emerged_uncurated.description: A structural filter that heavily discounts altcoin rallies unless they outperform on long-term relative charts and pass a credibility test; weak alts are treated as secular shorts or permanent avoids.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 一种强烈的比特币本位过滤器：除非山寨币能在长期相对强弱图上证明自己并通过可信度筛选，否则默认视为长期劣质资产、结构性回避或做空对象。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2019 年的 XRP 图文在嘲讽“Ripple's Success Plan”；2025-08-12 说 XMR“down 94% with significant downside to go”；他对多数山寨币是先做结构性否定，再谈交易。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_244_年开盘价/季开盘价收复
emerged_uncurated.name: Yearly/Quarterly Open Reclaim
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 年开盘价/季开盘价收复
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses yearly open, quarterly open, or monthly open as high-timeframe pivot levels. A reclaim after a sweep or pullback is treated as a confirmation trigger for continuation higher.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把年开盘价、季开盘价、月开盘价作为高时间框架枢轴位；价格在扫流动性或回调后重新收复这些开盘位，被视为趋势延续确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-01-31：“reclaim the yearly open and I think we push higher”; 2024-09-30：“reclaim the quarterly open”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_245_历史分形类比路径投射
emerged_uncurated.name: Historical Fractal Analog Projection
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 历史分形类比路径投射
emerged_uncurated.description: Maps the current market structure onto a prior cycle segment and projects a likely path forward, usually visually with an overlaid blue path.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把当前市场结构映射到上一轮某个历史阶段，利用相似走势进行路径投射，通常会在图上直接叠加未来预期路线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-04-30：“wyd if the jan 2021 fractal plays out?”；图1用蓝色路径把 2024 结构类比到 2021 年 1 月后的延续上冲。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sweep Then Reclaim Trigger
emerged_uncurated.description: Wait for price to run obvious equal highs/lows or prior session/week levels, then reclaim a key reference level before entering in the opposite direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先等价格扫掉明显等高/等低、上周高低点或会话高低点，再等待收回关键参考位后反向入场。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-30：“Sweep of last week's low and all those equal lows and then reclaim the quarterly open”; 2025-01-31：“sweep of the local lows into monthly demand”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Monthly SR Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Derives trade bias from monthly support/resistance bands and maps likely summer or multi-month paths around those zones.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕月线级别支撑阻力带建立交易偏向，并据此推演未来数周到数月的震荡或突破路径。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图1在 61.3k 与 58.8k 一带明确标注“Monthly S/R”，并给出更深回调或夏季横盘的路径；2024-04-30 文字也说“Deeper pullback scenario would be 52k... chop for most of the summer”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_248_伦敦高低点扫单 + 5分钟 FVG
emerged_uncurated.name: London Sweep FVG Setup
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 伦敦高低点扫单 + 5分钟 FVG
emerged_uncurated.description: A session-based intraday setup: wait for London high/low to be swept, wait for an opposing 5-minute fair value gap, enter at the FVG, and target the other side of the session range.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 会话制日内策略：等待伦敦时段高点或低点被扫，再等待相反方向的 5 分钟 FVG 形成，在 FVG 入场，目标看向另一侧伦敦高低点。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-11 逐条写出完整流程：“1) Wait for a sweep of London's high/low. 2) Wait for a 5 min FVG... 3) Enter on that FVG...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-Layer Reclaim Sequence
emerged_uncurated.description: A bullish transition framework requiring a sequence of conditions: market structure shift first, then reclaim of a key horizontal level, then reclaim of a major trendline or moving average. Entries are favored only after these layers align.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 一种偏多转换框架：先出现市场结构转变，再收回关键水平位，随后再收回主要趋势线或均线。只有这些条件按顺序共振时，才视为高质量做多触发。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 5 明确写出“1. Market Structure Shift 2. Reclaim of Key Level 3. Reclaim of Key Trend”；2024-12-30 直接说“Master buying reclaims.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Consolidation As Fuel
emerged_uncurated.description: In a broader bullish environment, prolonged chop or range action is interpreted less as distribution and more as energy build-up for the next leg higher, unless major structure is lost.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在更大级别牛市背景下，长时间横盘或震荡更可能被视为下一段上涨前的蓄力，而不是派发；除非关键结构被破坏。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-04-30 “same playbook on repeat chop, then higher.”；2025-07-31 “large consolidations have more frequently served as fuel for the next rally higher.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_251_弱市中的相对强度筛选
emerged_uncurated.name: Relative Strength During Weak Tape
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 弱市中的相对强度筛选
emerged_uncurated.description: When the market backdrop is choppy or bearish, identify assets that refuse to break structure, bounce first, or hold trend better than leaders; those become preferred longs when the tape improves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当市场整体偏弱、震荡或下行时，优先筛选那些不破结构、率先反弹、或比龙头更抗跌的资产；一旦大盘环境改善，这些标的会成为优先做多对象。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-30 讨论某些 alt 在 -3% pullback 中更抗跌；2025-08-31 “Ethereum is bouncing but Bitcoin isn’t?”；2025-10-26 把 ETHBTC 视为整个山寨强弱的最佳代理。

emerged_uncurated.name: Market Structure Break Level
emerged_uncurated.description: Mark the exact swing level whose break confirms a regime shift, then use that level as the key reclaim/rejection pivot for the next trade.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 标出确认结构切换的关键摆动位；一旦跌破或升破，该位就成为之后回抽确认或拒绝的核心枢轴。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图2、图3多次直接用红线标注“MSB”，这是他图表语言里最鲜明的专属标签之一。

emerged_uncurated.name: Level-Based Scenario Tree
emerged_uncurated.description: Predefine multiple scenarios around one or two major levels: hold/reclaim means one path, lose/sweep means another, with entries and invalidations attached to each branch.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕一个或两个关键位预先写好多套分叉剧本：守住/收回走一种路径，跌破/扫流动性走另一种路径，并给每条路径配套入场与失效条件。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-30]“higher low and longs to range high... or we are going down to range low and can try again there.”；[2025-10-30]“My invalidation is clear...” 都是条件分叉而不是单点预测。

emerged_uncurated.name: Alt Relative Strength Scan
emerged_uncurated.description: Rank altcoins by performance and structure versus BTC, ETH, and SOL to identify leadership before broad market recognition.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把山寨币分别对 BTC、ETH、SOL 做相对强弱与结构比较，用来提前发现领涨品种，而不是只看美元计价图。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-30]“go through Altcoins and checking them vs $BTC, $ETH and $SOL. If you want to spot outperformance, that is how you do it.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Cycle Euphoria Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: When price enters discovery and social timelines explode with extreme targets, reduce trust in upside extrapolation and focus on protecting gains.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当价格进入发现区、社媒开始充斥极端目标价时，降低对继续线性外推上涨的信任度，把重心转向保护利润。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-10-31]“You are going to see some insane price targets... Most of this is just bullish hopium and euphoria—be careful.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Newsflow Arbitrage
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade around fast-moving headlines, ecosystem updates, founder behavior, and sentiment shifts before they are fully priced by the market.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕头条、生态更新、创始人行为和情绪切换做快速定价偏差交易，在市场完全消化前完成布局或减仓。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-10 连续讨论 Bittensor/$TAO 事件："Bittensor is a quite a LOT more than Subnet 3"、"Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens"、"Here is how I think the Bittensor $TAO situation will play out from here"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_257_内幕上所高估值反手做空
emerged_uncurated.name: Insider Listing Fade
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 内幕上所高估值反手做空
emerged_uncurated.description: Fade newly listed tokens or promoted assets when exchange/investor alignment, seed allocations, or insider incentives imply asymmetric sell pressure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当交易所、投资人、种子轮分配与内部人激励共同指向抛压时，反手做空新上所代币或被过度营销的资产。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-25: "it's an insider's game you can't win, so short garbage when it lists at nonsense valuations"。这是非常明确、可执行的结构性交易规则。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Not There Yet
emerged_uncurated.description: Avoid forcing longs before crowd sentiment or narrative participation has meaningfully turned; use sentiment confirmation as a gate before size-up.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在群体情绪和叙事参与度尚未明显转强前，不提前重仓做多；把情绪确认当作加仓门槛。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-11: "Ok doesn’t seem sentiment there yet"。这句话非常像他的实时过滤条件，而不是事后评论。

emerged_uncurated.name: Founder Sell-Pressure Overhang
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify protocol or token downside risk when founders, teams, or subnet owners receive extractive token flows likely to be sold into market strength.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当创始人、团队或生态拥有者获得可提取代币并存在明显套现激励时，识别其对价格形成的持续抛压风险。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-10: "Templar founder extracted 37,000 $TAO worth of alpha tokens... So it is only logical those 37k $TAO will be dumped on the market for max extraction"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_260_前高/区间上沿周线收盘确认
emerged_uncurated.name: ATH/Range High Weekly Close Confirmation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 前高/区间上沿周线收盘确认
emerged_uncurated.description: Wait for multiple daily closes and preferably a weekly close above a major range high or prior ATH before treating the breakout as a high-conviction expansion leg.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 等待关键区间上沿或前高被多根日线、最好周线有效收于上方，再将其视为高胜率主升浪启动，而不是仅凭瞬时刺破追单。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-26: "Once we get a few daily closes, a weekly above $65k BTC, it’s over."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_261_情绪绝望反向底部信号
emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Despair Contrarian Bottom
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 情绪绝望反向底部信号
emerged_uncurated.description: Use extreme doom, panic posting, and broad retail despair on the timeline as a contrarian input that the local low or shakeout is near completion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把社媒上的恐慌、绝望、看空刷屏作为反向指标，认为洗盘接近尾声、底部正在形成。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-12-20: "The sentiment over the last few days because of this Bitcoin and Crypto dip is honestly pretty telling..."；2025-02-25 多条推文嘲讽 "top is in, it’s over" 言论。

emerged_uncurated.name: Memetic Momentum Amplification
emerged_uncurated.description: Blend simple breakout or cycle observations with emotionally loaded, repeated bullish slogans to reinforce high-conviction positioning and audience alignment during trend expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把简单的突破/周期判断与高强度口号、梗图、夸张措辞结合，在趋势上行阶段持续强化看多共识与持仓信心。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 反复出现 "something BIG is coming"、"Higher"、"Banana Zone"、"However big you think it's gonna be - It will be bigger."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_263_低流通高 FDV 反身性博弈
emerged_uncurated.name: Low-Float High-FDV Reflexivity
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 低流通高 FDV 反身性博弈
emerged_uncurated.description: Tracks whether a token launch is structurally fragile or reflexively strong based on float, FDV, unlock profile, and market willingness to ignore valuation during narrative booms.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 根据流通盘、FDV、解锁结构与叙事热度，判断新币是结构性脆弱还是能靠情绪/流动性反身性继续涨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-05-20 多次讨论“low-float high-FDV launches”，还发了图 3 专门比较 2022-2024 新币 MC/FDV 差距，并写“if everyone is bearish on low-float high-FDV launches...”与“FDV do not matter”式例外判断。

emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Political Beta
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses election odds, candidate rhetoric, and regulatory posture as a directional input for crypto sentiment and sector repricing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把选举胜率、候选人对加密的表态和监管立场，当作加密市场情绪和估值重估的事件驱动因子。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-28 说“The next president... may be decided by how much they support our coins”；图 2 也是特朗普/拜登加密立场对照；2024-11-06 转发“THE UNITED STATES WILL BE THE CRYPTO CAPITAL OF THE PLANET...”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Apathy Extreme Opportunity
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats social disengagement, boredom, and narrative exhaustion as a contrarian accumulation signal when broader cycle conditions remain constructive.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在大周期仍健康的前提下，把社媒冷淡、市场无聊和叙事疲劳视为反向布局信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-17 明说“peak apathy = max opportunity”；2024-06-26 也问“Is everyone really full blown doomer at this point?”，这不是传统 TA 指标，而是明显的情绪极值框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: ETP Absorption Elasticity
emerged_uncurated.description: Model BTC direction by tracking spot ETF/ETP net flows, AUM milestones, and the rolling relationship between vehicle absorption and spot returns. Trigger when persistent net inflows/outflows materially change floating supply.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过跟踪现货 ETF/ETP 的净流入、AUM 里程碑和滚动窗口内“吸筹量 vs 现货收益”的关系来判断 BTC 方向；当持续净流入/净流出显著改变流通供给时触发。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-10：“30d ETF inflows and 30d BTC returns ... R^2 of 0.8368”；2024-10-31：“U.S. Spot BTC ETF exposure surpassed 1 million BTC under management.”

emerged_uncurated.name: CME Participant Position Decomposition
emerged_uncurated.description: Separate CME OI into active market participants, leveraged ETFs, and passive holders, then combine with basis and OI change to infer who is driving risk and whether the move is healthy.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 CME OI 拆成主动市场参与者、杠杆 ETF、被动持有者等分层，再结合 basis 和 OI 变化，判断是谁在推动风险暴露，以及上涨/下跌是否健康。

emerged_uncurated.name: Adjusted Liquidation Estimation
emerged_uncurated.description: Estimate true liquidation intensity using open-interest change, exchange methodology changes, and reconstructed market-wide perp exposure instead of trusting exchange-reported liquidation feeds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不直接相信交易所上报的清算数据，而是结合 OI 变化、交易所 API 口径变更和全市场永续合约暴露重建，估算真实清算强度。
