emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-29 说“Liquidation data from exchanges are bogus”；图片 2、3、4、5 全都围绕 liquidation 数据失真、API 变更、估算方法展开。

emerged_uncurated.name: Institutional Supply Sink Tracking
emerged_uncurated.description: Track entities that structurally absorb BTC supply over time, such as ETFs, public companies, sovereign funds, and leveraged products, and treat acceleration in these sinks as a medium-term bullish force.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪会持续吸收 BTC 流通供给的实体，例如 ETF、上市公司、主权基金、杠杆产品；当这些吸收池的增速提升时，将其视为中期看多力量。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-11-18：“MicroStrategy added 51,780 BTC last week”；2024-08-14、2025-01-29 跟踪 NBIM 间接 BTC 持仓；2024-12-19 统计“859,454 BTC has been bought by ETFs and public companies alone in 2024.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_270_现货 ETF 反身性需求循环
emerged_uncurated.name: Spot ETF Reflexive Demand Loop
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 现货 ETF 反身性需求循环
emerged_uncurated.description: Sustained spot ETF inflows are treated as both direct demand and a narrative amplifier that brings in the next wave of institutional allocators.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把持续的现货 ETF 净流入同时视为真实买盘和叙事放大器；一旦流入创纪录，会吸引下一波机构配置，形成反身性正反馈。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-10-31] “Largest single day Bitcoin ETF inflows since launch” + [2024-10-30] “All of the suits who aped the ETF are now in profit and can start shilling IBIT to their other suit friends”

emerged_uncurated.name: Open Interest Flush Reset
emerged_uncurated.description: A sharp open-interest wipeout without structural price damage is interpreted as a cleansing event that improves forward upside odds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 如果未破坏高时间框架结构，但未平仓量被快速大幅冲洗，他会把它视为仓位出清、后续更利于上涨的重置事件。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] “open interest is down ~$1.3 billion in 12 hours Looking better now” 和 [2025-10-23] “buying BTC after 30%+ open interest rinses is 75% over 90 days”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_272_BTC 对黄金相对强弱轮动
emerged_uncurated.name: BTC vs Gold Relative Strength Rotation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 对黄金相对强弱轮动
emerged_uncurated.description: Track the BTC/Gold ratio as a regime signal: gold overextension or crowding often precedes a Bitcoin catch-up or leadership reversal.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC/Gold 比率当作宏观轮动信号；当黄金过度拥挤或过度延伸时，往往对应比特币的补涨或领导权切换。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-10-21] “People lining up in the streets actually marked the week of the gold top” + [2025-10-25] “I am expecting Bitcoin to run to new highs against Gold from here”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_273_政策体制转向带来的 BTC 买盘
emerged_uncurated.name: Policy Regime Shift to BTC Bid
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 政策体制转向带来的 BTC 买盘
emerged_uncurated.description: A pro-crypto policy pivot, banking access expansion, or sovereign reserve framing is treated as a structural repricing catalyst, not just a headline.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把亲加密政策转向、银行托管开放、主权储备叙事升级等视为结构性重估催化，而非一次性新闻。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-27] “Banks can now custody Bitcoin” 以及 [2024-07-27] 关于 Trump strategic Bitcoin reserve 的总结推文

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_274_ETF 资金流与价格背离
emerged_uncurated.name: ETF Flow / Price Divergence
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: ETF 资金流与价格背离
emerged_uncurated.description: When spot ETF inflows remain strongly positive for multiple sessions but BTC fails to advance or sells off, treat it as evidence of synthetic supply, off-exchange absorption, or structural price suppression.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当现货 ETF 连续多日净流入很强，但 BTC 不涨反跌时，将其视为合成供给、场外对冲吸收或结构性压价的证据。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-06-26] “Bitcoin: not even close and that despite all those treasury companies and ETFs buying up $1.5 billion...” [2025-06-30] “$2 billion in ETFS and the price still isnt moving.”

emerged_uncurated.name: US Session Dump Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Repeatedly fade BTC strength around US cash market open when prior gains are not being confirmed; assumes systematic selling pressure tied to Wall Street hours.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 BTC 在亚洲或欧盘走强但未获延续确认时，于美股现金市场开盘前后倾向反手，假设华尔街时段存在系统性卖压。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “Why does Bitcoin always look great until US wakes up?” [2025-02-28] “2 hours until US market open, so dumping should start soon.” [2025-11-26] “Guess US is waking up again and immediately starts dumping Bitcoin as always.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Bitfinex Whale Smart-Money Tracker
emerged_uncurated.description: Track a specific large Bitfinex participant's long exposure changes as a leading directional signal; accumulation into weakness is treated as high-information positioning.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 追踪特定 Bitfinex 大户的多头仓位变化，作为领先方向信号；在价格走弱或横盘时增仓被视为高信息量行为。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-12-30] “the Bitfinex whale has started building his long position again... he's never wrong.” 图7 直接展示 longs 与利率的监控图。

emerged_uncurated.name: Paper BTC Suppression Thesis
emerged_uncurated.description: Infer that spot demand is being neutralized by synthetic paper supply when repeated bullish catalysts fail to move price, leading to a structurally skeptical stance despite nominal inflows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当连续利多催化都无法推动价格时，推断现货需求被合成纸面供给中和，因此即使名义资金流入强，也维持结构性怀疑态度。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-20] “Paper Bitcoin, unlimited supply.” [2026-01-06] “Too much paper Bitcoin in the space, there's an unlimited supply of Bitcoin.” [2025-12-31] “Wallstreet and the ETFs destroyed Bitcoin.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Bitcoin Network Capital Flows
emerged_uncurated.description: Track total, speculative, and short/medium-horizon capital entering or leaving the Bitcoin network, usually derived from realized-cap style flow models. Rising flows after a bottom imply accumulation and improving structure; declining flows during price strength imply weakening internals.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪进入或流出比特币网络的总资本、投机资本及 1d/7d/30d 期限资本流，通常基于 realized cap 类模型。底部后的流入回升代表吸筹与结构改善；价格走强但流量走弱则代表内在动能转差。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-25] "Capital inflows into the Bitcoin network starting to climb again, while BTC chops around sideways quietly hiding coins being accumulated"；附图 #1/#6/#8 都是这一套图。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_279_链上 VWAP 标准差扩张
emerged_uncurated.name: Onchain VWAP Z-Score Extension
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 链上 VWAP 标准差扩张
emerged_uncurated.description: Measure how far spot price is stretched from onchain VWAP in standard deviations. Extreme positive readings indicate momentum overextension even if fundamentals remain bullish; prefer sideways reset or shallow pullback rather than chase.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 衡量现价相对链上 VWAP 偏离了多少个标准差。正向极值说明即便基本面偏多，价格也处于过度延伸状态，更适合等待横盘消化或浅回撤，而不是追高。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-04-27] "onchain VWAP is at +3 standard deviations, meaning it'll be hard to move upwards with decent momentum due to over extension."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_280_宏观周期风险压缩模型
emerged_uncurated.name: Macro Cycle Risk Compression
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 宏观周期风险压缩模型
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a composite macro/liquidity risk model to detect when investor risk is peaking, compressing, or rolling over. Falling macro-cycle risk implies liquidity returning to the network and downside becoming muted.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用宏观与流动性合成风险模型判断投资者风险是见顶、压缩还是回落。宏观周期风险下降，通常意味着流动性重新回到网络中，下行回撤会被削弱。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "Macro Cycle Risk printed a lower high and has started a drop in risk"；[2025-04-27] "Our Risk Model has started its trend back down. This means liquidity has returned to the market."

emerged_uncurated.name: TradFi Treasury Reflexive Bid
emerged_uncurated.description: Model treasury-style buyers such as ETFs or listed companies as secondary demand engines that translate traditional capital markets access into reflexive BTC demand, amplifying upside beyond native crypto flows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 ETF、上市公司金库买入等视为第二层需求引擎：它们把传统资本市场通道转化为反身性的 BTC 买盘，放大原生链上资金流的上涨效果。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-28] "The merger of #Bitcoin and TradFi is not going to make sense"；[2025-04-27] 他明确说数据里包含 treasury buying activities，它们是新的 TradFi onramp。

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-Month Box Range Extremes
emerged_uncurated.description: Define a broad multi-week or multi-month box, fade the boundaries, and wait for sweep/failure behavior at the edges before positioning for mean reversion or final breakout.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先定义一个持续数周到数月的大箱体，重点交易上下沿附近的扫流动性、假突破和均值回归，而不是中间位置追单。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-04-08 "Main scenario for me is still a $76k - $50k range until early Q4"；2026-03-26 "6 months range between 78-80k ... and around 48-53k"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekly Close Threshold Validation
emerged_uncurated.description: Instead of reacting to intraperiod moves, require the daily or weekly close relative to a key moving average or horizontal level to validate breakout/breakdown scenarios.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不因盘中刺破立刻改变方向，而是要求日线或周线收盘站上/跌破关键均线或水平位后，才确认趋势切换或区间失效。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 "If we close below the 100W ema+sma at 86k..."；同日又说 "Close below 86k on the weekly would confirm the breakdown"；2025-11-21 "Weekly close above 100-week ema..."。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_284_跨交易所 SFP 分歧校验
emerged_uncurated.name: Cross-Exchange SFP Disagreement
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 跨交易所 SFP 分歧校验
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare whether swing highs/lows were swept across different exchanges before accepting an SFP as valid; partial sweeps imply unfinished liquidity business.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 比较不同交易所是否都扫掉同一摆动高低点；如果只有部分交易所完成 SFP，说明流动性清扫可能未结束，单一交易所信号不够可靠。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-04-25 "Obviously, half the exchanges got Sfp'd, the other half not yet"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Astro Cycle Overlay
emerged_uncurated.description: Use non-traditional planetary or calendar cycle overlays as a supplemental timing model for possible tops and bottoms.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把非常规的天体/历法周期当作辅助择时工具，用来给潜在顶部和底部窗口加时间权重。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-05-26 "Mars-Vesta cycles  Oct 6th $btc top is coded by the crypto gods"；2024-10-31 也提到 "3.9 years mars Vesta cycle"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Session-Based Flow Attribution
emerged_uncurated.description: Attribute directional pressure to specific market sessions, especially U.S. hours, to infer ETF or institutional flow dominance.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把价格主导权按亚盘、欧盘、美盘拆开，若卖压主要集中在美盘，则推断 ETF 或传统机构资金在主导行情。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-11-21 "SELLING is happening mainly during U.S. Session"，并进一步归因给 ETF massive outflows 的可能性。

emerged_uncurated.name: Whale Wallet Tracking
emerged_uncurated.description: Track known whale, fund, insider, treasury, and old-wallet addresses across deposits, withdrawals, transfers, and wallet clustering to infer likely positioning changes before or after price moves.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 持续跟踪巨鲸、机构、项目方、老钱包等地址的提币、充币、转移和地址聚类关系，据此推断其仓位变化与潜在市场影响。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 几乎整组推文都在做这件事，如 [2025-11-30] ETH ICO 巨鲸抛售、[2025-11-29] WBTC 巨鲸转而卖 ETH、[2026-04-02] 2016 年 ETH 远古巨鲸近乎清仓。

emerged_uncurated.name: Public Position Leaderboard Tracking
emerged_uncurated.description: Monitor public perpetual leaderboards or visible addresses on venues like Hyperliquid/Deribit to track PnL, liquidation price, leverage, add/reduce behavior, and crowd copytrading reactions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪 Hyperliquid、Deribit 等可见仓位地址的净值、强平价、杠杆、加减仓行为，以及市场跟单与围猎反应。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-04-06]、[2026-04-10] 连续更新“先定 10 个大目标”老哥仓位；图 3 也是典型的公开账户净值曲线截图。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_289_TGE/上所/代币经济事件手册
emerged_uncurated.name: TGE and Listing Tokenomics Event Playbook
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: TGE/上所/代币经济事件手册
emerged_uncurated.description: Analyze token launch, unlock, market maker, cross-chain testing, venue listing, and circulation structure to estimate initial FDV pressure and event-driven flows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕 TGE、解锁、做市商、跨链测试、交易所上线与流通盘结构，评估初始 FDV、抛压和事件驱动资金流。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-31] 她为 WLFI 做整套信息蒸馏：TGE 流通量、FDV、多空情况、CA、轮次成本、做市商；图 1 也是 WLFI 主题图。

emerged_uncurated.name: Source Verification Forensics
emerged_uncurated.description: Before accepting wallet or exchange rumors, verify timestamps, addresses, provenance, and image integrity to filter fabricated screenshots and misleading attribution.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在接受钱包、交易所或名人地址传言前，先核验时间、地址、资金来源和图片真伪，过滤 P 图和错误归因。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-10-31]“一眼假… Don't trust. Verify.”，并逐条指出时间和地址都被 P 过。

emerged_uncurated.name: Ecosystem Adoption Scorecard
emerged_uncurated.description: Builds a directional thesis by tallying integrations, real-world users, transaction counts, payment rails, exchange support, and enterprise partnerships rather than relying on chart structure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过整合接入数、真实用户数、链上交易量、支付通道、交易所支持和企业合作来建立方向性看多框架，而不是依赖 K 线形态。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-31] “3.5B transactions... 100% uptime... Zero failed transactions”；[2025-03-24] “over $965M in assets on-chain”；图5展示 Pera Card 的支付落地。

emerged_uncurated.name: Infrastructure Quality Benchmarking
emerged_uncurated.description: Ranks chains by uptime, finality, validator distribution, fees, scalability, and post-quantum readiness, then uses that benchmark as a valuation gap thesis.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 按 uptime、终局性、验证者分布、费用、扩展性、抗量子能力对公链做横向质量评分，并把“质量高但估值低”当成交易逻辑。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-25] “100% uptime... 15,000 TPS with instant finality... Decentralized”; [2026-04-06] “Whatever you look at tech, UX, decentralization... Algorand is SO underrated.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Catalyst Calendar
emerged_uncurated.description: Trades around a rolling calendar of upcoming launches, partnerships, listings, roadmap reveals, and product releases, expecting repricing before and after the event.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕即将到来的发布、合作、上所、路线图和产品上线做前置布局，预期事件前后产生重新定价。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-10-29] “still planned before EOY!”；[2025-06-27] “Just 4 days to go before the announcement of a major new interoperability partnership”；[2025-07-29] “D-2 before the Algorand roadmap!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Theme Basket Relative Strength
emerged_uncurated.description: Creates a thematic basket such as legacy L1s, ISO 20022 tokens, or 'dino coins' and compares its relative momentum against BTC or the wider market.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把老牌 L1、ISO 20022 或“dino coins”组成主题篮子，观察其相对 BTC 或全市场的强弱变化来做轮动判断。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-29] “Never fade Dino coins. Never! 🦖” 配图4展示 ADA/ALGO/HBAR/XRP 90 日涨幅大幅跑赢 BTC。

emerged_uncurated.name: Historical Fractal Analog
emerged_uncurated.description: Maps the current cycle to a prior regime or year and projects a path using structural similarity rather than strict pattern rules.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把当前周期映射到历史年份/历史牛市结构，基于相似路径做目标位和时间窗口推演，而不是只看单一形态。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-17：“I applied a fractal from 2017 and that’s how I predicted the Jan bottom”；同日还说预期两个 blow-off tops。

emerged_uncurated.name: Election / Inauguration Seasonal Playbook
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses U.S. election timing, inauguration week, and post-election month counts as repeatable timing windows for crypto positioning.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把美国大选、总统就职、选后月份窗口当作加密市场的重复性时间锚来部署仓位。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28：“Markets peaks 6 months post election”；2025-01-20 多条围绕 inauguration day 做 BTC/ETH 部署；2024-01-26 也强调 election year volatility。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_297_月线/季线收盘磁吸玩法
emerged_uncurated.name: Monthly / Quarterly Close Magnet
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 月线/季线收盘磁吸玩法
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats month-end and quarter-end closes as liquidity events that often pin price, create fake moves, or define the next week's direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把月末和季末收盘视为流动性事件，认为价格常在这些节点被牵引、制造假动作，并决定接下来一周方向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“Monthly , quarterly close in 10 mins ! If it’s bullish , it retraces on first week of July before rally”；2025-07-31：“Monthly close today ! Anticipate volatility”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fixed Calendar Accumulation Window
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses specific recurring calendar dates as statistical accumulation windows, independent of short-term noise.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用每年固定日期附近作为统计意义上的建仓窗口，不被短线噪音干扰。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-17：“Personally , I’m buying next week . Sep 20-23 . I’ve been buying for over a decade on this date”；2024-07-31 还引用 W.D. Gann 的 Sep 23 季节性。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_299_鲸鱼操盘与订单簿意图解读
emerged_uncurated.name: Whale Manipulation / Orderbook Intent Read
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 鲸鱼操盘与订单簿意图解读
emerged_uncurated.description: Reads market moves as deliberate whale-engineered liquidity hunts using orderbook placement, liquidation pockets, and timing traps.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把市场走势解读为鲸鱼通过订单簿、清算位和时间节点主动设计的流动性猎杀。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-06-30：“market is heavily manipulated , run by algorithms... see what they are doing on the orderbook”；2024-07-31：“your liquidations were planned by whales”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Spot-Perp Orderflow Divergence
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect when spot exchange flow and perpetual futures positioning disagree, such as spot selling into rising perp premium or spot buying while perp leverage stays muted. Used to infer whether a move is real demand, passive distribution, or a squeeze setup.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别现货交易所流向与永续合约仓位/基差不一致的情形，例如现货在卖而永续溢价上升，或现货在买而杠杆并未同步扩张。用于判断上涨是否真实需求、是否存在被动派发，或是否处于挤仓前夜。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-04-30]“spot dumping... perps basis is closer to neutral now”; [2024-10-31]“The perps basis is rising because spot has been selling off today. Especially Coinbase has been quite bearish.” 图8同时看现货 CVD、perps basis 与价格。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_301_分交易所被动买卖盘识别
emerged_uncurated.name: Venue-Specific Passive Buyer/Seller Detection
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 分交易所被动买卖盘识别
emerged_uncurated.description: Track exchange-specific spot behavior such as Coinbase, Bitstamp, OKX, or Bitfinex to identify persistent passive sellers/buyers, TWAP execution, and venue-led directional pressure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪 Coinbase、Bitstamp、OKX、Bitfinex 等单一交易所的现货行为，识别持续性的被动卖家/买家、TWAP 执行，以及由特定场馆主导的方向压力。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-01-30]“Someone on OKX has been offloading a bunch of spot with limit orders all day”; [2024-07-30]“Coinbase $BTC spot CVD skyrocketed today, but it seems like it was mostly limit selling”; [2024-08-31]“Bitfinex started twapping $BTC.”

emerged_uncurated.name: OI Reset After Flush
emerged_uncurated.description: After a sharp but not structurally damaging move, open interest collapses while price holds key support/resistance. The reset is interpreted as leverage cleansing that improves trend continuation odds.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在一次剧烈但未破坏结构的价格波动后，未平仓合约显著回落，而价格仍守住关键支撑/阻力。该重置被视为杠杆洗净，提升原趋势延续概率。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-11-29]“Open interest reset, support held up. Looks to me like we're gonna take out the local highs”; [2025-05-30]“about $2b in OI closed on that small move down. $BTC”

emerged_uncurated.name: No Man's Land Trade Filter
emerged_uncurated.description: Avoid trading when price is trapped between meaningful local extremes without a catalyst, clean level interaction, or leverage asymmetry. Wait for either boundary sweep or catalyst expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当价格位于关键局部高低点之间、缺乏催化剂、缺乏明确水平位反应且杠杆不对称不明显时，选择不交易。等待边界被扫或催化剂带来扩张后再出手。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-31]“For me this is in no man's land”; [2025-03-29]“we're just chopping, waiting for a catalyst”; [2024-11-30]“Volume is dead, just come back Monday.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative-Catalyst Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Ranks trades by upcoming catalysts, headline momentum, ETF filings, token launches, ecosystem announcements, and sector attention rather than price action alone.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 按催化剂强弱做轮动，重点看 ETF 申请、生态发布、代币上线、合作新闻和赛道关注度，而不是只看 K 线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他高频转发并跟进 Polkadot ETF、Algorand 真实采用、RocketLab 合同、USDT mint、Top Trending Coins 等信息，并把这些直接转化为交易偏好。

emerged_uncurated.name: Microcap Asymmetric Re-rate
emerged_uncurated.description: Targets low-market-cap tokens with a simple chart base plus a strong narrative, then frames them with high-upside re-rating targets such as 2x, 5x, or new ATH.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 专找低市值币种，在简单底部结构配合强叙事时下注，并用 2x、5x、创新高等重估目标表达交易逻辑。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: NAI、MIL、SPEC、METIS、LARRY 等推文里反复出现 "easy 4-5x", "5x from here", "towards $100M MCAP", "Ready for new ATH" 这类非对称收益表达。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_306_BTC 稳住前提下的山寨条件做多
emerged_uncurated.name: Altcoin Conditional Long on BTC Stability
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 稳住前提下的山寨条件做多
emerged_uncurated.description: Only takes altcoin longs when BTC is holding support or moving sideways constructively; avoids isolated alt trades against a weak BTC tape.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 只有在 BTC 守住支撑或稳定横盘时才做山寨多单，避免逆着弱 BTC 环境单独做多山寨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-05-31："If $BTC holds here, we could see a 30–50% move." 这几乎是他做山寨 setup 的条件句模板。

emerged_uncurated.name: Simple Horizontal Target Projection
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses long trendline compression, visible horizontal resistances, and a straightforward upside path sketch instead of indicator-heavy forecasting.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 偏好用长期趋势线压缩、显眼水平阻力和手绘路径做目标投射，而不是堆叠大量指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 7 的 NAI 日线直接用下降趋势线、横向支撑和手绘上行路径给出 611% 空间，风格非常鲜明。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_308_VC 解锁抛压做空/回避
emerged_uncurated.name: VC Unlock Overhang Fade
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: VC 解锁抛压做空/回避
emerged_uncurated.description: Avoid or fade tokens with high FDV, low float, aggressive cliffs, and large investor unrealized multiples because unlock schedules create persistent sell pressure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 对高 FDV、低流通、悬崖解锁明显、投资人浮盈倍数极高的代币保持回避或逢高做空，因为后续解锁会形成持续抛压。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-26: "VCs don't actually lose even when they are locked up with vesting cliffs. Many of them short their own investments..."；2025-04-28 做空 $TRUMP 的核心论据也是大额线性解锁；配图中还有专门的 vesting / investor supply / unrealized profit 表。

emerged_uncurated.name: Mindshare Momentum
emerged_uncurated.description: Track social attention, Kaito rankings, and narrative share-of-voice as leading indicators for token rotation and meme/AI beta selection.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用社交关注度、Kaito 排名和叙事声量作为板块轮动与 meme/AI 标的筛选的领先指标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-06-29: "Mira @miranetwork ‘s Kaito leaderboard is absolutely worth climbing"；2024-11-16 评价 $GOAT 时把 "Mindshare moat" 列为第一条；配图也直接用了 Kaito Yaps 排行。

emerged_uncurated.name: PMF and Revenue Repricing
emerged_uncurated.description: Re-rate tokens that show real product-market fit, durable revenue, user growth, or buyback engines even if the broader market narrative is noisy.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 对拥有真实产品市场契合、持续收入、用户增长或回购机制的代币进行重估，即使市场噪音很大。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-29: "This bull cycle we have 3 products so far that have achieved product market fit"；2025-05-27 论证 $SYRUP 时列 TVL、年化收入、stablecoin mc 增长；2025-09-28 强调 $APEX 的 buyback pressure。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_311_生态轮动 Beta 下注
emerged_uncurated.name: Ecosystem Rotation Betas
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 生态轮动 Beta 下注
emerged_uncurated.description: When a chain or narrative regains attention, rotate from the obvious leaders into liquid beta names and second-order ecosystem plays.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当某条链或某个叙事重新获得关注时，从龙头扩散到流动性更好的 beta 标的和二级生态标的。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-29 看多 "$SOL alts"；2024-07-28 明说 "rotation from $SOL memes -> $SOL's ecosystem is inevitable"；2025 年又多次把 Base 叙事集中到 $ZORA。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_312_高时间框架水平供需区标定
emerged_uncurated.name: HTF Horizontal Zone Mapping
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 高时间框架水平供需区标定
emerged_uncurated.description: Mark multi-month support and resistance boxes on 1D/1W charts, then wait for reaction or reclaim/rejection before taking directional risk.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在 1D/1W 图上先标出多月级别水平支撑阻力箱体，再等待价格在箱体附近出现反应、收回或拒绝后才承担方向性风险。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: ETH 周线图把 1.9k 与 3.9k 一带画成宽黄区；[2024-08-24] 直接说 $CORE main support holding，且需要 $1.5 region flip。

emerged_uncurated.name: Invalidation-First Trade Framing
emerged_uncurated.description: Frame setups by the exact level that invalidates the thesis, and size/execute around that level rather than around a target-first narrative.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 先定义哪一个价位会让交易逻辑失效，再围绕这个失效位去做仓位和执行，而不是先讲目标位故事。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-04-10] 直接写 “Trading the invalidation.”，这是他少数明确暴露方法论的原话。

emerged_uncurated.name: Headline Shock Repricing
emerged_uncurated.description: Use sudden geopolitical or policy headlines as the catalyst for crypto repricing, especially when market structure is already weak or sitting on support.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当市场本就偏弱或压在关键支撑上时，把突发地缘政治或政策头条视作加密资产再定价催化剂。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-01-31] “Dude woke up and just decided he is going to nuke all our bags..”、[2025-02-28] “Did Trump announce another tariff while I was asleep or what? $BTC”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_315_CT 情绪极端反向参考
emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Twitter Sentiment Extremes
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: CT 情绪极端反向参考
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat extreme despair/euphoria in the feed as a soft contrarian input, especially around obvious support or after repeated bagholder capitulation memes.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把时间线上极端绝望或亢奋的情绪当作软性的反向指标，尤其是在明显支撑位或连续 bagholder 绝望段子之后。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 他大量使用 bagholder/poverty/ramen 叙事，如 [2025-10-29] “Back to Poverty Island $BTC”、[2025-09-23] “those juicy support levels across many altcoins”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_316_短期持有者成本带支撑堆栈
emerged_uncurated.name: STH Cost Basis Support Stack
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 短期持有者成本带支撑堆栈
emerged_uncurated.description: Use a stacked support/resistance framework combining 200-day moving average, short-term-holder cost basis, and on-chain mean/cost basis. A reclaim above the cluster is treated as structural confirmation; rejection below it is treated as weakness.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 200 日均线、短期持有者成本线、链上均值/成本基准叠加成一个支撑阻力带。价格重新站上该带视为结构确认，跌回其下视为弱势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-01-09]“Price closed above important support: its 200d MA ($31.9k), its short-term-holder cost basis ($35.8k), and its on-chain mean ($32.2k)”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_317_SOPR 回归盈亏平衡底部识别
emerged_uncurated.name: SOPR Reset Bottoming
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: SOPR 回归盈亏平衡底部识别
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat aggregate realized profit/loss resetting to breakeven as evidence of local bottom formation inside a broader bull trend.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把全市场已实现盈亏指标回归到盈亏平衡附近视为牛市中的局部底部重置信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-15]“SOPR... has reset to breakeven, which historically correlates with local bottoms within primary bull markets.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_318_艾略特浪 5 目标投射
emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott Wave 5 Projection
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 艾略特浪 5 目标投射
emerged_uncurated.description: After confirming impulsive structure and a breakout/retest, project a fifth-wave terminal target for upside continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在确认推动浪结构和突破回踩后，给出第 5 浪终点目标，用于顺势上行的空间评估。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-04-09]“$CIFR what a breakout... A breakout and retest or a retest of the 50 DMA is a solid opportunity to buy  Wave 5 target: +122%”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_319_纳指隐含公允价值模型
emerged_uncurated.name: Nasdaq-Implied Fair Value Model
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 纳指隐含公允价值模型
emerged_uncurated.description: Model Bitcoin fair value from its historical log-linear relationship with the Nasdaq 100, then trade deviations as discount/premium regimes.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 基于 BTC 与纳斯达克100长期对数线性关系估算公允价值，把现价相对模型价的折价/溢价当作交易与择时框架。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 2 标题直接是 “Bitcoin’s Nasdaq-Implied Fair Value: $156,000”，并标注 “BTC at a 31% discount”；2025-03-26 推文也说 “There is a statistically significant link between Bitcoin's log-price and the NASDAQ 100.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_320_回撤深度-修复时长模型
emerged_uncurated.name: Drawdown Depth-to-Duration Model
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 回撤深度-修复时长模型
emerged_uncurated.description: Estimate expected recovery duration from the percentage depth of a Bitcoin drawdown using historical scatter/regression.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 依据历史样本中 BTC 回撤幅度与修复耗时的关系，估计当前回撤大概还要持续多久。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 8 直接写 “The deeper Bitcoin’s drawdowns The longer it takes to resolve”；2026-03-26 推文也说 “every additional 10% of drawdown adds about 80 days to the total duration.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_321_企业比特币金库加速吸筹
emerged_uncurated.name: Corporate Treasury Accumulation Acceleration
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 企业比特币金库加速吸筹
emerged_uncurated.description: Track public companies accumulating BTC, especially acceleration in treasury purchases, as a structural demand and narrative multiplier.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪上市公司尤其是 MicroStrategy 一类主体的 BTC 金库扩张速度，把其视为结构性需求和叙事放大器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图 3、图 6 都是 MicroStrategy 持仓垂直上升；2025-03-24 推文 “MicroStrategy just added another 7,000 Bitcoin to their treasury.”；2024-11-25 “Bitcoin's price isn't the only thing going vertical these days. MicroStrategy's Bitcoin holdings are rising at a blazing pace.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Fed Communication Tone Index
emerged_uncurated.description: Infer market risk regime from the hawkish/dovish tone of FOMC minutes, press conferences, and Fed communication rather than rates alone.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不只看是否降息，而是量化 FOMC 纪要、发布会和联储表述的鹰鸽语气来判断风险偏好与 BTC 顺风/逆风。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-23 “The Federal Reserve is the least hawkish they've been...”；2024-11-27 “The Federal Reserve is almost dovish.”；2025-01-09 “The Federal Reserve shifted from a nearly dovish stance in November back to moderately hawkish...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_323_艾略特 ABC 修正结构映射
emerged_uncurated.name: Elliott ABC Correction Mapping
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 艾略特 ABC 修正结构映射
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify zigzag/flat/complex ABC corrections and project whether price is finishing wave A, B, or C before trend resumption or continuation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别之字形、平台形、复杂修正等 ABC 结构，判断当前处于 A、B、C 哪一段，以及修正完成后趋势恢复或延续的概率。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 推文里高频出现“after an ABC correction”“intraday ABC pullback in wave iv”“corrective rebound suggests more consolidation before bearish continuation”。seed 里只有 wave 3，没有系统覆盖他的 ABC 修正框架。

emerged_uncurated.name: Wave Triangle Breakout
emerged_uncurated.description: Detect contracting/running triangles, especially in wave B or wave IV, and trade the post-triangle thrust into the terminal wave.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别收敛/运行三角形，尤其是出现在 wave B 或 wave IV 时，交易其突破后进入终端推动浪的那一段。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-20 黄金“final wave (e) of a bullish running triangle in wave 'b'”；2026-04-10 Brent “Wave triangle theory in progress”；2026-01-26 EURUSD “Breaks Out of a Wave IV Triangle Into Wave V”。这比 seed 里的普通三角形更明确地绑定 Elliott 上下文。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_325_引导楔形/终结楔形识别
emerged_uncurated.name: Leading/Ending Diagonal Recognition
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 引导楔形/终结楔形识别
emerged_uncurated.description: Recognize leading or ending diagonal structures inside Elliott waves and use the break of the diagonal boundary as a directional confirmation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别艾略特波浪中的引导楔形或终结楔形，并以对角线边界的突破/跌破作为方向确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-29 DXY: “After a broken wedge with a leading diagonal pattern...” 2025-10-28 LTC 也提到“leading diagonal into wave A/1”。这不是 seed 里普通 wedge 能完整表达的。

emerged_uncurated.name: Cross-Asset Ratio Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use ratio charts such as BTC/NDQ, BTC/GOLD, or dominance ratios to infer relative strength rotation and capital flow direction.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过 BTC/NDQ、BTC/GOLD、主导率等比值图判断相对强弱切换与资金轮动方向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-10-29 “$BTC / $NDQ ratio chart is breaking out... Bitcoin could outperform”; 2024-11-07 “$BTC / $GOLD ratio chart is now progressing 5th wave”; 2024-11-27 与 2025-10-22 频繁用 BTC dominance/ALT dominance 做轮动判断。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_327_坏消息计价后的底部识别
emerged_uncurated.name: Bad News Fully Priced Bottom
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 坏消息计价后的底部识别
emerged_uncurated.description: When markets stop falling or even rise on objectively bad macro/geopolitical news, treat that as evidence the low is near or already in place.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当市场在客观利空的宏观或地缘新闻下不再下跌、甚至上涨时，将其视为低点临近或已经出现的证据。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-24] “stocks and crypto bottom on ‘bad’ news - not good”; [2026-04-08] “stocks higher on bad news”.

emerged_uncurated.name: Relative Leadership Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Rank sectors/assets by performance versus S&P 500 during a macro shock and buy the leaders on skepticism, assuming leadership persists into the next leg.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在宏观冲击阶段按相对 S&P 500 的表现给资产和板块排序，并在市场仍怀疑时优先买入领涨者，假设强者恒强延续到下一阶段。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图4/图5直接做“Relative Performance to S&P 500 since start of Iran Conflict”；[2026-04-10] “consider buying what has led since the Iran war started Ethereum ... top of list Bitcoin ...”.

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_329_机构采用叙事作为价格催化剂
emerged_uncurated.name: Institutional Adoption as Price Catalyst
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 机构采用叙事作为价格催化剂
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat visible institutional adoption, tokenization launches, ETF validation, treasury strategy announcements, or uplistings as catalysts that tighten narrative credibility and expand valuation multiples.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将机构采用、代币化产品上线、ETF 认可、企业金库配置、交易所升级上市等事件视为提升叙事可信度并扩张估值倍数的催化剂。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-28] “Major financial institutions are launching their financial tokenized products on ethereum”; [2024-05-28] SMLR 因 BTC ETF 获批而采用比特币金库策略；[2026-04-09] 对 BMNR uplist to NYSE 表示看多。

emerged_uncurated.name: Consensus Bear Crowding Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: When bearishness becomes consensus and positioning is crowded, expect upside on even mediocre news because the bad thesis is already owned.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当看空成为一致预期且仓位拥挤时，即使只是一般消息也可能触发上涨，因为坏预期已经被充分持有和交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-24] “As bearish as it feels out there...” ; [2026-02-24] “When a stock becomes a ‘consensus’ short, it is also a crowded trade”.

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_331_Grannyshot 非对称高胜率主题
emerged_uncurated.name: Grannyshot Asymmetric Quality
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: Grannyshot 非对称高胜率主题
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify themes or stocks where downside is overly debated but long-duration upside from structural change is underappreciated; frame them as easy high-percentage shots.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别那些下行风险被过度讨论、但长期结构性上行被低估的主题或个股，将其定义为类似罚球“奶奶投篮”那样的高胜率非对称机会。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-12-25] “Why $NVDA remains a granny shot”; [2025-05-28] “Tesla is a grannyshot $GRNY”.

emerged_uncurated.name: Headline Impulse Trading
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade directional moves off fresh political, legal, macro, earnings, or corporate headlines before the broader market fully reprices them.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕政治、法律、宏观、财报、公司公告等最新头条做方向性交易，在市场完全重定价前抢先表达观点。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 大量推文以 "BREAKING" / "JUST IN" 开头，如 "US JUSTICE DEPARTMENT TO CHARGE BOEING WITH FRAUD"、"TRUMP SAYS IF CANADA IMPOSES RETALIATORY TARIFFS..."、"NVIDIA JUST REPORTED EARNINGS"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Anecdote Extremes
emerged_uncurated.description: Use absurd anecdotes, viral screenshots, vanity plates, or retail/social-media behavior as a soft top/bottom signal for crowded trades.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把离谱轶事、病毒式截图、车牌梗、社媒散户行为当作拥挤交易的软性顶部/底部信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图中的保时捷车牌 "THX NVDA"；推文 "IS THIS A TOP SIGNAL ?  $NVDA"；"EVERYONE ON FINTWIT NOW"；中国券商 24/7 开户、成交额纪录等散户狂热叙事。

emerged_uncurated.name: Concentrated Rerating Book
emerged_uncurated.description: Build oversized positions in a few disliked names when valuation is low and narrative/sentiment is improving, aiming for multiple expansion plus earnings stabilization.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在少数被嫌弃但估值低、叙事与情绪改善的标的上重仓，博取估值重估与基本面企稳的双击。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "ALIBABA AND PAYPAL COMBINED ARE NOW OVER 50% OF MY PORTFOLIO"；"ITS STILL AT JUST 11 TIMES NEXT YEARS EARNINGS   NO REASON IT CANT RERATE TO 15 TIMES"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bid-Ask Ratio Positive Flip Bottom Finder
emerged_uncurated.description: Use spot orderbook depth imbalance across fixed depth bands (0-1%, 0-5%, 0-10%) and treat a flip from ask-heavy to bid-heavy as a local-bottom signal, especially after a liquidity sweep.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪现货订单簿固定深度的买卖盘失衡；当失衡从卖盘主导翻转为买盘主导时，视为局部底部信号，若此前刚完成一次流动性扫单则置信度更高。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-19“We are finally seeing the bid ask ratio (spot, 10% depth) flip positive. The last 3 occurrences have marked a significant local bottom.”；2024-01-26“The global bid ask ratio recently flipped positive...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_336_散户多头占比均值回归振荡器
emerged_uncurated.name: Retail Long Percent Mean-Reversion Oscillator
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 散户多头占比均值回归振荡器
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat true retail long percentage as an inverse oscillator: very low long% can precede bottoms if it starts reverting higher; very high long% can precede squeezes lower or a bottom only after longs flush and shorts enter.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将散户多头占比视为反向振荡器：极低 long% 若开始回归上升，常对应底部；极高 long% 则常对应拥挤与清洗，需等多头出清、空头进入后再寻找反向机会。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-29“- Retail Long% is inversely correlated with price. - Retail Long% is an oscillator that is bounded by 0% to 100%. This is the alpha.”；2025-04-14 结合 histograms 观察 true retail long% 仍很低。

emerged_uncurated.name: Slippage Spike Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: Large one-bar slippage spikes, especially on sell-side panic candles or at the end of a liquidity sweep, are treated as exhaustion/reversal markers or the start of short-term consolidation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 单根 K 线出现异常大的滑点峰值，特别是发生在恐慌性卖压或完成流动性扫单之后时，视为衰竭/反转标记，或至少意味着短期进入盘整。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-11“Local top was marked by the largest spike in slippage ... plus a significant orderbook ask imbalance.”；2025-11-24“Slippage once again spiked above 100... often leads to reversals.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Open Interest Breakeven Magnet
emerged_uncurated.description: When a large OI cluster forms at a specific price, that level becomes a psychological breakeven magnet where trapped participants often exit; price is likely to revisit it and react there.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当某个价格带形成显著 OI 簇时，该区域会成为持仓者的心理回本位，容易吸引价格回访，并在回到该位时出现平仓/反应。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-07-29“Aaaand we're back at the largest open interest cluster. The 'breakeven' psychological level.”；2024-12-29“Significant open interest emerged around the 95250 and 94450 levels. These zones often present great risk-reward opportunities...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Institutional Adoption Momentum
emerged_uncurated.description: Track repeated announcements of large institutions, banks, ETFs, or corporates adopting or accumulating a crypto asset; cluster of adoption events is treated as a medium-term bullish demand regime shift.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪大型机构、银行、ETF 或企业连续宣布采用、配置或增持某加密资产；当这类事件密集出现时，将其视为中期需求结构切换的看多信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "BlackRock CEO said in Davos we must move fast on tokenization with one common blockchain"、"BNY will launch a tokenized fund on ethereum"、"JPMorgan planning to accept ETH as collateral"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Network Fundamentals Momentum
emerged_uncurated.description: Use synchronized all-time highs or multi-quarter growth in transactions, TPS, addresses, contract deployments, and staked supply as a primary signal that fundamentals are outrunning price and will eventually pull price higher.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把交易数、TPS、活跃地址、合约部署量、质押比例等指标同时创新高或连续多个季度增长，视为基本面领先价格的主信号，判断价格最终将向上追赶。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "ethereum just printed a new ALL-TIME HIGH in daily transactions"、"ethereum just hit a new all-time high in TPS"、"over 30% of eth is now staked"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Forced Selling Overhang Clearance
emerged_uncurated.description: When a market-wide overhang from bankruptcies, government sales, unlocks, or legacy holders is nearing completion, treat the removal of forced supply as a catalyst for trend resumption.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当破产抛售、政府卖币、解锁或历史遗留卖盘接近尾声时，把强制供给移除视为趋势恢复的催化剂。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "once forced selling from germany and gox are done, btc eth sol momentum will be back in full force. prob one more dip but fully confident"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Fair Launch Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Prefer fair-launch or fully-unlocked tokens over VC-heavy low-float high-FDV tokens, especially when market sentiment rotates toward cleaner supply structures.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在市场偏好向更健康供给结构切换时，优先选择公平发射或接近全流通的代币，而回避 VC 控盘、低流通高 FDV 代币。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: "My prediction. In this kind of market, fair launch projects will do MUCH better. Bearish on VC tokens. Bullish on fair launch tokens."

emerged_uncurated.name: Box Consolidation Expansion
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify long horizontal consolidation or compression boxes and project a directional expansion after enough time has been spent building energy inside the box.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别长时间横向箱体或压缩区，认为价格在箱内蓄能，盘整越久，后续离开箱体后的扩张越大。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "The bigger the consolidation, the bigger the expansion. $BTC"；[2024-04-30] "This long consolidation will be the last of this bull market"；图1、图4、图7都先画箱体/压缩区再画扩张路径。

emerged_uncurated.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
emerged_uncurated.description: Use repeated monthly return tendencies such as weak September and strong October/Q4 to shape directional bias and timing.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 利用月份收益分布形成方向偏置，例如 9 月偏弱、10 月和 Q4 偏强，用于择时。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "September is bad October is good $BTC"；图5、图6都是月度回报热力图，并高亮了 9-10 月和 Q4。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_345_关键位收复并站稳触发
emerged_uncurated.name: Level Reclaim With Acceptance
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 关键位收复并站稳触发
emerged_uncurated.description: Do not trade the first touch after a breakdown; wait for price to reclaim a lost level and show acceptance above it before entering.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 关键位跌破后不急于抄底，等待价格重新收复失守位置并出现站稳/接受，再启动交易。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-23] "Planning to double position size if we find acceptance above 2.9k"；[2026-02-24] "Range low is broken... I'll wait for a reclaim"。

emerged_uncurated.name: ATH Disbelief Divergence
emerged_uncurated.description: When price is near or at all-time highs but sentiment remains muted or bearish, treat it as a bullish continuation sign rather than a top.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当价格接近或创出历史新高，但市场情绪依旧冷淡或悲观时，将其视为看多延续而非见顶信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-05-22] "New ATH + silence = All sidelined"；[2025-06-30] "It's the first time $BTC is at ATH levels but sentiment is like we are in a bear market"。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bull Market Support Band
emerged_uncurated.description: Use the weekly bull market support band, typically the 20W SMA/21W EMA zone, as the primary trend support. Holding it supports continuation; losing it implies a deeper corrective or bearish phase.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用周线牛市支撑带（通常是 20 周均线与 21 周 EMA 区域）作为主趋势分界。守住偏延续，失守偏更深回调或熊市阶段。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-06-25] "#BTC now at its 21W EMA"；[2024-06-25] "#BTC dominance still holding support above its bull market support band"；图片 3 也直接展示该带。

emerged_uncurated.name: Logarithmic Regression Band Extremes
emerged_uncurated.description: Map BTC, ETH, or ETH/BTC into logarithmic regression bands to identify overextension, fair value, and likely mean-reversion zones across cycles.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC、ETH 或 ETH/BTC 放进对数回归带中，识别过热、合理价值和跨周期均值回归区域。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-02-28] "#ETH is moving deeper into its lower logarithmic regression band"；[2025-12-31] "According to this model, the current 'fair value' of ETH is $1987."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_349_中期选举年季节性模板
emerged_uncurated.name: Midterm Year Seasonal Template
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 中期选举年季节性模板
emerged_uncurated.description: Project BTC path using U.S. midterm-year analogs: common pattern is February low, March lower high, and April weakness, with macro relief later in the year.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用美国中期选举年类比推演 BTC 路径：常见路径是 2 月低点、3 月更低高点、4 月再探底，随后年内再看宏观缓和窗口。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-04-02] "Bitcoin tends to find a low in February, lower high in March, then it drops back down in April in midterm years."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_350_山寨对 BTC 清算期
emerged_uncurated.name: Alt/BTC Reckoning
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 山寨对 BTC 清算期
emerged_uncurated.description: When Alt/BTC pairs are rejected from prior support turned resistance or from the bull market support band, expect another leg of underperformance versus BTC rather than early altseason.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当 ALT/BTC 在前支撑变阻力或牛市支撑带被拒绝时，预期其相对 BTC 再走一轮弱势，而不是抢跑山寨季。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-09-25] "If they get rejected by the bull market support band... then it should lead to another move down by ALT/BTC pairs"；[2025-05-31] "#ALT / #BTC pairs were rejected from their bull market support band"。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_351_实现市值与总市值增速的周期判断
emerged_uncurated.name: Realized Cap vs Market Cap Regime
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 实现市值与总市值增速的周期判断
emerged_uncurated.description: Compare market cap growth with realized cap growth to infer whether price appreciation is supported by fresh capital absorption or speculative markup. Persistent market-cap outperformance indicates mid-to-late bull markup; realized-cap catch-up indicates healthier accumulation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 比较总市值与实现市值的增速，判断上涨是由新资本吸收支撑，还是由投机性估值抬升驱动。总市值持续快于实现市值，偏向牛市中后段估值扩张；实现市值跟上，则偏向更健康的吸筹。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-05-17: “Its market cap is growing faster than its realized cap, a trend that typically lasts around two years.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Sell-side Liquidity Absorption
emerged_uncurated.description: Estimate whether known selling sources such as governments, miners, Mt.Gox distributions, or old whales can be absorbed by current exchange, OTC, and ETF demand without regime damage.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 评估政府、矿工、Mt.Gox、老鲸鱼等已知卖方来源，是否会被当前交易所、OTC、ETF 需求吸收而不破坏市场趋势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-26: “US gov't sold 4K Bitcoin today, but less likely to impact the market. Coinbase Prime handled 20-49K BTC in sell-side liquidity daily...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Paper Bitcoin Buying Engine
emerged_uncurated.description: Track synthetic or custodial demand channels such as ETFs, trusts, treasury companies, and prime brokerage products as persistent price support separate from visible retail spot flows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪 ETF、信托、比特币金库公司、主经纪产品等“纸比特币”需求通道，把它们视为独立于链上散户现货流之外的持续买盘来源。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-01-31: “The buying engine for paper Bitcoins is still running.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Old Whales to New Whales Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use age bands, realized profits, dormancy, and custody clustering to detect whether old holders are distributing to institutions/new whales rather than retail, which changes top formation dynamics.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用币龄、已实现利润、休眠度和托管聚类判断老持有人是否在向机构/新鲸鱼而非散户换手，这会改变顶部形成方式。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-03-28: “Old whales are selling Bitcoin to new whales(TradFi), not retail investors.”；2024-04-24 提到 Average Dormancy 13 年峰值。

emerged_uncurated.name: Altcoin Limit-Wall Accumulation
emerged_uncurated.description: Monitor cumulative limit buy quote volume in altcoins to infer stealth accumulation by larger players before broad altcoin rallies.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 监控山寨币累计限价买单报价量，以识别大资金在全面山寨行情前的隐蔽吸筹。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 7 明确标注“LIMIT BUY”；2024-07-31 推文：“Limit buy order volume for altcoins... is increasing, indicating that strong buy walls are being set up.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_356_链上综合牛熊边界信号
emerged_uncurated.name: Composite On-chain Cycle Boundary
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 链上综合牛熊边界信号
emerged_uncurated.description: Blend PnL index, 365-day moving average oscillator, realized cap growth, demand/supply, and capital inflow measures into a single cycle state machine: bull, boundary, bear, recovery.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 PnL 指数、365 日均线振荡器、实现市值增速、供需关系、资本流入等合成为一个周期状态机：牛市、边界、熊市、复苏。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图片 2 和图片 3 都是明确的周期 composite 图；2025-02-27 与 2025-03-17 多次使用“bull-bear boundary”“every on-chain metric signals a bear market”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_357_地缘冲突利空落地反买
emerged_uncurated.name: Geopolitical Shock Buy-the-News
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 地缘冲突利空落地反买
emerged_uncurated.description: When war or military headlines trigger an initial panic gap lower, fade the first shock if the event is telegraphed, casualties are limited, and broader risk assets stabilize within a few sessions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当地缘军事事件引发第一波恐慌下跌时，如果袭击高度预告化、实际伤亡有限、风险资产很快止跌，则把首波下杀视为可反手买入的事件冲击，而不是新趋势起点。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-28 'Bitcoin is now up on bad news, having fully reversed the initial crash'; 同日又说 S&P 在军事冲突中常见 'buy the news pattern'。附图 1 和附图 8 都体现他在盯事件时间线。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bad-News-Up Character Change
emerged_uncurated.description: A market that stops going down on objectively bad news signals an important regime shift; the price response matters more than the headline.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 市场面对明确利空却不再继续下跌，说明交易性格发生切换；比起新闻本身，价格对新闻的反应更重要。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-02-28 'Bitcoin is now up on bad news, having fully reversed the initial crash. First time this happens since March 2023.'

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_359_政策沟通主导市场 regime
emerged_uncurated.name: Policy Communication Regime Mapping
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 政策沟通主导市场 regime
emerged_uncurated.description: Map price action primarily to policy messaging quality, tariff communication, and signaling path rather than to simplistic single-cause narratives.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将市场波动映射到政策沟通质量、关税表述路径和预期管理，而不是简单归因于单一变量。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-03-28 'Stocks have been plummeting because Trump's tariffs are bad for growth and earnings, and his comms increase uncertainty'; 2025-03-31 'What a difference one week makes - messaging went from Narrower tariffs to Broader tariffs'.

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_360_债权人赔付现金流再配置
emerged_uncurated.name: Creditor Distribution vs Reinvestment Flow
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 债权人赔付现金流再配置
emerged_uncurated.description: Distinguish between in-kind creditor distributions that create sell pressure and cash distributions that may recycle into crypto buying, producing opposite market effects.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 区分实物赔付造成的直接抛压，与现金赔付可能回流加密市场形成买盘，两者对市场的作用方向相反。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-30 'Mt Gox selling. Germany selling. US selling. But FTX creditors will be buyers. Soon.'；附图 3 也明确区分 Gemini/Mt.Gox 的 in-kind 与 FTX 的 cash payments。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_361_固定区间支撑阻力映射
emerged_uncurated.name: Support Resistance Zone Mapping
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 固定区间支撑阻力映射
emerged_uncurated.description: Repeatedly map the market into explicit numeric support and resistance zones, then anchor trade direction and invalidation around those zones rather than around complex indicator confluence.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 反复把行情拆成明确数字区间的支撑/阻力带，再围绕这些区间做方向判断和失效判断，而不是依赖复杂指标共振。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_362_山寨先行走弱预警主流币下跌
emerged_uncurated.name: Altcoin Weakness Leads Majors
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 山寨先行走弱预警主流币下跌
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat broad altcoin underperformance as an early warning that BTC/ETH downside is not yet fully expressed and that a larger market breakdown may follow.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把山寨币的普遍走弱视为 BTC/ETH 尚未完全补跌前的领先信号，预示更大级别下跌可能随后到来。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-30]“山寨先行，很多人在看牛市，看山寨季”；[2025-07-30]“山寨又开始砸盘了…大的要来”；[2025-07-29]“山寨一片红 就大饼二饼现在还绿色的”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Relative Strength Trap Read
emerged_uncurated.description: Interpret abnormal short-term strength in ETH or selected majors during an otherwise bearish regime as a liquidity draw or bull trap rather than genuine leadership.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在整体偏空背景下，把 ETH 或部分主流币的异常抗跌/走强解读为吸引接盘的诱多，而非真正领涨。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-05-29]“ETH现在还没完全成立空头趋势…表现的很坚强，为了诱多而已”；[2025-07-29]“ETH一点不走寻常路啊…ETH反弹的有点多了”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_364_文字点位播报型交易表达
emerged_uncurated.name: Text First Broadcast Trading
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 文字点位播报型交易表达
emerged_uncurated.description: A content-led trading workflow where daily posts and live streams deliver directional scripts, key levels, and execution bias, with less reliance on publicly shared annotated charts.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 以内容播报为核心的交易工作流：通过每日帖文和直播给出剧本、关键点位和执行偏向，公开表达上对复杂图表标注依赖较低。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 大量帖子是“X号老韭菜说币：…行情回顾解析/今晚九点直播”；而本次提供的 8 张附件并非标准 K 线标注图，说明其公开 feed 更偏文字/直播驱动，而不是图表模板驱动。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_365_江恩角度/江恩价位反应
emerged_uncurated.name: Gann Angle / Gann Level Reaction
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 江恩角度/江恩价位反应
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses Gann angles, square-style geometric levels, and angle-to-angle rotations to identify major bottoms, support, resistance, and timing pivots on high time frames.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用江恩角度、几何价位与角度轮换来识别大级别底部、支撑阻力与时间拐点，主要用于周线/月线。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-09-30 写道“Using Gann's methods, I have successfully identified numerous market bottoms”；2026-04-06 说“$IREN has a great chance of holding this Gann level around 34”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_366_高周期一目均衡表基准线/云层收复
emerged_uncurated.name: High-Timeframe Ichimoku Reclaim
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 高周期一目均衡表基准线/云层收复
emerged_uncurated.description: Treats a monthly or weekly close above the Ichimoku baseline or cloud, especially for the first time ever, as a major bullish trend reversal and support flip.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把周线/月线首次站上一目均衡表基准线或云层，视为重大趋势反转和支撑翻转信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-11-29 说“两张图首次收在 monthly Ichimoku Baseline 上方”；2026-02-27 说“Waiting for an Ichimoku Cloud retest on the weekly chart is usually one of the strongest strategies”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_367_月线收盘站上斐波扩展位
emerged_uncurated.name: Monthly Close Above Fib Extension
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 月线收盘站上斐波扩展位
emerged_uncurated.description: Interprets a monthly close above major extension or retracement thresholds such as 0.786, 0.886, 1.272, or 1.414 as a structural breakout that unlocks the next extension targets.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将月线收盘站上 0.786、0.886、1.272、1.414 等关键斐波位，视为结构性突破，并指向更高扩展目标。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-10-31 说 IWM 若月收高于 2021 high，“Fib extensions above are coming”；2025-07-31 说 COIN “surpassing the linear scale 0.786 Fibonacci level at $344.37... incredibly bullish”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Arc / Channel Confluence Framework
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses long-duration arcs and parallel channels as dynamic support/resistance to frame where secular breakouts, pullbacks, or rejection tops should occur.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用多年弧线和等距通道作为动态支撑阻力，判断长期突破、回踩和顶部拒绝区。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-08-31 说“$SOL is starting to flip my top arc to a support again”；附图 #4 为 SPY 多年斜率通道，附图 #6 为黄金白银多年上升通道共振。

emerged_uncurated.name: Social Sentiment Extreme Reversal
emerged_uncurated.description: Use social mention spikes, fear/greed extremes, and timeline sentiment washouts as contrarian timing inputs for local bottoms or overheated tops.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用社交媒体提及量、恐惧贪婪极值和时间线情绪崩溃/狂热作为反向时机信号，捕捉局部底部或过热顶部。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-27: “The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just hit its lowest level since the 2022 bear market... often lead to a local bottom.”；2025-01-31: “Buy fear, sell greed.”；2025-02-27: “Social mentions for 'altseason' have plummeted...”

emerged_uncurated.name: Retail Attention Proxy
emerged_uncurated.description: Track retail participation through YouTube views, social mention growth, viral narratives, and timeline behavior to estimate how crowded or early a move is.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 通过 YouTube 播放量、社交提及增长、叙事传播度和时间线行为来估计散户参与度，从而判断行情拥挤度或所处早晚期。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-07-30: “YouTube is the best retail indicator in crypto.”；2024-11-30: “Retail don't come back for no reason. Retail come back because they see others making money.”；2025-01-31: “Social mentions across all platforms for 'tokenization' has 5xd...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_371_叙事轮动与选择性山寨框架
emerged_uncurated.name: Narrative Rotation Selectivity
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 叙事轮动与选择性山寨框架
emerged_uncurated.description: Instead of assuming broad altseason, identify the few narratives with actual flows, product-market fit, or social momentum and rotate selectively into them.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不假设全面山寨季，而是识别真正有资金流、产品市场契合或社交动量的少数叙事，并进行选择性轮动配置。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-30: “Memes/AI/RWA/L1s. That's the tweet.”；2024-12-31: “I don't think we're very close to a full blown alt season... certain”；2025-06-26: “increasing unlocks + dispersion, and decreasing demand... you h...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_372_大会/日历事件季节性反手
emerged_uncurated.name: Conference / Calendar Seasonality Fade
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 大会/日历事件季节性反手
emerged_uncurated.description: Use recurring crypto calendar events as sentiment/exhaustion markers when price stops responding to good news and positioning is crowded.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当价格对利好钝化且仓位拥挤时，把重复出现的加密日历事件当作情绪顶点或衰竭标记。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-05-30: “$BTC always dumps after the Bitcoin Conference (5/5 track record)..” 以及同日“Market stopped reacting to good news, sign of exhaustion.”

emerged_uncurated.name: Regulatory Clarity Catalyst
emerged_uncurated.description: Trades directional crypto exposure based on legislative, SEC, White House, OCC, or court developments that improve or damage regulatory clarity for a token, sector, or market structure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 基于立法、SEC、白宫、OCC 或法院进展带来的监管清晰度变化，去交易单个代币、板块或整体市场方向。

output_when_triggered.bias: bullish if clarity improves, bearish if blocked

emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-01-29] “CLARITY UPDATE...”; [2026-03-28] “Protect DEFI, developers, and self custody... crypto wins!”；[2026-04-09] “Crypto Now National Security! ... well-defined regulatory perimeter would strengthen...”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_374_美国本土加密叙事轮动
emerged_uncurated.name: American Crypto Narrative Rotation
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 美国本土加密叙事轮动
emerged_uncurated.description: Overweights tokens framed as strategic U.S. winners under policy, national-security, or institutional adoption narratives.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当某些代币被包装为美国政策、国家安全或机构采用受益者时，给予其结构性超配。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “White House crypto report shows @hedera $HBAR as an American Crypto asset”; [2025-02-20] “what crypto will be the rails for crypto payments in #America?”

emerged_uncurated.name: Stablecoin Policy Arb
emerged_uncurated.description: Trades stablecoin issuers, payment rails, and related L1/Ledger tokens based on policy toward yield, reserves, and banking access.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕稳定币利息、储备金与银行准入政策变化，交易稳定币发行方、支付网络及相关公链/账本代币。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-02-27] “Why is the administration so determined to kill retail yield?”；[2025-11-27] “And so it begins! #RLUSD”；[2025-05-26] 关于 Ripple/Circle/USDC 并购与稳定币版图。

emerged_uncurated.name: Community Sentiment Poll Momentum
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses retail/community polling, engagement spikes, and creator audience reactions as a soft momentum or narrative-strength signal.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把社区投票、互动飙升与内容受众反馈，当作软性的动量/叙事强度信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-03-14] “Early lead: the #XRPforce is strong in this one. Market Sentiment never lies.”；[2025-03-18] “round Robin based on popular voting to determine a Portfolio”

emerged_uncurated.name: Multi-Timeframe Trend Ladder
emerged_uncurated.description: Use H1/H4/D1 trendlines and key EMAs/MAs as a hierarchy: lower timeframe for trigger, higher timeframe for bias and invalidation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用 H1/H4/D1 趋势线与关键 EMA/MA 构成分层框架：低周期负责触发，高周期负责方向与失效。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 多次出现 “H1 trend”, “H4 trend”, “D1 trend”, “H1 200 EMA”, “D1 100 MA climbing”；[2024-10-31] 甚至明确给出 H1/H4 联立条件。

emerged_uncurated.name: Weekend Session Trap Playbook
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat weekend and Sunday evening price action as low-trust microstructure, often expecting traps before a clearer move around early next week or NY open.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把周末尤其周日晚间价格行为视为低可信微观结构，预期先诱骗/扫单，再在下周初或纽约开盘附近给出更可信方向。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2024-05-31] “greenish saturday, trappy sunday, resolution early next week”; [2024-06-30] “hard to trust [Sunday evening-Monday NYO] moves”.

emerged_uncurated.name: Alert-Driven Patience
emerged_uncurated.description: Stay mostly inactive until alerts at preplanned levels fire; avoid forcing trades between levels.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 大部分时间保持不交易，直到预设价位的 alert 触发；尽量不在区间中段强行出手。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “Meanwhile still no alerts triggered no trades”; [2024-05-31] “alerts will hit if stopped or targets”; [2026-01-31] “receiving alerts of market tanking on its own”.

emerged_uncurated.name: Expectation-Pricing Gap
emerged_uncurated.description: Evaluate not just the data/event itself, but how much of it is already priced by the market; trade the gap between realized outcome and consensus positioning.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不只看数据或事件本身，而是判断市场此前已经计价了多少；交易真正结果与一致预期、仓位拥挤之间的差值。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-08-31："市场对数据或者重大事件的预期程度或者计价程度是一个很有意思也值得深度探讨的话题。" 2025-04-30："数据感觉很炸裂...但是市场只是小幅下挫并没有暴跌。"

emerged_uncurated.name: Liquidity Plumbing Monitor
emerged_uncurated.description: Track funding plumbing variables such as SOFR, RRP, BTFP, Treasury issuance/refunding, and quarter-end balance sheet effects to anticipate cross-asset pressure.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪 SOFR、逆回购、BTFP、财政部再融资、季末再平衡等流动性管道变量，预判跨资产波动与风险偏好变化。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-05-28："金融压力指数FSI跟风险市场是标准的负相关走势。" 2024-12-31："sofr短期走高带来市场流动性的小幅度挤压。" 2024-01-26："BTFP到期不续以及逆回购用量消耗完。"

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_382_BTC 新高带动山寨广度扩散
emerged_uncurated.name: BTC ATH Breadth Trigger
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 新高带动山寨广度扩散
emerged_uncurated.description: Broad alt rotation is not assumed before BTC reclaims or breaks prior cycle highs; BTC ATH acts as a regime trigger for broader beta expansion.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 在 BTC 收复或突破前高之前，不默认山寨全面普涨；BTC 创历史新高是山寨广度扩散的制度切换触发器。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-02-27："在大饼没有ATH之前，小币都只是结构化行情，大饼ATH全面普涨行情就会到来。"

emerged_uncurated.name: Event Cluster Window
emerged_uncurated.description: Map weeks or months by clustering macro events, earnings, and policy catalysts; expect volatility expansion in event-dense windows and reduce certainty outside them.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 按宏观数据、财报、政策节点的密集程度给周/月做事件簇标注；事件密集窗口预期波动放大，事件稀疏期降低方向确信度。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-11-30："12月市场前瞻，中旬应该是市场波动放大的时期。" 附图 7 本质上就是按月做事件簇管理。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_384_再积累区间突破与回踩确认
emerged_uncurated.name: Re-Accumulation Range Breakout And Retest
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 再积累区间突破与回踩确认
emerged_uncurated.description: Identify a macro sideways range inside an ongoing bull market, wait for decisive higher-timeframe close above range high, then treat the first retest as confirmation for transition into the next expansion leg.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 识别牛市中的宏观横盘再积累区间，等待高周期有效收盘突破区间上沿，再把首次回踩视为进入下一段主升浪的确认。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-10-29 “Bitcoin is on the cusp of fully transitioning out from its ReAccumulation phase”; 2024-11-30 “successfully Daily Closed above the trendline resistance… That's a breakout”; 图2展示了区间突破后回踩上沿。

emerged_uncurated.name: CME Gap Magnet And Fill
emerged_uncurated.description: Track unfilled Bitcoin CME futures gaps as likely short-to-medium-term magnets; once price enters the gap zone, monitor whether the full fill completes and whether the zone flips into support or resistance.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 跟踪比特币 CME 期货未回补缺口，把其视为短中期价格磁吸区；价格进入缺口后，观察是否完全回补，以及缺口区域随后转化为支撑或阻力。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-02-28 连发多条：“Bitcoin has finally filled its CME Gap between $78,000 and ~$80,700”；“Bitcoin is currently filling the CME Gap between $78,000 and ~$80,700”；图1直接标注 78,030 到 80,730 的缺口区。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_386_价格发现阶段周序列模型
emerged_uncurated.name: Price Discovery Week Sequencing
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 价格发现阶段周序列模型
emerged_uncurated.description: Once Bitcoin breaks into price discovery, map the advance by week count and expect historically corrective windows, then plan profit-taking, de-risking, and re-entry around those windows.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 当比特币进入价格发现阶段后，按周数跟踪上升过程，并预判历史上常见的修正窗口，用于安排止盈、降风险和重新介入。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-12-23 “Historically, Week 8 in BTC Price Discovery tends to be a corrective week”；2025-05-23 “It is Week 1 of Price Discovery Uptrend 2”；2025-07-28 “It's technically Week 4 of Price Discovery Uptrend 2”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Bull Market Progress Meter
emerged_uncurated.description: Convert cycle age and historical analogs into a simple bull-market completion percentage to communicate where the market sits between re-accumulation, price discovery, and parabolic maturity.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把周期所处时间和历史类比转化为一个简化的牛市完成度百分比，用于表达市场位于再积累、价格发现还是抛物线成熟阶段。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_388_BTC 市占率 71% 拒绝触发山寨季
emerged_uncurated.name: BTC Dominance 71 Percent Rejection Trigger
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: BTC 市占率 71% 拒绝触发山寨季
emerged_uncurated.description: Treat the 71% Bitcoin dominance region as a macro pivot; rejection from or near that level increases probability of capital rotating into ETH and altcoins.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把 BTC 市占率 71% 区域视为宏观枢轴位；若在该区域附近遭拒，资金轮动到 ETH 和山寨的概率明显上升。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-03-30 “the real Altseason everybody is waiting for would begin once Bitcoin Dominance rejects from 71%”; 2025-03-31 “The strongest Altseasons have occurred every time Bitcoin Dominance rejected from 71%”; 图6红线即 71.04%。

emerged_uncurated.name: Sentiment Gauge Dislocation
emerged_uncurated.description: Use popular sentiment gauges like Fear & Greed as a contrary overlay; when the readout stays elevated or depressed despite visibly different price action, treat it as evidence the crowd metric is stale or misleading.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把大众情绪指标当作反向过滤器；当恐惧贪婪等读数与价格体感明显错位时，视为市场情绪度量滞后或失真，从而提高对反向交易/均值回归的关注。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-04-30: "There is NO way we are still at 'greed' lol." 配图是 Fear & Greed 仍显示 67 Greed，但他认为市场体感已不匹配。

emerged_uncurated.name: High-Timeframe Reversal Candle
emerged_uncurated.description: Focus on monthly or weekly candles that threaten to print a major reversal body/wick after an extended move; used as a narrative turning-point signal rather than a precise trigger.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 关注周线或月线在长趋势后即将形成的大级别反转实体或长影线，把它作为趋势拐点叙事信号，而不是精确入场信号。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2025-04-30: "$ETH MONTHLY Ethereum is about to print an epic reversal candle on the monthly chart."

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_391_支撑定义清晰的不对称交易
emerged_uncurated.name: Asymmetric Support-defined Trade
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 支撑定义清晰的不对称交易
emerged_uncurated.description: Enter near the last major support or a major moving average only when invalidation is obvious, because the setup offers unusually favorable reward relative to clearly limited downside.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 只在最后关键支撑或重要均线附近出手，前提是失效位非常清晰，这样才能获得显著偏斜的盈亏比。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2026-01-31: "$XRP ... at the last meaningful support ... best risk/reward ... Easy to cut loose"；同日对 SOL 也因 WEEKLY 200MA 支撑而买入。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_392_成交量阈值市场状态过滤
emerged_uncurated.name: Turnover Threshold Regime Filter
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 成交量阈值市场状态过滤
emerged_uncurated.description: Classify market regime by absolute turnover/liquidity thresholds rather than price alone. If turnover stays below a trader-defined threshold, treat rebounds as weak and avoid extrapolating trend.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 用绝对成交额阈值而非仅靠价格来定义市场状态。若成交量低于自定义门槛，则把反弹视为弱反弹，不轻易外推趋势。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-11-25]“想要维持A股大级别的反弹行情，必要条件是日成交量要维持在2万亿以上”；[2026-04-10]“没有持续2.5万亿的量能维持，A股短期是很难站稳4000点的”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Geopolitical Headline Rotation
emerged_uncurated.description: Trade cross-asset rotations off war, ceasefire, tariff, and political headlines, especially gold/oil/equities leadership reversals around escalation and de-escalation.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 围绕战争、停火、关税、政治头条做跨资产轮动交易，重点捕捉金银、原油、股市在升级与缓和时的领导权切换。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2026-03-24]“伊朗冲突一旦缓和，哪些资产反弹空间最大？金银、光模、互联等”；[2026-04-08]“我不认为市场就反转了”；图3是 Kalshi 的政治概率图，说明她会把政治事件概率当作交易输入。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_394_财报二阶传导与供应链外溢
emerged_uncurated.name: Second-Order Earnings Spillover
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 财报二阶传导与供应链外溢
emerged_uncurated.description: Instead of trading the reporting company directly, infer the next beneficiary layer in the supply chain or adjacent theme from earnings, capex, and management commentary.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 不是只交易公布财报的公司本身，而是根据财报、资本开支和管理层表述，向外推演下一层受益的供应链或邻近主题。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 图6文字写得很直白：“交易1.0是科技巨头基本面判断股价，2.0是通过巨头们的财报去找到铲子股，3.0是直接发现下一个巨头。” 她的多条A股复盘也围绕“服务器电源”“AIDC链”“光模”“存储”等二阶受益方向展开。

emerged_uncurated.name: Cross-Asset Analogy Mapping
emerged_uncurated.description: Map one asset's behavior to another analogous asset class to infer timing, sentiment, or regime shift, even when correlation is loose or narrative-based.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 把一个资产的行为映射到另一个相似资产上，以推断时点、情绪或风格切换，即使相关性并非严格统计意义上的稳定相关。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: [2025-09-25]“白银和以太坊背离了…一般来说黄金下跌，比特币上涨，同理白银和以太坊也是这样的”；图7也直接写“你们的ETH，我的黄金，都会有光明的未来”。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_396_短期持币者成本线框架
emerged_uncurated.name: STH Cost Basis Framework
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 短期持币者成本线框架
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses the Short-Term Holder cost basis and its deviations as dynamic support/resistance, bull-market reset marker, and trend continuation filter.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 以短期持币者成本线及其偏离度作为动态支撑/阻力、牛市重置与趋势延续判断框架。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-06-18“STH cost basis at $63.8k.”；2024-10-23“Reclaimed key levels: STH cost basis, 21-week, and 200-day moving averages.”；2025-09-05“Bouncing off the STH cost basis at ~$109K.”

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_397_ETF 净流入对新发行供给挤压
emerged_uncurated.name: ETF Flow vs New Issuance Supply Squeeze
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: ETF 净流入对新发行供给挤压
emerged_uncurated.description: Measures whether spot ETF net inflows are absorbing a multiple of newly mined BTC supply; high multiples imply structural demand pressure and bullish squeeze conditions.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 衡量现货 ETF 净流入是否吸收了数倍于新增挖矿发行的 BTC 供给；倍数越高，越说明结构性买盘与供给挤压越强。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-02-27“That is 10x the issuance”；2024-10-22“record 9x the new supply issuance”；2025-04-28“over 11x the new supply issuance, a new record!”

emerged_uncurated.name: Spiral Quadrant Cycle Map
emerged_uncurated.description: Maps Bitcoin price progression across repeated 4-year spirals/quadrants to identify where the market sits relative to prior cycle ATHs, bottoms, and halving points.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 将比特币价格路径映射到重复的 4 年螺旋/象限中，用于识别当前相对历史周期顶部、底部与减半点的位置。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 附图 1、2、5 都是他标志性的 Spiral / 4-Year Cycle 图；2024-12-05“Crossed the 100k ring! 🚀”说明他连整数价位都用同心圆/环带来表达周期推进。

emerged_uncurated.id: emg_399_从周期底部归一化比较
emerged_uncurated.name: Cycle Bottom Normalized Comparison
emerged_uncurated.name_zh: 从周期底部归一化比较
emerged_uncurated.description: Normalizes each BTC cycle by days since bottom and compares the current path against prior cycles to estimate whether the market is lagging, in line, or outperforming.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 按“距离周期底部的天数”归一化每一轮 BTC 周期，并与历史周期对比，判断当前是落后、对齐还是跑赢。
emerged_uncurated.example_evidence: 2024-09-22“Recovery since cycle bottom.”；2024-08-27“Outperforming previous cycles.”；2024-12-21“Right in between the previous two cycles.”；附图 7 标题即“Bitcoin Cycles: comparison from cycle bottom”。

emerged_uncurated.name: Quarterly Seasonality Bias
emerged_uncurated.description: Uses recurring quarter-based seasonality, especially Q3 softness and Q4 optimism, as a contextual bias overlay for BTC trend expectations.
emerged_uncurated.description_zh: 使用季度季节性，尤其是 Q3 偏弱、Q4 乐观，作为 BTC 趋势预期的上下文偏置层。
